name: Mike Pence
subject: I’m running for President of the United States
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence For President
body:
I believe that God and the Constitution must return to the forefront of our families, our communities and our government.

| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | |
---
| | | Friend, this is Mike Pence. Let me be the first to tell you I’ve officially launched my campaign for President of the United States. You can watch our full launch video here:
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNjA4X0FFLUZGUC4xMDMxNDZfdDEzNDkwNzQtMjgzMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyMzA2MDhfQUUtRkZQLjEwMzE0Nl90MTM0OTA3NC0yODMzIn0/Mqr6Itzsk2F5t4Zhox2pig)
---
| | | [JOIN TEAM PENCE](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNjA4X0FFLUZGUC4xMDMxNDZfdDEzNDkwNzQtMjgzMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyMzA2MDhfQUUtRkZQLjEwMzE0Nl90MTM0OTA3NC0yODMzIn0/4IJYmUqK9MScOQS7egnGBw)
---
This is not a decision I came to overnight, Friend. It has taken years of prayerful consideration with my wife Karen and our family.

After many long nights and longer conversations, we came to this conclusion: Our nation is at a crossroads, and the decisions we make next will chart our nation’s course for decades to come.

**I believe that God and the Constitution must return to the forefront of our families, our communities and our government.**
---
| | | [JOIN TEAM PENCE](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNjA4X0FFLUZGUC4xMDMxNDZfdDEzNDkwNzQtMjgzMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyMzA2MDhfQUUtRkZQLjEwMzE0Nl90MTM0OTA3NC0yODMzIn0/hFvw4siFulgpwmKBxafS3Q)
---
Growing up in Indiana, surrounded by God-fearing, hardworking Hoosiers, I always knew that I wanted to give back to the state and the country that had given me so much. During the Trump-Pence administration, I was able to take steps toward achieving that goal with conservative policies that put American families FIRST.

**But our work is far from over. **

Our values have never been under attack like they are today: from our schools, to our police departments, all the way to the car sitting in your driveway, Biden’s White House and their far-left elitists have never been less connected to Americans’ day-to-day lives, yet they have more say over what we do than ever before.

**Bottom line: America is in dire need of common sense leadership. From one God-fearing conservative to another, I’m asking YOU to be a leading voice in our campaign to bring our country back to what it once was.**
---
| | | [JOIN TEAM PENCE](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNjA4X0FFLUZGUC4xMDMxNDZfdDEzNDkwNzQtMjgzMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyMzA2MDhfQUUtRkZQLjEwMzE0Nl90MTM0OTA3NC0yODMzIn0/DvB_Axuw2rWgGOWQXbP9Iw)
---
_**[If you want to return to common sense, God-fearing leadership, then I ask that you make a $15 gift to our campaign today.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNjA4X0FFLUZGUC4xMDMxNDZfdDEzNDkwNzQtMjgzMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyMzA2MDhfQUUtRkZQLjEwMzE0Nl90MTM0OTA3NC0yODMzIn0/_fEfOgBxq3CMQWkEt9KTvg "If you want to return to common sense, God-fearing leadership, then I ask that you make a $15 gift to our campaign today.")**_

If Bidenflation is hurting you too much to get involved financially, that’s perfectly ok. I simply ask that you keep our campaign and everyone involved in your prayers - we’re going to need it.

Thank you for your time, Friend, you’ll be hearing a lot more from me soon.

God bless you and God bless America,
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjMwNjA4X0FFLUZGUC4xMDMxNDZfdDEzNDkwNzQtMjgzMyZleF90aWQ9MjAyMzA2MDhfQUUtRkZQLjEwMzE0Nl90MTM0OTA3NC0yODMzIn0/TnO8oBdW4G_bzVwhk1JFCQ)
---
Mike Pence
---
|
---
| Paid for by Mike Pence For President
---

Meridian Tower 10201 north Illinois Suite 400
Indianapolis, IN 46290
United States

[Privacy Policy](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Urgent Grassroots Meeting
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
I would like to invite you to join me on Tuesday, June 13th at 7:00pm ET to discuss what we are doing to Secure the Senate majority next year and how you can help. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61895375:sanUOPDFN:m:1:877327319:9B69E1FD2CE059464B6EF3D8E68089A5:r)
---
Fellow American,

**I am hosting a live telephone town hall to update and talk with my best supporters next Tuesday!**

**I would like to invite you to join me on Tuesday, June 13 th at 7:00pm ET to discuss what we are doing to Secure the Senate majority next year and how you can help. To join this live conversation with me, please call **866-495-1092** at 7:00pm ET Tuesday evening or [**click here to sign up and my team will call you when the town hall begins.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61895375:sanUOPDFN:m:1:877327319:9B69E1FD2CE059464B6EF3D8E68089A5:r)**

Fellow American, we have witnessed how far the Radical Left is willing to go to push their liberal agenda this year. It's truly unbelievable.

While the Democrats are taking us down the path to Socialism, the truth is that we are only TWO SEATS away from winning back Republican control of the Senate next year. This election cycle, we have one of the best Senate maps for Republicans in recent history - but if we don't start the hard work now, we will lose again.

Fellow American, I will be talking about these topics and many more Tuesday evening, so I hope to speak directly with you and answer your questions.

To participate, all you need to do is call **866-495-1092** at 7:00pm Tuesday, June 13th evening or [**click here to sign up.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61895375:sanUOPDFN:m:1:877327319:9B69E1FD2CE059464B6EF3D8E68089A5:r)

**I appreciate your continued support and look forward to talking with you on our telephone town hall.**

Sincerely,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61895375:sanUOPDFN:m:1:877327319:9B69E1FD2CE059464B6EF3D8E68089A5:r)

Lindsey Graham

| [**RSVP TODAY ->**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61895375:sanUOPDFN:m:1:877327319:9B69E1FD2CE059464B6EF3D8E68089A5:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61895377:sanUOPDFN:m:1:877327319:9B69E1FD2CE059464B6EF3D8E68089A5:r)
In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

| [** Support Senator Graham! **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61895377:sanUOPDFN:m:1:877327319:9B69E1FD2CE059464B6EF3D8E68089A5:r)

name: Team Allred for Texas via Blue Amp Action
subject: FiveThirtyEight says the Texas Senate seat could be Democrats’ best pickup opportunity in 2024. We could do this!
body:
Texas is finally a “battleground” state
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb6e73cd4-6555-4581-a753-053f8db8d379/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te02d9527-d5e5-4ac5-8f7c-20a1a598f33b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) INCREDIBLE news, Peter: Roll Call just shifted their Texas Senate race ranking from “Solid Republican” to “Battleground,” and now, FiveThirtyEight says this could be [Democrats’ best pickup opportunity in 2024!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7209cfb5-9a05-458f-905c-6283d74150ce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) National news outlets are confirming what we already know: Texans are ready for change, and Colin Allred has what it takes to win this thing. But Ted Cruz isn’t going down without a fight. It’s clear this will be one of the most expensive races in the country, and we’re counting on your grassroots support to make sure Colin has the resources he needs to defeat Ted Cruz. [Please, will you rush $10 or more to split between our campaign and Blue Amp Action](https://default.salsalabs.org/T916bdfb4-87aa-46c6-8d97-fc90aff23151/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ before our midnight fundraising deadline to help Colin beat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf7e797c4-7f8c-406c-8bba-314cc7428c5f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you, Team Allred
---
|

| | | | |
---
| | |

|

| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Have You Done This Yet? If Not, You Should!
body:
I have a question for you? Have you SUBSCRIBED to Sheridan.Church's YouTube page? There is a tremendous amount of content uploaded on our channel.
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22417986.12664.1.31197c230c43838caa97520ec0fcc0fd) |
---
I have a question for you? Have you **SUBSCRIBED** to [Sheridan.Church's YouTube page](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22417986.12665.1.fd6089b0ee03e45a3f3b6731d7e829f8)? There is a _tremendous_ amount of content uploaded on our [channel](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22417986.12666.1.a6fe503ee54db3cbec786bf8f1da45b0). I recently just finished a **_32-part series_** over the [Book of Revelation](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22417986.12667.1.1d454ae5c65521c0890b76ab998567b4). We went **verse by verse** through all 22 chapters I also finished a **_51-part series_** over the [Book of Genesis](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22417986.12668.1.15bb341287ab06dc53816807f88fd186). Currently, we are working our way through the [Book of Acts](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22417986.12669.1.7756e4efa2df752734b50039f494d7b8). I encourage you to take a deep dive into the Scriptures through these FREE resources and subscribe to [Sheridan.Church's YouTube page](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22417986.12670.1.cacef96ee03ac8f6bef72a081dbf8ae1). Subscribe: [www.youtube.com/@sheridanchurch](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22417986.12671.1.65ac567c64d2c62ddb719087634ee867) Also, if you do not have a home church, join me this WKND at [Sheridan](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22417986.12672.1.bc455d0499d636710fd02731d13fffe3) OKC & Tulsa: **-Saturday, June 10** @5pm - Acts Pt. 9 - Upon All Flesh (OKC) **-Sunday, June 11** @9&11am - Acts Pt. 9 - Upon All Flesh (Tulsa) Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22417986.12673.1.076627e33aaf296d9ee1e4719301aa27), GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22417986.12674.1.90699c5fe30fb84537bb6196e9e3a95b), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22417986.12675.1.8483a5c62338e2a9b324060530c35ac7), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22417986.12676.1.78f891192110032b22b4632615c82d65), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22417986.12677.1.dd2fc70d1b04cb31083403ce9520ea91), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22417986.12678.1.9fd6b7d60c1d43c7745b7c18324dee5a)). [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=22417986.12679.1.9831ccb411b3885c13e3591c156df29c)

# Thursday, June 8, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** On this date in 1949, George Orwell’s classic novel “1984” was published. Originally seen as dystopian science fiction, it’s now considered a basic primer for understanding how modern propaganda works. Today we’re talking about the criminal investigation into former President Trump’s handling of classified documents, CNN firing its CEO, and a live stream of an erupting volcano in Hawaii. Think we could improve something? [Share your ideas here.](mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover) If this is your first time reading _The Flyover_ , [sign up here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz7FOwzAQgOGnsbdG5zvbdQZvqFtZGSMnuWsPOTUKJoi3R2Kl6y_9w_d2na5Fqz5ur2Xj3KVNZel68ATxBOmENKFdszAjk-XsYoqINKZk75mBxjLPHslLWnAMEFh4FXIpLELFakZAggjJATgKgwsxzEJcSMKIZ2c88Kq97cN700e_s9SfdvA-LG2zNf-PBi-GLl99M_Tiwe55_fjWWvUzno2H21a0_r39OeU3AAD__wJ_SiQ) and make sure you catch every edition. ## Feds Target Trump in Criminal Investigation
Donald Trump is officially the target of a [criminal investigation](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0TGr3DAMB_BP42w6ZDmxkyFD4ZHtde14-MVyouLYR-JeeN--5OCgQzVo0Q8k9P_1ef_0kiQvP_3GY43l7ucqT76jBeyBzJ2aMEZmYtPwqG1viczQ9806OjMY98WOBkY9Y-ssY9cyO6Mj8dA1MhKSQYu9RtSmu-nOdl_RsDexG8hp1SIHqWW__S6S68oxfZcn77e5bE0a11ofhzI_FE2KpvM8b4-SpMpcLqBoynweiqZri6IJ7dWcoqnuf7YH5FIlCgeoq6-wMsgBdWWofl-4QongM5S8FMkLzLtskn0CyU8-qiy-SsmAqBEHQmWmnP3Gyny8b4Asy1rTtyKbJSjzgVdphzAjIgTfO_DR9cC676J3r_GF9390yxCRA4QwGPDBRYg9Bx_c8Nbppck6bNuu2cfwOCUlOaxTLS6bl_T6Vv1_eH8DAAD__85Tkmk). Special Counsel Jack Smith sent a letter to Trump's lawyers, notifying them that the former President is at the center of a grand jury investigation over his handling of classified documents. The "[target letter](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LtuwyAUgOGnwRsWl5jggaGLt3TtaBFzcE7FxYLTuHn7qp07_8uv7-O23jwmLPu7z-Ao1tVvhE9YheHCcqVXNQQXARToAZw01iilZ2uHhzNWbmGK0UO09n4X80X4MIU5bLOetZADOiWUFkZYKYTU0ygnM92jBq_jNKurZBcBAam28bNioQfE9KpPaONW85Dcg-joTL8xtTC1nOc5xvpd4Oy_nanlqAkJt87UQu0rH9wT1Vbg1XmphBEh8FhbhsaPBh0DFOLk2w7Et4YZi08cyxM64e4JaxmaC8eJKWE3V3YRe_aY_m7of5yfAAAA___WOmpK)" is a routine part of federal investigations and does not necessarily mean that Trump will be indicted. It is, however, an indicator of the investigation's direction, and it increases the probability that Trump will be forced to defend himself against criminal charges in court. The investigation began in November 2022--several months after the FBI raid at Mar-a-Lago--and members of Trump's inner circle have already testified in front of the [grand jury](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuhSAYRp8GNwz8COLA0MXtdu1oEH6UBsQg95q-fXM7d_mWLzk5OV-P5WFjisf2aTOaFspiXYsvXJiiTFMQC3TeBERA0aHhSisAMWnd7WYMXkxceD4EkACSr3JwIxscotATsC4aYCCYYpozxoXsuVRyDQKtCHKCkZOBoY-t1P67xKPtGNJPeWHtXcldMntr50XEB4GZwHzfd--O1b1PAvMbTWBm6j2awNzqM5-0leTpjjRetNm6YaMl0GwrtTTZrVBf3DPj0S7qaszxsImetazY7y2nrhp_3jGleKmRDGzLNqY_mfZ_m98AAAD__0y_ZB4).
## Wildfires Spark Air Quality Warnings in 17 States
Major air-quality alerts hit [125 million Americans](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFywyAQRL9G6tAch0FSQZHGndOm1CBxWJdgoUHEJH-fsd2m2tndV-zsx2W6OI68Xd_djWwJaXJL4TtNYAQMAtWErbeBCEm1ZKUZDKIah6FdrTceRqmDkRLGPnjQYZxnlPPSn5weh5YtAiowMEgAqXQntdFzUORU0CP2sjkBeS4pd5-Jt7JSiL_pTrlb0q2Ndi1lPxr11uC5wXOttQvpp5Ir6wt5hC8nNqpHg-eS3fJFWTyVt6vYU4zfhdMm9pSymPODfxSOswic6Wiz9XvlGPkwfXOC681xfA4o___xFwAA__-wTGP3) in 17 states as wildfires raged along the Canadian border. Airports in the New York area were temporarily closed from smoke and haze, outdoor baseball games were canceled, and residents in many cities were warned to stay indoors. [Maps of the affected areas](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0D-PozAQBfBPY7pBZswfp6C4hi7XXokm9jjMxWCEvUH59quslG6b1zzpp6f37zpfSaJs97-08lhCmskVefKse9AW0MxY-TEwI5uKx6a3PaK5WFstIw0-sPNsGR3bC9k2dJ7ZtE1wQQ-ukhE1Gt1r22jdmK5uur67BcNkQnfBoVGtZi8lHfX_JFtZOMRXevJRu7RWcVxK2bMyfxROCqfzPOtHPtK7VDi9aYWT7j9xSvRBDoa8pgfDSjuci7gFvjI4KcIZcqHCGehguLFsd5B1J1fYw-0FjjbyQht8oKxwqo7R76fEKLkfVKvvK0n8mVd-f-s7AAD__-YLbM4) run as far south as the Carolinas and include cities from Cincinnati to Syracuse. New York City was one of the worst affected, with air quality alerts set at the highest label of "hazardous." Photos from the city show it enveloped in a thick, orange haze. ([Photos](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOszAQBOCnMZ0jszYGChd_Q5e_vRIteB32zmDOOIlyT38i9TXTfNJoNB_X8Yocebv9x5VcCWnEufCDRmWl6iToESrvAhGQrsjVtrMAuu-6anETYg-KWkW-b9BPZjJdb8xcq7nRHk3FDhRoZVVXK1Xr5lI3tpmCJtSh6aGthVHkuaR8-Uy8lYVCfKUH5cuc1iq6pZT9EPqfgEHAsL32dJSTBAxnsYBB2TPat85ywR_MPt0PiZzl9x0jl5fkTe5LKumQE4WUSeLmJYZCWZaF5JOjD5xJHmv6IgFDlZ3fnxwjH7YVRt1W5PheVP4-6DcAAP__a4BnFw))
## Carlson Rockets Past 90 Million Views
Tucker Carlson racked up an astonishing 90 million views -- and counting -- within 24 hours for Tuesday's debut edition of his new Twitter program. [His primetime show](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDEPmzAUhH-N2R4yNjgwMGRhaJVKnToiY57Da7Gd2o_Q_vuKzJ1uuNOd7vvxmB-WdorPbzbgyD7N1jG9cZYGZA9Kz6paR4-oUFc4NqY3Sumh76ttRI-6wU63yzAsRjls0WrvbedXMyiLFY1KKi2N7BspG93VTWe6xesr1g3q1ohW4kqccv0zUeQN_f43vTHXLoVqHzfmVxH6LtQk1HSeZx1KvDyhJozwXD7KmNlSDBhZqCnxhlmoiQ_3CzM4m_eSIhSIeAKfxIwZypZOWHE5GFfgBMGWQm-EeIQFM9hAa2H4fWBhSrGAXdLBsFEBn_5cTQVcipytuyZthvu9cf77l69VHtfXSftOxdxEK5_B0v55w_-H-y8AAP__TLKATg) on Fox typically averaged around 3 million households. Fox News on Wednesday [threatened legal action](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uwyAURp8Gb1jX94YfDwxdvKVrR4vgS0xLTIRpnL59lc5dvuWTzpHOx3k--5TTdn33N3YtltmHlh48g5ZgJdKM3eIiMzJ17AZtNSKN1narUyYQDzEEb6MCAm-CZjJxGWGBSGOXHAISaLADwECqH5RWl0jsKaoRzSBOwEtqpfafJW1t5Zh_yoNrH8qty25t7b4LehM4CZyO4-j9M5X99QqcXmyBE-jXGIFTLE-58bHL9h2-uMrga97LJkPZWvWhyUtlH9auuuV-pJzTro04wfXmU_4ztv8D_AYAAP__EwRbkQ) against Carlson for moving to Twitter, claiming he's still under contract. Carlson said his Twitter speech was protected by the First Amendment. The Twitter show itself ([Watch Here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskT-PnDAQxT-N6VjZY8ZAQRHdHd2lipQSGXu86wSWlT17Vr59BNx1V_nPexq995vf79O7jUu8X3_alQYO22Qdxw-apKllV4OeoPJDIALSFQ3KdAZA911X3QbvrZUIhL3vGi2VA9ShDw61UXpGWcUBJGhpZKekVBovCg3OQZPVAXtolWgk-chbuvzZ4p1vFJZ_2weli9vWahluzI8s9A8Bo4CRS2Q-NQHjr6f7S-nFpiVvdwFjZsvPLGBUxhiQutG9aoxqoVG90GOiMOXkhH7lsp-A-MahCMD2hYuz6-P8KkRM60z-U2FK66F8N_a0XNNhsDbIznVIQZG3hqTVrWubXklrwGtjrcMZ8Wuw21MjvmU1CTB7vGdahH49OwPurXHvjTCWUi5uzncq-WyPMO6P48IHiNqdJOoQU-b6k1Wdb1s5XFUa_KPEZYnZtKKR19XG5cDM32_9fwAAAP__4vikjg)) lasted about 10 minutes, and Carlson focused primarily on issues he said the media were misleading Americans about, including the Ukraine war and UFOs.

It is oftentimes a thankless job - into the late hours of the night. Many of you have asked how you can thank them beyond just a note of encouragement. For you, we have set up a **[TIP JAR](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQxvGnwVus812MYWCoVHlL144ImyOmwiYCkipvX6Xq2P379JP-nxd7cTHF4_rhdjYtZOvWFh9sQZ5AnZAsdt4EZmTq2AxSSUTSSnWbWRZAlOQ8sArjosMk0ZN20-RBs5ZdNAhIIEENAAON_TDKcQnEjsKocRrEGdjHlkv_lePRNg7pmR9c-jXvXTJba7cq6E3gLHCuvN4L9-5gn9trIXBuG5_-PgJnnw_XWNB8b7ut-V5WFvT-8pGsdzE96y0fNZeuGH_7jinFKidxhuvuYvpF2_8NfgIAAP__oXJd4Q)** if you'd like to say thank you. We totally understand that there are many who can't afford to tip the crew - and The Flyover will always be free - but even a **[$5.00 tip to buy them a cup of coffee](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQxvGnwVus812MYWCoVHlL144ImyOmwiYCkipvX6Xq2P379JP-nxd7cTHF4_rhdjYtZOvWFh9sQZ5AnZAsdt4EZmTq2AxSSUTSSnWbWRZAlOQ8sArjosMk0ZN20-RBs5ZdNAhIIEENAAON_TDKcQnEjsKocRrEGdjHlkv_lePRNg7pmR9c-jXvXTJba7cq6E3gLHCuvN4L9-5gn9trIXBuG5_-PgJnnw_XWNB8b7ut-V5WFvT-8pGsdzE96y0fNZeuGH_7jinFKidxhuvuYvpF2_8NfgIAAP__oXJd4Q)** will go a long way. Special shout out to **Peter of NY** and **Joyce of NM** for their generous tips already. THANK YOU! ❤️ In addition, thank you to the hundreds who have written us encouraging notes. You're the reason we created the Flyover and what keeps us going!
➤ **CNN 's** CEO, Chris Licht, has been fired after a year of controversy on the job. clean_body: Donald Trump is officially the target of a criminal investigation. Special Counsel Jack Smith sent a letter to Trump’s lawyers, notifying them that the former President is at the center of a grand jury investigation over his handling of classified documents. Donald Trump is officially the target of a criminal investigation. Special Counsel Jack Smith sent a letter to Trump’s lawyers, notifying them that the former President is at the center of a grand jury investigation over his handling of classified documents. | | | | | | Thursday, June 8, 2023 ---|--- Good morning! On this date in 1949, George Orwell’s classic novel “1984” was published. Originally seen as dystopian science fiction, it’s now considered a basic primer for understanding how modern propaganda works. Today we’re talking about the criminal investigation into former President Trump’s handling of classified documents, CNN firing its CEO, and a live stream of an erupting volcano in Hawaii. Think we could improve something? mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover If this is your first time reading The Flyover , and make sure you catch every edition. Want to follow along on Facebook? . | Feds Target Trump in Criminal Investigation Donald Trump is officially the target of a . Special Counsel Jack Smith sent a letter to Trump's lawyers, notifying them that the former President is at the center of a grand jury investigation over his handling of classified documents. The "" is a routine part of federal investigations and does not necessarily mean that Trump will be indicted. It is, however, an indicator of the investigation's direction, and it increases the probability that Trump will be forced to defend himself against criminal charges in court. The investigation began in November 2022--several months after the FBI raid at Mar-a-Lago--and members of Trump's inner circle have already testified in front of the . Wildfires Spark Air Quality Warnings in 17 States Major air-quality alerts hit in 17 states as wildfires raged along the Canadian border. Airports in the New York area were temporarily closed from smoke and haze, outdoor baseball games were canceled, and residents in many cities were warned to stay indoors. run as far south as the Carolinas and include cities from Cincinnati to Syracuse. New York City was one of the worst affected, with air quality alerts set at the highest label of "hazardous." Photos from the city show it enveloped in a thick, orange haze. () Carlson Rockets Past 90 Million Views Tucker Carlson racked up an astonishing 90 million views -- and counting -- within 24 hours for Tuesday's debut edition of his new Twitter program. on Fox typically averaged around 3 million households. Fox News on Wednesday against Carlson for moving to Twitter, claiming he's still under contract. Carlson said his Twitter speech was protected by the First Amendment. The Twitter show itself () lasted about 10 minutes, and Carlson focused primarily on issues he said the media were misleading Americans about, including the Ukraine war and UFOs. Message from your captain ✈️ This is your captain speaking. Our crew of editors works extremely hard to deliver great, informative content to you daily. It is oftentimes a thankless job - into the late hours of the night. Many of you have asked how you can thank them beyond just a note of encouragement. For you, we have set up a if you'd like to say thank you. We totally understand that there are many who can't afford to tip the crew - and The Flyover will always be free - but even a will go a long way. Special shout out to Peter of NY and Joyce of NM for their generous tips already. THANK YOU! ❤️ In addition, thank you to the hundreds who have written us encouraging notes. You're the reason we created the Flyover and what keeps us going! ➤ CNN 's CEO, Chris Licht, has been fired after a year of controversy on the job. Low ratings, rebellious staffers, a controversial Trump Town Hall, and an unflattering profile in Atlantic Magazine sealed his fate. Licht will be replaced temporarily by a group of CNN executives during the search for a new chief. () ➤ A standoff continued Wednesday between Speaker Kevin McCarthy and GOP legislators angry about his debt compromise. The fight shuttered the House for a second day, with no votes being held. McCarthy's GOP opposition vowed to "hold the floor" as long as necessary. () ➤ Mike Pence invoked Ronald Reagan in his first campaign video ), launching his 2024 presidential campaign. In a live speech in Iowa, he lashed out directly at his former boss Donald Trump for "endangering my family and everyone at the Capitol" on Jan. 6, 2021. () ➤ New RNC rules requiring 40,000 individual donors for candidates to qualify for the presidential debates have forced long-shot candidates to scramble for small donations. At least one candidate is selling $1 T-shirts, and others are begging for small donations on Facebook. () ➤ The progressive Southern Poverty Law Group has listed some parents’ rights groups as “hate and anti-government” organizations similar to the Nazis and the KKK. The SPLC says parents organizing to protest public school policies should be considered “extremists.” () ➤ Lionel Messi stunned the soccer world by announcing his intentions to play for Major League Soccer club Inter Miami CF. The Argentine superstar is considered by many to be the greatest soccer player of all time, and few anticipated he would ever play in the U.S. His deal involves a cut of the MLS' streaming revenue, Adidas sales, and an option to purchase part of the franchise. () ➤ Nevada Gov. Joe Lombardo called a special legislative session to consider a $380 million funding bill for a new stadium in Las Vegas for the Oakland Athletics. The A's have announced plans to move to Vegas but are waiting to see where they will play. () ➤ Miami Marlins slugger Luis Arraez, with a current batting average of .402, is on pace to become the first batter to hit .400 since Ted Williams in 1941. He also could be the first hitter to win batting championships in the AL and NL in consecutive years since 1900. () ➤ In other stadium news , the NFL’s Jacksonville Jaguars unveiled stunning new design images for the “Stadium of the Future,” meant to transform downtown Jacksonville. Assoc. of Securities Dealers Automated Quotations | 13,104.89 | -1.29% ---|---|---|--- ▼ | SPX S&P; 500 | 4,267.52 | -0.38% ▲ | DJI Dow Jones Industrial Average | 33,666.04 | +0.28% ▲ | BTC Bitcoin | 26,448.0 | +0.31% ▲ | TSLA Tesla | $224.57 | +1.47% ➤ Big Stock Move : Tesla stock continued to surge for the 9th straight day, the company's longest winning streak in over two years. Fueling the growth was news that the Tesla Model 3 qualified for full federal EV tax credit, dropping the price by $7,500. () ➤ Two major San Francisco hotels are closing, with the owner citing safety concerns downtown. The real-estate trust that owns the Hilton San Francisco Union Square and the Parc 55 San Francisco says it will stop making loan payments on the two properties. () ➤ Used car prices reached their lowest level of the year in May, as sales continue to weaken in the face of inflation and higher interest rates. Cox Automotive, which tracks used car trades, says used car sales are down 11 percent year over year. () ➤ Delta Airlines is designing new airplane seats that fold up, allowing passengers in wheelchairs to stay in their own powered chairs for the flight. The innovative seats would be a first for air travel, eliminating the effort that chair-bound passengers must endure to board and deplane. () ➤ Apple will stop autocorrecting swear words, including the expletive often changed to "ducking," the company said. The autocorrect system will now "learn" what word users want and let them type it in without changing it, allowing frustrated typists to vent freely. () ➤ The first case of a crocodile who made herself pregnant has been documented at a zoo in Costa Rica. This kind of so-called “virgin birth” is known among some animal species but has never been seen before with crocodiles. () ➤ Hawaii 's Kilauea, one of the world's most active volcanoes, has begun erupting again after a three-month pause (). The U.S. Geological Survey has set up a YouTube live stream for those who want to keep track of the smoldering, slow-moving eruption. () ➤ A library book 96 years overdue has finally been returned to a local California library. The book, somewhat damaged, was turned in by a 75-year-old man who said his grandfather-in-law probably checked it out. If fines were applied (they weren't), the late fee would have been $1,700. () ➤ Batman** was victorious in a trademark battle against an Italian designer who sought to put the Batman symbol on clothing and carnival items. A European court ruled the Bat-Signal icon was distinctive enough that the Warner Bros. Discovery character deserved legal protection. name: Shift WA
subject: Did you miss this?
body:
Mainstream media outlets too often act as the communications arm of the Democrat Party. You cannot trust them to ask all candidates running for office about the issues you care most about That's why our work is so important. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61896355:slfsjfD1N:m:1:2610672541:1BC7429078E9176DE19448B2F06E1623:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends, We here at Shift WA want to express our deepest gratitude for your continued support. It tells us that our work holding mainstream media outlets and Democrats accountable to voters is important. And it's thanks to people like you that we can keep going. As part of our commitment to bringing you engaging content, we [recently interviewed independent journalist Brandi Kruse](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61896356:slfsjfD1N:m:1:2610672541:1BC7429078E9176DE19448B2F06E1623:r). In case you missed it, she shared valuable insights into launching her independent career and the inspiration behind her popular podcast, [un]Divided.
In her interview, Kruse highlighted the positive and negative aspects of independent outlets, emphasizing the need for consumers to discern quality and accountability. She criticized the mainstream media's silence when fellow independent journalist Jonathan Choe was denied access to King County Executive Dow Constantine's office, emphasizing the importance of upholding First Amendment rights. She also discussed the impact of one-party control on media coverage and the accountability of elected officials. With your support, we can continue to bring you thought-provoking interviews that shed light on critical issues impacting our state. [**However, we cannot do it without your help.**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61896357:slfsjfD1N:m:1:2610672541:1BC7429078E9176DE19448B2F06E1623:r) [**Would you consider contributing today? A donation of $100, $50, or even $15 can go a long way in helping expand our reach.**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61896357:slfsjfD1N:m:1:2610672541:1BC7429078E9176DE19448B2F06E1623:r) Thank you once again for being an essential part of our fight for accountability and transparency across our state. Thanks again, The Shift WA team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61896358:slfsjfD1N:m:1:2610672541:1BC7429078E9176DE19448B2F06E1623:r)
---

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). name: The Liberty Ledger
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger._c2M9MDA0NzJOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWdlb21ldHJ5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFFX0xMTzM5NzUxIn0/fcA2Oi0xNPx-50R_4vgs9g)
---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father's cabin, and did not return until he could "give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight."
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly-plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That's why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **"Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry." **
Through** "Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,"** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.**** ****You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding-not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://trk.libertyledger._c2M9MDA0NzJOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWdlb21ldHJ5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFFX0xMTzM5NzUxIn0/dhPm5cZv_3r-UUUzW9TCoA)
---
| | That's why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I've included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://trk.libertyledger._c2M9MDA0NzJOMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWdlb21ldHJ5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFFX0xMTzM5NzUxIn0/Ev6HeAxHih0GNht8JuzhzQ)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. ArnnPresident, Hillsdale CollegePursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

### Richmond Graduation Shooting Victim Fund

Graduate, Shawn Jackson, along with his father, Renzo Smith, were fatally shot after Huguenot High School's graduation. This GoFundMe will serve as assistance for the unexpected expenses, grief counseling, medical bills and financial assistance for the family through this tragic time.
All proceeds with be given to Tameeka Jackson-Smith, the mother and wife of the victims.
---
| |
### VIRGINIANS OPPOSE THE MVP

Virginians came together last week to protest the inclusion of the Mountain Valley Pipeline in the federal debt ceiling deal which will force the pipeline's approval by circumventing federal regulators and judicial review.
While the pipeline made it through debt ceiling negotiations, we must continue to fight the Mountain Valley Pipeline to protect our property, land, and water.

### [Victor McKenzie for HD-82 ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001N2of7EkoZ4Ca0perHBQ6K7ErIVKYUOJg6N4zO0JmbmxNBLCE9xe3rFPHjWUi9OMzL1EkdU8jR-2vwilxK-uPSCJ4sCpWIBNr2Nr40bSYonSHkaasZJLzEqBy_KyZlJ_d3dw-tglUKuxHubKgUvJjEdA7WRVofdE_&c=kzK8o8yvIWh9RkItQQC24ZICzERG-laK-lRZ7u-PDDGmZeuBn-W7Aw==&ch=1G-VjPg9o2xABbekHSlmIDSPEDokhlbQr0U9RMNzYJAu-IH6bnlhWA==)

Victor "Vic" McKenzie, Jr. is a nonprofit executive and community leader. He serves as Executive Director of a statewide organization, leading advocacy and education for individuals and families affected by substance use disorder. He also serves as Chairman of the Board of a community action organization that serves Petersburg, Prince George County, Dinwiddie County, Hopewell and Richmond.
With an extensive record of advocacy and nonprofit leadership, Victor maintains considerable business connections across the district. A consensus builder, Victor has worked with policymakers on both sides of the aisle to build successful coalitions. His experience will help serve the families of the 82nd District.

---

Narrated by Kate Winslet, this film explores many of the problems associated with the modern food industry as well as ways each of us can make a beneficial difference by making more sustainable every day choices. The modern food industry is one of the largest contributors to water pollution, human illness, biodiversity loss, and climate change.

The goal of RYD is to help improve our community and to promote the names of Democratic candidates and policies. name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25975%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8ok%2fjOS%2fNmOPnZHpQRxw2Q&sysid=1)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25975%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8ok%2fjOS%2fNmOPnZHpQRxw2Q&sysid=1)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25976%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3RiEaxLEW%2bHhwMtdTA006A&sysid=1)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[**_Donate Now >>_**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25977%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z%2bMoZ5sLp3OYEbgiR9n3Xg&sysid=1)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25978%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bE8wm%2fUe7wPH6c%2fg%2fSJlEA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25979%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fhB5GO5Rr2OQNJqthxPd0Q&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25970%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o07BVjK8Ai3vGa958dL9eA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25971%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JmN0chiO4%2fGrqnoqBeKvMA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25972%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A5WoFN0vA%2f%2bImpqbXWdYQg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25973%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V55WPO%2fHvMHnKsMbuFHFGQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25974%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ozZiMOORyKvNnb2zlivE2g&sysid=1)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25985%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CQXeqmII00ggtnW8V6w4SA&sysid=1)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25986%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=U0TlSVEKE8E%2bOKFHwUk%2fcQ&sysid=1)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25987%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ve4oBiY0e5Wv6vGs1au52Q&sysid=1)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25988%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=q3CdLWFXqfH9Hd%2fR%2f96biw&sysid=1)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zagu9h6e1s7jhk9c2vkr2rdronhet8n8qjtcooh0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9gm8o71chh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdbu34eb20aqobt5tgcb1dqtfrbr7i4i372oo21o_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9gm8o71chh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zls3fgunmtg5mshac2rcj3i0tbvhko5ottp2icm0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9gm8o71chh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

name: Gloucester County GOP
subject: Join us for our 2nd Annual Baskets & Bullets - Sporting Clay Tournament!
body:
Buy your Ticket & Clean your Shotguns! Time for a Sporting Clay Tournament! June 17th, 2023 - Starting at 8:30AM
| | | | JOIN US FOR OUR 2ND ANNUAL BASKETS & BULLETS SPORTING CLAY TOURNAMENT
---
All participants will be required to complete a Release of Liability & Assumption of Risk Form as well as an Emergency Contact Form. To make the check-in process as smooth as possible, you will get an email from the GCGOP Secretary, Samantha Sammons, with both forms that you can print, complete, and brought with you to the event.

Any participants sending payment in the form of a check must also send the Donation Form below.

If you already have a group of 4 or 5 in mind, please send an email with the names of those who will be in your group.

*** All participants are encouraged to bring their own shotgun(s) and ammo.***

If you would like to donate a basket, please let us know.

If you have any questions, please contact [GCGOPSecretary@gmail.com](mailto:gcgopsecretary@gmail.com) or Call Samantha at [856-535-7113](tel:856-535-7113).

name: Amanda K. Edwards
subject: The FY24 Budget is Approved
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Amanda Edwards Campaign, Melanie Gray, Treasurer
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ae-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ae-email]
Special Announcement
Fiscal Year 2024 Budget Approved!
On June 7, 2023, City Council approved the City of Houston's budget for Fiscal Year 2024 (FY2024), by a vote of 15-2. The City's fiscal year begins on July 1, 2023 and ends June 30, 2024. The total approved budget amounts to approximately $6.2 billion, of which, approximately $2.9 billion in expenditures are allocated to the tax-supported General Fund. The FY2024 Budget also includes funding for Houston's Enterprise Fund operations, such as: Aviation, Convention and Entertainment Facilities, and the Combined Utility System. Unlike the General Fund, Enterprise Funds are not funded by property or sales taxes; rather, these funds are covered entirely by user fees or other dedicated revenue sources.
We wanted to share some of the toplines from the budget:
Investing in Public Safety:
The FY24 budget accounts for pay increases for municipal employees (3%), police (3%), and firefighters (6%). This budget also will be the 3rd consecutive 6% pay increase for firefighters representing a total 3 year commitment to a 18% raise. Public safety expenditures are approximately 68% of general fund expenditures.
Tax Implications
Property Tax
The FY24 budget projects $1.37 billion of revenue representing an increase of 7.7% when compared to the FY2023 estimate of $1.27 billion.
Sales Tax
The FY24 budget projects $866 million of revenue from Sales Tax, a 3% decrease compared to the FY2023 Estimate of $892 million.
ARPA Funding
The FY24 Proposed Budget utilizes $160 million in ARPA funds, which are temporary federal funds initially distributed to cities during the pandemic.
Amendments from Council
Although many budget amendments were presented at yesterday’s meeting, the following items below were passed:
Council approved an amendment that allocates $600,000 additional dollars from the general fund for animal welfare . Another amendment was passed to merge Houston Public Library and Harris County Public Library Digital Collections to form a more efficient and complete library collection.
The City Council passed an amendment that allocates $20 million of additional dollars to local drainage projects and add on to the already $80 million allocated to the Storm Water Action Team (SWAT) and will be distributed all over the City of Houston to fix open ditches.
Finally, the Council approved an amendment to allocate $600,000 additional dollars to the Houston Science Forensic Center (HFSC) for DNA testing. The HFSC has experienced a large backlog of DNA analysis associated with sexual assault kits, and this additional funding will assist in stabilizing that discrepancy.
Final Notes:
While this budget does increase key budgetary expenses around public safety, future budgets will experience significant declines in necessary revenue as ARPA funding comes to an end. The next Mayor of Houston must prioritize addressing this material gap.
Thank you,
Amanda K. Edwards

President Biden, on the other hand, has championed our freedoms and is leading America toward progress, despite facing relentless attacks from MAGA extremists like DeSantis. We must show that Democrats everywhere stand with President Biden and against Ron DeSantis’ radical agenda. But right now we’re 12 responses short in your area! Please, Peter. And admit it, watching Christie take Trump out will be something we all will enjoy!

Listen, this is up to me and you; either we get Christie on that debate stage, or Trump will win the nomination again. And make no mistake, Biden beat Trump once, and he’ll beat him—again.

We can’t afford that to happen—Biden has left our country more divided than ever. Americans are less prosperous and feel less safe, four more years of Joe Biden is not an option we should be rooting for.

name: Diana
subject: I don't see your response
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi there, it’s Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC.

I'm reaching out because President Biden is _officially_ running for re-election and polls show him statistically tied with Donald Trump -- but we’re _still_ missing your response to our presidential approval poll!

The president’s standing among voters like you is a key driver of voter turnout patterns, so it’s _**critical**_ that we have accurate data to help us make necessary strategic decisions.

Unfortunately, we’re still 155 answers short in Pennsylvania, and without your response, we will NOT be able to reach statistical significance for our poll to take on the GOP!

**Our Live Poll is closing at 11:59 P.M.,_so please answer immediately:_**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/13653?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230608-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230608-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRF-Pros-sl1&akid=10936%2E9716520%2EGBmuiS)
**Do you approve of President Biden?**
| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/13653?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230608-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230608-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRF-Pros-sl1&akid=10936%2E9716520%2EGBmuiS)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/13653?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230608-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230608-Diana-DianaBidenApprovalPostAnnouncementRF-Pros-sl1&akid=10936%2E9716520%2EGBmuiS)
---

Thank you for your input,

Diana
Research Director, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
| |
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2023-q2?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=10936_9716520_GBmuiS&akid=10936%2E9716520%2EGBmuiS)**.

**[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=10936%2E9716520%2EGBmuiS)** to receive fewer emails. **[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=10936%2E9716520%2EGBmuiS)** to unsubscribe.

Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Republicans will export this 60% referendum threshold to other states if it works in Ohio.
body:
Conservative power grab in Ohio
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T579c2543-b148-4db1-8be9-18d6fed9e776/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**We Must Stop Them From Endangering Millions Of Women.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tddc6afcb-c8a3-4434-a4b0-99f661066327/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _The "them," is Ohio Republicans, who can't accept that a ballot measure in November on abortion rights will pass as they have in deep red states like Kentucky & Kansas. So they've trying to cheat, because these extremists are in the minority on every issue. It is the only way can win, and they know it._ **So GOP state legislators passed legislation creating a special August election--wasting millions in taxpayer dollars--try to fix the vote by changing necessary support for an amendment in Ohio from 50% to 60%**_._ **_We must get the word out to Ohioans now to turn out in August to vote against this ridiculous power grab that seeks to force the religious zealotry of a small minority of fanatics on all of us._** _Ohioans for Reproductive Choice is educating voters about the GOP's treachery. Per their recent email:_ ...Together we will defeat this extreme measure on August 8, then secure abortion rights on the November ballot. The next several months are make-or-break for the future of our great state. [**_So will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Ohioans for Reproductive Justice, to stop right-wing extremists from benefiting from their cheating to ban abortion rights in Ohio?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcdfba696-5493-4e12-8089-44f0992e89f6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting for decency and humanity wherever it's needed._ Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---

---
|

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/ohioansforreproductivefreedom2-june8-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1421f57b-a677-4ff3-a381-0a6fc55d1180/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=e5ebe1a1-598c-4249-9f3b-6a8b8ab8200c&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=e5ebe1a1-598c-4249-9f3b-6a8b8ab8200c&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Larry Elder
subject: I’m Your Man
body:
It’s time for new GOP leadership.
| | | **Show Your Support**
---
| [CHIP IN TODAY](http://mail.elderforpresident.com/rd/9z4znp70ahu6s9un975hlumcmgj6m3criust55dbgf8_rp22sh2s8i61o35chj66pr24no)
---
| | [](http://mail.elderforpresident.com/rd/9z4z0p6h9c70blu18llimt8hb0vdmop712fb7shen70_rp22sh2s8i61o35chj66pr24no)
---
| |
# **Larry Elder on NewsNation: Let’s Nominate Someone Who Can Win**
---
Friend, On Tuesday, I appeared on NewsNation to discuss my candidacy for the GOP nomination for president. [**Click here to watch the interview.**](http://mail.elderforpresident.com/rd/9z4zbm40drqba954bcienei0i5knp1jbnuqcj2bfdn0_rp22sh2s8i61o35chj66pr24no) I’ll be honest: if I thought former President Donald Trump could win both the nomination and the general election in 2024, I wouldn’t be running for president. After all, we have the same goals, like growing our economy, strengthening our security, and restoring sanity to Washington.But the simple truth is that a Trump nomination would sink the GOP’s hopes for reclaiming the White House next year, and frankly, the stakes are just too high to chance it. That’s why I’m running for president. I know that with the right leader embracing America First principles, we can make a compelling case to the American people, including swing voters we’ve lost in recent elections, and start winning again. The future of our nation depends upon it.**If you believe it’s time for new GOP leadership committed to igniting a new Golden Age for America, I’m your man.** But I can’t do it alone. Your donation of any amount takes us one step closer to the debate stage, where I can share our vision for a brighter future with the entire country.
---
[DONATE NOW](http://mail.elderforpresident.com/rd/9z4zesfk4ct8vvvkcp0dsp6dod2q5bvgpir2lkcsvn0_rp22sh2s8i61o35chj66pr24no)
---
Thank you for your support,Larry ElderGOP Candidate for President
---
[**P.S. We know that once they hear our message, voters will choose the America First candidate who can win in 2024. But first, we need to earn a spot in the debates. Can I count on you to get us there?**](http://mail.elderforpresident.com/rd/9z4zhs8hg3p2k8agfrha48481971lc5k0lih7h56rq0_rp22sh2s8i61o35chj66pr24no)
---
| | |
---
# Meet Larry:
---
| | Larry Elder—the Sage from South Central—is a _New York Times_ best-selling author, award-winning documentary filmmaker, and one of the best-known media figures in America today. His flagship daily radio program, “The Larry Elder Show,” was heard every weekday in all 50 states and on more than 300 stations. Larry’s unique style, personal background, and professional experience combine to inspire, inform, and persuade his listeners, readers, and viewers to embrace the timeless American principles of personal responsibility and public accountability. In his words: _“The question is not which party has my back, but which party can get government off our backs—so that we might all realize our God-given capabilities.”_ Larry was born and raised in South Central Los Angeles, and his family’s story represents every bit of the American Dream. His father was born in Athens, Georgia, served in the U.S. Marine Corps during World War II, and moved to California to open his own restaurant—Elder’s Snack Bar. Larry’s mother, originally from Huntsville, Alabama, was a clerical worker for the U.S. Department of War (now the U.S. Department of Defense) and raised three boys as a stay-at-home mom. After running for Governor of California in 2021 and securing millions of votes, Larry is now ready for the next step in his journey: Winning the Republican nomination for President of the United States in 2024.

Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor.

clean_body: Peter, I’m about to ask you to become an official 2023 Democratic Member with $15 before midnight. | | | = = Extreme MAGA Republicans are out of control. They’ve raked in millions to unseat us for exposing their plans to impose a nationwide abortion ban and cut funding to Social Security and Medicare. They’ve peddled dangerous conspiracy theories. They’ve coddled serial fraudsters like Rudy Giuliani and George Santos. And they’ve handed over sensitive security footage from the Jan. 6th insurrection to Tucker Carlson, an avowed conspiracy theorist. Enough is enough. = = = = = I’m so proud of our incredibly strong track record. House Democrats are: – Bringing manufacturing jobs back home – Investing in our communities and keeping Americans safe – Protecting Social Security and Medicare benefits for our seniors We will continue to build upon the work that has been done to move America forward – not from the top down, but from the middle out and the bottom up. And that’s what we as House Democrats intend to do For The People – but we need you by our side. That’s why I’m counting on seeing your name on our list of 2023 Democratic Members. | = = | = = | = = Keep the faith, Hakeem Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor. Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. Is there any way you could chip in to help? = We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. body:
When Ruben calls to ask people for larger checks, a lot of them say they are waiting to see what national Democrats do before giving.
#

Peter -
Here is the difficult truth about our fundraising:
When Ruben calls to ask people for larger checks, a lot of them say they are waiting to see what national Democrats do before giving.
It's just the truth. It is what it is.
And there is NOTHING more important we can do to convince national Democrats to support Ruben than file a massive FEC fundraising report with lots and lots of donors.
So the donation we're asking you to make today not only helps us raise what we need to WIN, but it will unlock national endorsements, which will unlock even more future fundraising for our campaign.
And if we can get this rolling, we'll be unstoppable. But it starts with you. Right here. Right now. Please. We need your help to catch up on our critical goals.

clean_body: Friend: Don't miss Thursday morning's top conservative news! | | | | | | | | | Your input is critical to us and to the future of conservatism in America. We refuse to be silenced, and we hope you do too. and never miss a story. To ensure our email makes it to your inbox daily and not spam, please add our email address to your email contact list. | ## ## ## | ## ## ## ## | | | ## ## You Might Like | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- ## ##

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
Something strange is happening in our financial system.

| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy’s are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> "We’re going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..."
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she’s found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrjpmb05ar5ag9rm1nmedhsla8ha9i9pk9328nko_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9gm2p75cdh2bs) Dr. Prins says:
> ** "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we’re about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result." **
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. [Click here now to see her full (and free) presentation.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zegcn3vpljiliikp9al7b65ghm08ukt3nhii7gg0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9gm2p75cdh2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. clean_body: Something strange is happening in our financial system. | Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy’s are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning: "We’re going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..." What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she’s found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - Dr. Prins says: "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we’re about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result." According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. Regards, Maria Bonaventura Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics P.S. The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. Trump Train News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Giffords.org
subject: Will you wish Gabby Giffords a happy birthday?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Gabby’s birthday wish is to keep up our momentum in the fight to make our communities safer from gun violence
#

Friends -
Today is Gabby’s birthday. It’s a special day of importance for Gabby, her friends and family, all of us here at GIFFORDS, and supporters like you.
As another year goes by, we’re reminded of just how lucky we are that Gabby devotes herself each and every day to the lifesaving work of ending gun violence in our nation. Gabby has never given up in her own recovery or in the fight to change our nation’s gun laws. Her hope and perseverance serves as an inspiration to us all.
Because of Gabby and the work we’ve done together, there are people alive today celebrating their own birthdays. That is something special.
Now, we must keep moving forward together, because the fight to end gun violence in our nation isn’t over yet.
[**So friends, will you make a $3 donation to GIFFORDS PAC today in honor of Gabby’s birthday? We know that her birthday wish is to keep up our momentum in the fight to make our communities safer from gun violence, and our ability to do this work depends on supporters like you.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jun23.dfqeaL&refcode=em230608-1-subs&t=1&akid=5928%2E3935704%2ElXnpVz)
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jun23.dfqeaL&refcode=em230608-1-subs&t=2&akid=5928%2E3935704%2ElXnpVz)
Thank you for your support of Gabby year after year. We are so grateful for you.
\- The GIFFORDS team
**[DONATE TO GIFFORDS](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jun23.dfqeaL&refcode=em230608-1-subs&t=3&akid=5928%2E3935704%2ElXnpVz)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=5928%2E3935704%2ElXnpVz) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

But I’ve also read LEAKED REPORTS that the Biden-appointed special counsel is asking a Washington, D.C. grand jury to indict me... “The Department of Justice is preparing to ask a Washington, DC grand jury to indict former president Donald Trump...as he campaigns for his party’s nomination in next year’s presidential election...” The same people who SPIED on my campaign and tried to FRAME me as a Russian asset are now trying to pursue FEDERAL CHARGES against me in the “Documents Hoax.” As we possibly await another dark moment in our country’s history, I ask that you keep me, my family, and our country in your prayers. I’m not afraid in the slightest, because I know that millions of Americans like YOU have my back. YOU are the source of my courage, my resolve, and my hope for America. | - | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. subject: Trump and the Usual Suspects in Georgia This Weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgia Blue PAC Georgia House Democratic Caucus
body:
Peter,

Former MAGA President Trump is coming to speak at the Georgia state GOP Convention this weekend. Also showing up is a gallery of failed candidates and extremists such as Kari Lake, Kelly Loeffler, and Marjorie Taylor Green.

Georgia stood up to the former MAGA President and radical Republican extremism in 2020, and we’ll do it again. With some notable Republican figures, like extreme Governor Brian Kemp, skipping the Convention, the GOP is putting their infighting on display for our whole state to see.

DONATE BEFORE SUNDAY! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=060823-TrumpInGA-bttn1]

Can you contribute to help us recruit strong Democrats to run for the House while the GOP is in disarray?

$20, $50 or $100 will go far to get the word out. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=060823-TrumpInGA-link1]

And you can do it before Trump leaves town on Sunday, just to show the GOP how weak they really are.

Despite the fact that they’ve decimated women’s and LGBTQ+ rights, championed irresponsible gun ownership laws, supported election conspiracies, and continued to practice voter suppression, the GOP keeps trying to pretend that they don’t love Donald Trump and his parade of MAGA extremists.

Let’s show them we won’t stand for their radical agenda. Donate before Sunday to give Trump a resounding Democratic send-off and help us deliver a blue Georgia in 2024.

DONATE BEFORE SUNDAY! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gahouse-grassroots2?refcode=060823-TrumpInGA-bttn2]

Onwards,
Georgia House Democrats

The Georgia House Democratic Caucus is Georgia’s most diverse group of leaders working on the ground in Georgia every day to flip the State House and secure a blue Georgia. To create the change we need, we’ll need all the help we can get. Will you join the movement for a blue Georgia by donating today?

name: Senator John N. Kennedy
subject: Can you handle the truth? I think you can.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This might be a tough pill to swallow, but I’d rather drink weed killer than sugarcoat the truth.

| |

---
| | | Today, I want to talk to you about the truth.

The unadorned, unvarnished truth.

The truth is important.

_Without the truth, we cannot order society.
Without the truth, we cannot survive as human beings.
Without the truth, we cannot thrive as human beings. _

_**[Can you handle the truth? I think you can.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25910%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UgDwwQjivS%2fLX8jQhCGF7g&sysid=1 "Can you handle the truth?
I think you can.")**_

The truth is, I think it’s important to speak your mind. So I do. Now, that makes some people mad, but I try not to worry too much about what anyone thinks of me.

This might be a tough pill to swallow, but I’d rather drink weed killer than sugarcoat the truth.

**So here’s the truth:** The Democrats are doing EVERYTHING in their power to destroy our country. Whether it’s leaving our borders wide open for terrorists and illicit drugs to flow through, attacking parental rights, or outrageous government spending, they will do whatever it takes to undermine the foundations of America. It all goes back to the SPECTACULARLY awful job Joe Biden has done with America.

**Here’s the solution:** We must DEFEAT the Democrats at _**every level**_ of government. This will be the only way we can stop the Democrats’ woke agenda and put America back on the path to prosperity.

**Here’s how we’ll WIN:** This all starts with YOU, Friend. I am working alongside Majority Leader Scalise to personally ask you to put your money where your mouth is and help House Republicans beat the Democrats. They were outraised last quarter by $12M, so we cannot afford for a single patriot to sideline themselves.

_**[Can I personally ask you to make a secure online contribution to this fight for the truth? I am only asking for $12 right here, right now.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25911%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AzgMC%2fMDfDeqPuidl%2bIvoA&sysid=1 "Can I personally ask you
to make a secure online contribution to this fight for the truth? I am only asking
for $12 right here, right now.")**_
---
| | | [INVEST IN HOUSE REPUBLICANS: CHIP IN $12 >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25912%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=i7%2fVtMwJEto%2f67%2b%2bYtCd6g&sysid=1 "INVEST IN HOUSE REPUBLICANS: CHIP IN $12 >>")
---
Thanks for listening to me, I hope you take what I said to heart and take action right away.

**The future of our country is counting on you. **

Thanks,
John Kennedy
(R-Louisiana)

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25913%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rpGB0P6rXpaMA1lfG%2bKAWg&sysid=1 "John Kennedy")

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Common Sense

body:

Fellow American,

**The Senate should require a common sense test for every United States Senator.**

Most Senate Democrats would fail because you can't have common sense and allow issues like these to continue.

**_Common sense_** wouldn't allow a wide-open border and a surge of illegal immigrants to flood in.

**_Common sense_** wouldn't spend your tax dollars like there's no tomorrow while the national debt hits $31.46 trillion.

**_Common sense_** wouldn't ignore China while they flex their muscles in the South China Sea.
