name: Greta Kemp Martin
subject: Introducing myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greta Martin for AG
body:
Peter,

My name is Greta Kemp Martin. I’m a nonprofit lawyer advocating for disability rights, a lifelong Mississippian, and I’m running to be Mississippi’s next Attorney General.

I was born and raised in Belmont, Mississippi, the daughter of a nurse and a police officer. My parents demonstrated the value of always giving back, and I knew before I even finished high school that I wanted to be there for those who needed a helping hand.

That’s why I pursued a career in law, and why I continue to choose to represent everyday people, not the corporations and special interests who have excelled off the backs of my neighbors. Now, I serve on the Mississippi Access to Justice Commission – a task force focused on bringing legal services to underserved communities in Mississippi.

I’ve dedicated my life and career to fighting for equity and growth for all Mississippians. And as Attorney General, I will champion progress and move Mississippi forward. Right now, the problems of everyday Mississippians are left to the wayside because our current Attorney General is out of touch with the lives we lead, and the solutions we desperately need. I’m running so that Mississippians have someone on their side in the Attorney General’s office.

I believe in Mississippi, and I will keep fighting for a better home for all Mississippians – but I can’t get to the Attorney General’s office to take on this work without your help. Will you join our team today?

CONTRIBUTE: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gkm-fr?refcode=EM_FR_230608FranzOnboard_GKM_8_PT

Thanks so much for your support,

Greta

--

Greta Kemp Martin was born, raised, and educated in Mississippi. She is an active member of the Mississippi Bar, and currently works as the Litigation Director for Disability Rights Mississippi, the protection and advocacy agency for the state. As Attorney General, Greta will fight for the rights of everyday Mississippians, and stand up for the working people of this state.

DONATE TODAY: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gkm-fr?refcode=EM_FR_230608FranzOnboard_GKM_8_PTbiobox&amount=25

Paid for by Greta Martin for AG
Greta Kemp Martin for Attorney General
PO BOX 16402
Jackson, MS 39236
United States

The MAGA GOP knows that DC Statehood would almost certainly mean TWO more Democratic Senators, so they’re doing everything in their power to KILL the bill!

If we’re going to have any chance of fighting back, we need to demonstrate MASSIVE grassroots support for DC Statehood! **Please, respond now:**

Kentucky Governor Andy Beshear here.
It's official – the general election has begun! I'm up against Mitch McConnell's protege and outside money is already flooding our state, just as it did last time around, to try and undo all of the progress we've made. I need your support to win this tough race and continue moving Kentucky forward.
I ran for office in 2019 on the promise to do right by Kentuckians in every corner of the Commonwealth. Since being elected, my team and I have helped produce the highest revenue surplus in the state’s history, created more and better-paying jobs for Kentuckians, funded our schools, and expanded health care for folks.
Now I'm running for re-election to protect this progress and continue delivering results for Kentuckians, but I have a tough fight ahead of me. **As the only Democratic incumbent governor up for re-election this year, we know that this race will be the most competitive in the whole country.**
**[Please, if you can, split a contribution between my campaign and Wes Moore to help me win this governor's race and protect Kentucky's progress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64516661/410332689/-1530900639?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230608besheartandem_wm_180da_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2M3ZmYyNi0wNjA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EKcVWXNBNkjxZPmbIPhRlai4Ykm4UlTRxxvgojI39Us=)**

subject: i wish i didn't have to
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Orden for Congress
body:
I hope you are doing well.

| |
---
| | | Hi Patriot, I hope you are doing well.

Things have been busy in Washington, as I'm sure you've heard. I've been caught up in my work, but my campaign staff has been asking me to reach out to you.

Listen, I can't put this off any longer. **I have to do something I hate.** But before I tell you what that is, I have one request; _please read this email all the way through._

Here it is: **[I've got to ask you for a small contribution. If you're in a tough spot financially, I'll understand if you can't spare the money.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62795018:6jzgeyIN7:m:1:3299561967:043BE7FACAD24948224DDA3C92BCFA7D:r "I've got to ask
you for a small donation. If you're in a tough spot financially, I'll understand if you can't spare the money.")**

I'm one of Democrats' **TOP** targets in 2024. They hate that I flipped a seat they'd held for _over two decades_ , and even more than that, **they _HATE_ that I'm a true and honest conservative.**

I hate asking folks like you for money like this, I'm sure you think there are better things you could spend it on. That money could get you some coffee or pizza or maybe enough gas in the tank to give you some peace of mind on your ride home.

**These are things I want too, but today, I 'm asking you to help me and my Republican colleagues hold the line in the House.**
---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE TO DEFEND DERRICK](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62795018:6jzgeyIN7:m:1:3299561967:043BE7FACAD24948224DDA3C92BCFA7D:r "CONTRIBUTE TO DEFEND DERRICK")
---
Thanks for reading this message. Even if you decide not to chip in, I really appreciate you giving me the time today.

-DVO
---

* * *
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62795019:6jzgeyIN7:m:1:3299561967:043BE7FACAD24948224DDA3C92BCFA7D:r)
---

My story is simple. I was raised in rural poverty by a single mother on food stamps. At 18, I joined the Navy. After 26 years of service and 5 combat tours, I retired as a Navy SEAL Senior Chief. Now, I'm serving as a first-term Congressman for Wisconsin's 3rd District.

I'm not a swamp-dwelling politician - I don't have support from mega-donors or Super PACs. I'm just like you - **a concerned American who loves this nation and will always do the right thing.**

**[The Democrats are going at me with everything they've got, and I'll need all the help I can get to protect this seat. If you have anything to spare so I can stay on pace with the Democrats, I'd be so appreciative of whatever you can chip in:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62795019:6jzgeyIN7:m:1:3299561967:043BE7FACAD24948224DDA3C92BCFA7D:r "The Democrats
are going at me with everything they’ve got, and I’ll need all the help I can get to protect this seat. If you have anything to spare so I
can stay on pace with the Dems, I’d be so appreciative of whatever you can chip in:")**
| [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62795019:6jzgeyIN7:m:1:3299561967:043BE7FACAD24948224DDA3C92BCFA7D:r "DONATE NOW")
---

Thank you and God Bless,

Derrick Van Orden

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjcmjpsius3aul44i54kicikqsttrt2g1kabcgdo_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9gm1p34c9h2bs)
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc1skspopn6j53gd10e3l8115amm7snemb0o6p9g_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9gm1p34c9h2bs)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You've seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I'm unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan's quote on leadership: "Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**."

I've been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That's why I'm writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8rditj7rc4otvlboi511odauhv2k3vnr6tna5ug_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9gm1p34c9h2bs)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zufrhstcl0j4gaej2ml7pclnnalks6q8ooonm6j0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9gm1p34c9h2bs)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn't my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren't cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That's where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztbuobctd8ovpqbfj84gmfvc741450pk8rl2eob0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9gm1p34c9h2bs)?**

When you do, I'll be following up as the case progresses but I'll also keep you informed of the great work I'm doing at OMG . . . and it's exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I'll admit is thrilling. And I'm starting armed with all of the lessons I've learned to avoid the pitfalls I've experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we're more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

**[I'm asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4c039vislm7g96f9dc4c0en88ab2uubkbd4doi8_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9gm1p34c9h2bs)**. And I'll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zme5n3e1qo3nh18qmfbg8ae51os4ts7g382h6jm8_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9gm1p34c9h2bs)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O'Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhpsq3ba1ar35lnj9554lvmb7cidldtsjso56u6o_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9gm1p34c9h2bs)**.

---

Trump Train News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zghq6da9ql4i816godhc2qml3bpjdu06obv3k5q0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8p34c3im8pj246h22sh2s8i66o73c9gm1p34c9h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv8h5pif1c5maiqqffg433jvfqq5mahr4almob5o_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9gm1p34c9h2bs)_

name: Full Mag News

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Never More Important….
body:
The Left is trying to advance laws and programs that create discrimination in America

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Our members’ support of Judicial Watch’s work has never been more important for America...
...**because** **right now we are****carrying the largest and most important caseload in our 29-year history ...****and making a major impact for the rule of law****!**
**But the _challenges_ facing us right now are critical...and [that’s why I am asking you to make an additional contribution to Judicial Watch today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63689&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63689&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

Here’s why we so urgently need your financial support now.

We are fighting to keep our elections honest**...**

In just the past 6 months, we have settled our clean voter roll lawsuits against **Colorado** and **Pennsylvania** , after they began cleaning their voter rolls and agreed to provide us with voter roll data for the next six years (**Colorado**) and annual reports on their voter roll cleaning efforts for the next five years (**Pennsylvania**)!

We are also challenging a state law in **Illinois** that permits mail-in ballots to be counted up to two weeks after Election Day...which opens wide the door to voter fraud.

The challenges to honest elections are enormous... _and ongoing,_ [which is why your decision to give us your support today is so critically important!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63689&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63689&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

**_We are investigating and prosecuting serious allegations and evidence of
_ _Biden family corruption_.**

In light of stunning bank records recently released by the U.S. House of Representatives Government Oversight and Accountability Committee, we have sued the National Archives for **_thousands of documents_** that could shed further light on massive Biden family corruption, _including criminal connections with businesses controlled by the Chinese Communist Party_. The Dominant Media tries to bury this story... _but Judicial Watch is using the legal system and the courts to make sure they don 't succeed_!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63689&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

**_We continue to file lawsuits exposing Marxist "Critical Race Theory" in public schools and our military._**

Our lawsuits forced the release of documents proving that the Biden team is infiltrating the curricula of the **U.S. Military Academy** , the **U.S Naval Academy** and the **U.S.****Air Force Academy** with Critical Race Theory (CRT) and other racist propaganda!

Judicial Watch broke open the scandal of public funds being used to spread CRT poison in our schools and _we won 't stop until all the ugly facts about this Marxist indoctrination are exposed_!

**_We keep fighting to expose the Fauci Covid scandal_**.

We filed multiple lawsuits against federal agencies for public records to shed light on the China origins of the pandemic, and on U.S. Government funding (by Fauci's agency) of "gain of function" research at China's controversial Wuhan Institute of Virology, which may have led directly to the spread of Covid.

The American people deserve to know the facts about how and where the Covid-19 pandemic arose, and how much U.S. funding went to the pandemic's source!

[**Your contribution today will help us keep fighting for our "right to know" on all these critically important fronts.**](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63689&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63689&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

_Thanks to our members’ generous support_ , Judicial Watch is doing the work that the Dominant Media and the Department of Justice should be doing... _but won 't_!

**And as I said before, we are carrying** the largest and most important caseload in our history... _and additional support from patriotic Americans like you is vital to our success_.

I hope I can count on to join the Judicial Watch team today!

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=63689&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=a27e3dffa06e173a0004e320eb691911825abcdbc43a80e551b7336d53a8f580)
---

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The truth about America’s Christian heritage
body:
Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpo8a8okt4vn6j3jv8jk0e2qdh1odc3un76r7t38_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9gm9o36cjh2bs)
---
Hello, Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different. Our nation was founded on Christian principles, and the founders wanted our government to uphold those principles.

I've written a book whose title boldly declares what I know to be true: _America Is a Christian Nation_. Many would dispute that claim, but my book provides evidence for this truth using the very words and actions of the founders themselves. The book is a short read, accompanied by beautiful patriotic photos that I think you'll appreciate.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5tj2gdmpiojmpauioaa1f0c89inobou806bo198_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9gm9o36cjh2bs)
---
| | I would love for you to read this book and discover the truth about our nation's Christian heritage. As a token of appreciation for any gift you can make to Pathway to Victory today, we'll send you a copy of the book. You can secure your copy by donating here: [https://ptv.org/donate/america-is-a-christian-nation-by-dr-robert-jeffress/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z202rr5ssi5oc8npirorthdt8morcatp68b6l5k0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9gm9o36cjh2bs)

Your donation will be matched dollar-for-dollar thanks to a $500,000 matching challenge that ends on July 4th.

As believers, we must preserve America's unique heritage and fight for our religious freedoms. By understanding our nation's Christian roots, we can work to bring our country back to its founding principles. At the end of my book, I provide suggestions for how to do just that.

I hope you'll consider donating to _Pathway to Victory_ and receiving your copy of _America Is a Christian Nation_ so you can know without a doubt that the foundation of our country was solidly established in the principles of the Bible.

Gratefully,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjifq40pq20p9c8gpr43um9hi5pvm9p4g00nfb5o_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9gm9p72chh2bs)
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zohf9rbup1v1vo15go5fo0fb9686dm47irlbvq40_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9gm9p72chh2bs)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You've seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I'm unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan's quote on leadership: "Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**."

I've been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That's why I'm writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl2h0j6u1hrq455mr44ecp8l7t028uhs9lov2t30_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9gm9p72chh2bs)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcr1fviu1it8tubdhioookp9h8jmd2bs0d7vjo70_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9gm9p72chh2bs)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn't my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren't cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That's where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr0apufshhu1ob46dfvr41rhmep9kuaqusqeieto_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9gm9p72chh2bs)?**

When you do, I'll be following up as the case progresses but I'll also keep you informed of the great work I'm doing at OMG . . . and it's exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I'll admit is thrilling. And I'm starting armed with all of the lessons I've learned to avoid the pitfalls I've experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we're more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

**[I'm asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1uqpac4plvur1fogo0dp1o9ab622mngncumena0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9gm9p72chh2bs)**. And I'll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd8g1soin7if1l82qaavc7t58ecaa7s26plhbh9o_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9gm9p72chh2bs)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O'Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z24vt0k370m2t5n2fbvfsiba9dm08s9n28thi5t8_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9gm9p72chh2bs)**.

---

ICYMI News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z11p6ir74kmkdug4app65966ssgc1ctp4mndh2n0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8p34c3imco3246h22sh2s8i66o73c9gm9p72chh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkhkt3100f9gbjjqfqags2is2iveknn44s6260l0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9gm9p72chh2bs)_

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z26cvhsg0nk455m9atp2kogd9s5oe8ob1klgie0g_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9gm9p72chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

---

[**_In addition to Special Guest Governor Ron DeSantis, American Radio and TV Host Dana Loesch will attend our Basque Fry event alongside hundreds of other conservatives. Will you be there, Peter ?_**](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=225073498a&e=b87806bd09)
---
| [**_Join Governor DeSantis & conservative fighters like Dana Loesch by purchasing your tickets today._**](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=b243bbf8c7&e=b87806bd09)
We are eagerly counting down the days until the highly anticipated Basque Fry event, Nevada's largest annual political gathering.

**Along with Special Guest Governor Ron DeSantis, we are honored to share the stage with Dana Loesch, a well-known advocate for our Second Amendment and former spokesperson for the National Rifle Association.** She is just one of the many conservative leaders attending this event. Our other special guests include Dave Rubin, Congressman Mark Amodei, Nevada Governor Joe Lombardo, and Nevada Lt. Governor Stavros Anthony.
**[_Get Your Tickets Here!_](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=23b8e8e8e7&e=b87806bd09)**
Tickets are selling quickly, so secure yours before they run out. Governor Ron DeSantis, Dana Loesch and our other special guests are excited about the opportunity to connect with you and discuss our shared vision for the future of America. **[_Get Your Tickets Here!_](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=ac457f4fb5&e=b87806bd09)**
This event will give strong conservatives the platform to showcase our resolute unity and unwavering strength by standing together, sending a compelling message to the Democrats. [**_Claim your tickets today >>_**](https://morninginnevadapac.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=047a240fc40ae6cc0e2ac8dec&id=a011076276&e=b87806bd09)

We are eagerly looking forward to seeing you soon.

* Adam Laxalt

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: America Is a Christian Nation
body:
Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different.

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25922%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OgQloCFuUggyjVetBbDLkg&sysid=1)
---
Hello, Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different. Our nation was founded on Christian principles, and the founders wanted our government to uphold those principles.

I’ve written a book whose title boldly declares what I know to be true: _America Is a Christian Nation_. Many would dispute that claim, but my book provides evidence for this truth using the very words and actions of the founders themselves. The book is a short read, accompanied by beautiful patriotic photos that I think you’ll appreciate.
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25922%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OgQloCFuUggyjVetBbDLkg&sysid=1)
---
| | I would love for you to read this book and discover the truth about our nation’s Christian heritage. As a token of appreciation for any gift you can make to Pathway to Victory today, we’ll send you a copy of the book. You can secure your copy by donating here: [https://ptv.org/donate/america-is-a-christian-nation-by-dr-robert-jeffress/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c25923%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8tq56sKb%2ff878FDDWQXT0A&sysid=1)

Your donation will be matched dollar-for-dollar thanks to a $500,000 matching challenge that ends on July 4th.

As believers, we must preserve America’s unique heritage and fight for our religious freedoms. By understanding our nation’s Christian roots, we can work to bring our country back to its founding principles. At the end of my book, I provide suggestions for how to do just that.

I hope you’ll consider donating to _Pathway to Victory_ and receiving your copy of _America Is a Christian Nation_ so you can know without a doubt that the foundation of our country was solidly established in the principles of the Bible.

Gratefully,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_

disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
---
Peter, sorry to bother you again, but it looks like you still haven’t taken my Mid-Year 2023 Priorities Survey.
When I first called on this powerful community to help guide my work for the next half of 2023, the initial response was overwhelming. I received responses from thousands of supporters across the nation, but I never saw yours come through.

**That’s why I've decided to reopen this survey to give you one more chance to make your voice heard – but the survey will _only_ remain open until 11:59 p.m. tonight. **
**So please, will you take 60 seconds now to respond to my Mid-Year 2023 Priorities Survey? Here’s the best link to access the form:[surveys.signforgood.com/LJ4NY23-june-priorities](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64522525/410350271/-37019199?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1101-su-nd&refcode=jtk1101-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzA4YTdkNi0wZDA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bHmTwiDsYJV_v9wAC6BZkX1SkbSpyK5hwZkGA8-VvFA=&emci=3352088d-7101-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=b308a7d6-0d06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
Thank you.

Letitia James
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Letitia James**
Date: Sun, Jun 4, 2023
Subject: before we enter the next half of the year
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64522526/410350272/-1997846888?code=jtk1101-su-nd&refcode=jtk1101-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzA4YTdkNi0wZDA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bHmTwiDsYJV_v9wAC6BZkX1SkbSpyK5hwZkGA8-VvFA=)
---
Peter, I didn’t grow up with power or privilege.
I was born and raised in a working-class family in one of Brooklyn’s many diverse neighborhoods. And, throughout my entire childhood and into my young adulthood, I had no real platform to voice my opinions or speak out against the decisions that were _directly_ affecting me and my family.
But when I made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black woman _ever_ to serve as New York's attorney general, I vowed that I would never let another person feel as voiceless as I did then. **And this priorities survey is a key part of upholding that vow.**
**Peter, I will _always_ fight for you and your loved ones – but to do that most effectively, I must know what concerns are top of mind for you. That's why I sent around my Mid-Year Priorities Survey – but it looks like your response is still _missing_.**
| | **2023 MID-YEAR PRIORITIES SURVEY**
---
NAME: Peter
EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com
STATUS: INCOMPLETE
Please record your response before 11:59 p.m. to make your voice heard
---
| | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64522527/410350273/-37019199?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1101-su-nd&refcode=jtk1101-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzA4YTdkNi0wZDA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bHmTwiDsYJV_v9wAC6BZkX1SkbSpyK5hwZkGA8-VvFA=&emci=3352088d-7101-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=b308a7d6-0d06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)
---
**[Please, will you take my priorities survey before midnight tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64522528/410350274/-37019199?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1101-su-nd&refcode=jtk1101-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzA4YTdkNi0wZDA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bHmTwiDsYJV_v9wAC6BZkX1SkbSpyK5hwZkGA8-VvFA=&emci=3352088d-7101-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=b308a7d6-0d06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
For millions across our nation, 2023 has been a _devastating_ year. Millions came into the year with little to no reproductive freedom, the gun violence epidemic has continued to claim hundreds more lives, and far-right lawmakers have waged their culture wars on every aspect of our lives – from our schools to our libraries.
And while I will _never_ bow or break in the face of a hard challenge, I must know where your top priorities lie so I can ensure I'm doing everything I can to best defend you.
**I'm looking for at least 5,000 fearless fighters like you to update your top priorities with my team as we head into the next half of the year. So _please_ : [Will you take 60 seconds now to share your thoughts so I can continue to fight for the things that matter most to you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64522529/410350275/-37019199?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1101-su-nd&refcode=jtk1101-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzA4YTdkNi0wZDA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bHmTwiDsYJV_v9wAC6BZkX1SkbSpyK5hwZkGA8-VvFA=&emci=3352088d-7101-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=b308a7d6-0d06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
| | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64522530/410350276/-37019199?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1101-su-nd&refcode=jtk1101-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzA4YTdkNi0wZDA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bHmTwiDsYJV_v9wAC6BZkX1SkbSpyK5hwZkGA8-VvFA=&emci=3352088d-7101-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=b308a7d6-0d06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)

Thank you for making your voice heard.

Letitia

body:
I’m calling BS on the GOP’s anti-trans hysteria.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64522807/410351666/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTYxM2RhZC0wZTA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f2lfY1bDzjNsdOww9Bwxozm3Wtqu8LZ_ZpX6oFzs7j0=&emci=73ffe835-fe05-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ea613dad-0e06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Peter, I’m calling BS on the GOP’s anti-trans hysteria: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64522808/410351667/683709638?refcode=E21667-20230608-JuneVideoTransKids-graphic-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTYxM2RhZC0wZTA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f2lfY1bDzjNsdOww9Bwxozm3Wtqu8LZ_ZpX6oFzs7j0=) **On the House Oversight Committee, I tore into an ex-Trump official after her attempt to bring bogus attacks on trans kids into a hearing on clean energy. Yes,_clean energy._** What do trans kids have to do with a committee hearing on energy? _Nothing_. But whether it’s on the Oversight Committee, Budget Committee, or dozens of other subcommittees, Republicans continue to obsess over trans children in every single conversation – using them as a new political boogeyman to mobilize far-right extremists behind their hateful agenda. **This Pride Month, I’m going toe-to-toe with MAGA extremists hellbent on eradicating queer youth and the LGBTQ+ community. In the face of increasingly personal and violent attacks, we will not back down – _but we need your support._[Please watch my latest exchange on the House Oversight Committee, and then pitch in a donation to have my back as I fight to defend LGBTQ+ Americans and trans kids in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64522809/410351695/683709638?refcode=E21667-20230608-JuneVideoTransKids-SL-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTYxM2RhZC0wZTA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f2lfY1bDzjNsdOww9Bwxozm3Wtqu8LZ_ZpX6oFzs7j0=)** **[Watch + Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64522810/410351696/683709638?refcode=E21667-20230608-JuneVideoTransKids-SB-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTYxM2RhZC0wZTA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f2lfY1bDzjNsdOww9Bwxozm3Wtqu8LZ_ZpX6oFzs7j0=)** I am the first woman and LGBTQ+ person serving Vermont in Congress, and one of only 11 openly-LGBTQ+ legislators in the House of Representatives. While I will continue to speak loudly and proudly against the bigoted rhetoric and lies being hurled at the LGBTQ+ community – during Pride Month, no less – _I cannot do it alone._ **I’m counting on the grassroots support of Democrats across the country to stand with me and fight for the most vulnerable members of the queer community, especially kids. [Donate anything you can afford today to help us continue to stand for the rights and freedoms of LGBTQ+ Americans.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64522811/410351697/683709638?refcode=E21667-20230608-JuneVideoTransKids-SL-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTYxM2RhZC0wZTA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f2lfY1bDzjNsdOww9Bwxozm3Wtqu8LZ_ZpX6oFzs7j0=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64522812/410351698/683709638?express_lane=true&refcode=E21667-20230608-JuneVideoTransKids-EL-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTYxM2RhZC0wZTA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f2lfY1bDzjNsdOww9Bwxozm3Wtqu8LZ_ZpX6oFzs7j0=)** | **[$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64522813/410351699/683709638?express_lane=true&refcode=E21667-20230608-JuneVideoTransKids-EL-LGBTQRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTYxM2RhZC0wZTA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f2lfY1bDzjNsdOww9Bwxozm3Wtqu8LZ_ZpX6oFzs7j0=)**

clean_body: I’m calling BS on the GOP’s anti-trans hysteria. | | Peter, I’m calling BS on the GOP’s anti-trans hysteria: = On the House Oversight Committee, I tore into an ex-Trump official after her attempt to bring bogus attacks on trans kids into a hearing on clean energy. Yes,clean energy. What do trans kids have to do with a committee hearing on energy? Nothing. But whether it’s on the Oversight Committee, Budget Committee, or dozens of other subcommittees, Republicans continue to obsess over trans children in every single conversation – using them as a new political boogeyman to mobilize far-right extremists behind their hateful agenda. This Pride Month, I’m going toe-to-toe with MAGA extremists hellbent on eradicating queer youth and the LGBTQ+ community. In the face of increasingly personal and violent attacks, we will not back down – but we need your support.= = I am the first woman and LGBTQ+ person serving Vermont in Congress, and one of only 11 openly-LGBTQ+ legislators in the House of Representatives. While I will continue to speak loudly and proudly against the bigoted rhetoric and lies being hurled at the LGBTQ+ community – during Pride Month, no less – I cannot do it alone. I’m counting on the grassroots support of Democrats across the country to stand with me and fight for the most vulnerable members of the queer community, especially kids. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Becca Balint = If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, **If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . name: Mike Pence
subject: I’m running for President of the United States
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence For President
body:
I believe that God and the Constitution must return to the forefront of our families, our communities and our government.

| |
---
| | | Friend, this is Mike Pence. Let me be the first to tell you I've officially launched my campaign for President of the United States. You can watch our full launch video here:
---
| [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=6aa2e50f0b1f4160a3fc10bfb5df5810&_e=tR5QQx4PmL8wuWhZOZKYCO1wxJAUkNFVxJvjuGc4uZq--MmFd3CKxb-DvVqoNCPJ3ZTmxZW6gmwS_sqsHjLCcPwk1voUXNQscrqEnSMJCTTd47hzvfmzwstCluZpoEgnZ4SF9xI5gtzsOml8rT8kuG_-S6iciVjurwofj8buWfQjOwae6w7_P-u4Dg-Zgx6ZdTb2vBs8j4ajqTsl7Nzkd3S90-PGwDy_QMVQD1LmF9G4XGNpJ2aEJnse0WmuMZwZ2W__7LprcVP5qbvVermxDGOyCnYcgXdoeLrzsqyHhwn8zzVnjMFbHdH7DhFyvGhVMgJPJKimE0gsTOVE_sfcIhnqMWztG9tbR_zU62gs584ps1JRSlXEG0vMlaoBFmtxgbUynLOAjqxHhjwcCsXlGcpGBoujU1uwrl1oTlCOMiE%3D)

| | | [JOIN TEAM PENCE](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=6aa2e50f0b1f4160a3fc10bfb5df5810&_e=tR5QQx4PmL8wuWhZOZKYCO1wxJAUkNFVxJvjuGc4uZq--MmFd3CKxb-DvVqoNCPJ3ZTmxZW6gmwS_sqsHjLCcPwk1voUXNQscrqEnSMJCTTd47hzvfmzwstCluZpoEgnZ4SF9xI5gtzsOml8rT8kuG_-S6iciVjurwofj8buWfQjOwae6w7_P-u4Dg-Zgx6ZdTb2vBs8j4ajqTsl7Nzkd3S90-PGwDy_QMVQD1LmF9G4XGNpJ2aEJnse0WmuMZwZ2W__7LprcVP5qbvVermxDAXl9a1DAVG8IfrGKjQ24cwueSM8XX1GSX4bWxvHHBkqIu6gi5-58cA468rdb3EZd5fmmuaeAhYrGU7c91-8OfuYxEAfLGWU-aCTvDGAkS1nEt_G_HQdIoIqPWbaGRdNqdp3uuSY9S71BMlxlSp2Yy0%3D)
---
This is not a decision I came to overnight, Friend. It has taken years of prayerful consideration with my wife Karen and our family.

After many long nights and longer conversations, we came to this conclusion: Our nation is at a crossroads, and the decisions we make next will chart our nation's course for decades to come.

**I believe that God and the Constitution must return to the forefront of our families, our communities and our government.**
---
| | | [JOIN TEAM PENCE](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=6aa2e50f0b1f4160a3fc10bfb5df5810&_e=tR5QQx4PmL8wuWhZOZKYCO1wxJAUkNFVxJvjuGc4uZq--MmFd3CKxb-DvVqoNCPJ3ZTmxZW6gmwS_sqsHjLCcPwk1voUXNQscrqEnSMJCTTd47hzvfmzwstCluZpoEgnZ4SF9xI5gtzsOml8rT8kuG_-S6iciVjurwofj8buWfQjOwae6w7_P-u4Dg-Zgx6ZdTb2vBs8j4ajqTsl7Nzkd3S90-PGwDy_QMVQD1LmF9G4XGNpJ2aEJnse0WmuMZwZ2W__7LprcVP5qbvVermxDPMnlUpHfjI1XWB1TdxTwnIUPwUsXUECjH0ykCvadTnXqY3ULbKfUZ2mQnIuSq-L0F3b2MsaUQYHVpLQGvC7V6XhSw-51jyofMFHy_XzFudaV6jQ-1_HR3L-OX8zGRqdrLf5VHj53IDbH3pbDI6G0rI%3D)
---
Growing up in Indiana, surrounded by God-fearing, hardworking Hoosiers, I always knew that I wanted to give back to the state and the country that had given me so much. During the Trump-Pence administration, I was able to take steps toward achieving that goal with conservative policies that put American families FIRST.

**But our work is far from over. **

Our values have never been under attack like they are today: from our schools, to our police departments, all the way to the car sitting in your driveway, Biden's White House and their far-left elitists have never been less connected to Americans' day-to-day lives, yet they have more say over what we do than ever before.

**Bottom line: America is in dire need of common sense leadership. From one God-fearing conservative to another, I 'm asking YOU to be a leading voice in our campaign to bring our country back to what it once was.**
---
| | | [JOIN TEAM PENCE](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=6aa2e50f0b1f4160a3fc10bfb5df5810&_e=tR5QQx4PmL8wuWhZOZKYCO1wxJAUkNFVxJvjuGc4uZq--MmFd3CKxb-DvVqoNCPJ3ZTmxZW6gmwS_sqsHjLCcPwk1voUXNQscrqEnSMJCTTd47hzvfmzwstCluZpoEgnZ4SF9xI5gtzsOml8rT8kuG_-S6iciVjurwofj8buWfQjOwae6w7_P-u4Dg-Zgx6ZdTb2vBs8j4ajqTsl7Nzkd3S90-PGwDy_QMVQD1LmF9G4XGNpJ2aEJnse0WmuMZwZ2W__7LprcVP5qbvVermxDALmrxEOMxUybUoT-ixp8ZhNWw2MfpEgetGaAI45nU3yegIIBkp8lQAQvrNHZE3oqwvtLprz7ZVRYeZN65jgOPkKNh942AKLwNeJp0NeG1fzK5pPOo3__nfGbY3VYmfnH8tLXBJm0nm7OUGPnUrcvQA%3D)
---
_**[If you want to return to common sense, God-fearing leadership, then I ask that you make a $15 gift to our campaign today.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=6aa2e50f0b1f4160a3fc10bfb5df5810&_e=tR5QQx4PmL8wuWhZOZKYCO1wxJAUkNFVxJvjuGc4uZq--MmFd3CKxb-DvVqoNCPJ3ZTmxZW6gmwS_sqsHjLCcPwk1voUXNQscrqEnSMJCTTd47hzvfmzwstCluZpoEgnZ4SF9xI5gtzsOml8rT8kuG_-S6iciVjurwofj8buWfQjOwae6w7_P-u4Dg-Zgx6ZdTb2vBs8j4ajqTsl7Nzkd3S90-PGwDy_QMVQD1LmF9G4XGNpJ2aEJnse0WmuMZwZ2W__7LprcVP5qbvVermxDMW0c4xoN7RLaWUXwSGhOR6gQ9wUp0zgLEkUKFR0J1W8nQ64EuPDUP5E5M50wA66WBiC85ux-XTGZsELLOz0GJHKLuusQP2Ehd2rCev1JvHiZd-jffeBErhKxhdd1NRrznL3Ee_DEJgtMPkOEgx37-U%3D "If you want to return to common sense, God-fearing leadership, then I ask that you make a $15 gift to our campaign today.")**_

If Bidenflation is hurting you too much to get involved financially, that's perfectly ok. I simply ask that you keep our campaign and everyone involved in your prayers - we're going to need it.

Thank you for your time, Friend, you'll be hearing a lot more from me soon.

God bless you and God bless America,
---
| [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=6aa2e50f0b1f4160a3fc10bfb5df5810&_e=tR5QQx4PmL8wuWhZOZKYCO1wxJAUkNFVxJvjuGc4uZq--MmFd3CKxb-DvVqoNCPJ3ZTmxZW6gmwS_sqsHjLCcPwk1voUXNQscrqEnSMJCTTd47hzvfmzwstCluZpoEgnZ4SF9xI5gtzsOml8rT8kuG_-S6iciVjurwofj8buWfQjOwae6w7_P-u4Dg-Zgx6ZdTb2vBs8j4ajqTsl7Nzkd3S90-PGwDy_QMVQD1LmF9G4XGNpJ2aEJnse0WmuMZwZ2W__7LprcVP5qbvVermxDH_LhP24FSCFYXXTuZ6BAlqM2YKBSGg70oVTwCYYJI9Ec__QLCiYoR0cOWLq_nsXy6EFMK7tuQf0TAm-6MQyHy4hH3E7n3Nn1dn54545Y5ojugyXPmku3BC9JIEoI1rIZhI1Xm8myhSDtCVWeNzUR9g%3D)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
You probably haven’t seen one of these – YET.

| Dear Reader, You probably haven’t seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbbk095t4g6cn2lrh9sel0i547r87jjkm2k7d118_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9im8pr4cdh2bs) If you’ve been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you’ve almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'. According to the _New York Post_ , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfk8q1u9bvpdpg94r940j26jmdtivnh6c8759sso_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9im8pr4cdh2bs) They’ve been installed at places like Citizen’s Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They’ve even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There’s nobody in America who’s more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation’s financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what’s to come. BUT, folks who understand the ‘Reverse ATM’ phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says:
> ** "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short." **
To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. [Click here now to see Dr. Prins’ free presentation.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9fs6qbh2l7ep9u6omjsodk4ese7836iap90sklo_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9im8pr4cdh2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. [Click here to see how.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgvdt15c8ea98dfe42kk2rm61169upmols5kbido_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9im8pr4cdh2bs)
---

body:
Our numbers will be available for all to see. Good or bad, big or small.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=234%2E791427%2E4jcOiI)
Friends,
I'm writing this morning to ask you to **[make a contribution — of $3 or anything you can — to our people-powered campaign for Congress.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-june23.qnOuuh&refcode=em230608-1-t2&t=2&akid=234%2E791427%2E4jcOiI)** Before I do, I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why.
Here's the situation:
The month of June is in full swing, which means in just a few short weeks we're facing an official FEC fundraising deadline. These deadlines are at the end of every quarter — just four times a year — and are incredibly important to our campaign's success.
Once the deadline passes, we're _legally required_ to report our numbers. That means not only how much we've raised, but how many individual contributions make up that amount.
They'll be available for everyone to see. Good or bad, big or small.
It also means that our opponents — right-wing Republicans, Washington lobbyists, the dark money super PACs who fund them — they're going to be looking to see how we did.
Why?
They want to know if our campaign has the resources to fight back against the attacks they're planning to fire our way. They want to know if it's worth their time and money to pour millions of dollars into Minnesota this year and next to try and defeat us.
We don't want our enemies to like what they see when they open our FEC report next quarter. Which is why we're counting on you to help send a message that our movement stands stronger than ever. So please:
**[Can you make your first contribution — of $3 or anything you can — to stand with our campaign today? The donation itself matters more than the amount you give, so anything you can chip in goes a long way.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-june23.qnOuuh&refcode=em230608-1-t2&t=3&akid=234%2E791427%2E4jcOiI)**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_

****
As you know, the only way we're funding our campaign is together. Thank you for being a part of it.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

name: Jon Tester
subject: Will you help get some luck?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64524339/410357570/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2Y0ODQyYy0xMzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mfCvdOu425uhziIpy-LaZyH1ZnhcLwbMS_z75xnTqOA=&emci=739c4641-8904-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=acf4842c-1306-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | I’m not like most of my colleagues in the Senate, Peter, and it’s not too hard to see why. All you have to do is look at my $12 flattop haircut and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts.

**I’m the Senate’s only working farmer, and proud of it.**

The truth is, I love this work. Yes, it can make for early mornings and late nights during planting and harvest seasons — but it also keeps me grounded, and it gives me perspective on the issues we face every day.

When I think about climate change, I’m thinking of folks on farms like mine, struggling with catastrophic droughts like the one we dealt with in 2021. When I think about reforming the USPS, I’m thinking of the people in rural communities across Montana who just want their mail delivered on time. And when I think about infrastructure, I’m thinking of airports like the ones I fly through every week, and the urgent upgrades we need to make to meet folks’ needs.

**These aren’t abstract issues. They’re very real challenges that deserve real solutions, and that’s what I’m fighting for in Washington. I spend every single day trying to do right by working families, farmers, students, and veterans here in Montana and across the country.**

[**_So I’m asking: Can you split a few dollars between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia to support this work? Your contributions help us keep the Senate blue and fight for working folks from Montana to Georgia._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64524340/410357571/-1883314608?refcode=20230608.1_JT_6G&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2Y0ODQyYy0xMzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mfCvdOu425uhziIpy-LaZyH1ZnhcLwbMS_z75xnTqOA=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

I’ll leave you with one last truth about farming: some years you do everything right, but things out of your control go wrong and you’re stuck with a bad harvest. Other years, you get some luck and it goes well.

That means it’s important to be prepared for any outcome, and to have a support system by your side when things get difficult. The same is true in Washington — and that’s why I’m so grateful to folks like you for even opening this message in the first place.

I appreciate your support, and anything you’re able to pitch in. Thanks for your help, and I hope I’m making you proud.

Jon

name: debby@burnettforcolorado.com
subject: HAY check out our new video, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burnett for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306_db_video-em?refcode2=img_logo [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306_db_video-em?refcode2=img_logo]
Whoa Peter — we just released a new campaign video, and I want to make sure you’re one of the first to watch it!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306_db_video-em?refcode2=img_video [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306_db_video-em?refcode2=img_video]
Peter, click here to watch and chip in $25 — or the most generous amount you can — to help us bring in 500 new donations by midnight tomorrow so we can make sure that as many folks as possible see it. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306_db_video-em?refcode2=link_CTA1]
Here’s the thing: Lauren Boebert has failed the people of Western and Southern Colorado.
Time and time again, she puts building her own extremist brand ahead of the needs of our neighbors. Other times, she fails to show up entirely — like when she didn’t even cast a vote to avoid an economic catastrophe while tweeting 23 times against the legislation on social media.
Tweeting isn’t representing, and that’s why so many Coloradans are ready to make a change and replace Lauren Boebert.
There’s a lot on the line in this election, from accessing safe abortions and protecting our vital natural resources to keeping our kids safe in schools and defending our democracy.
If we work together, we can replace Boebert once and for all. But right now, we need as many people as possible to see our new video.
Click here to watch, and give the most generous amount you can to help us reach our goal of 500 new donations by midnight tomorrow. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306_db_video-em?refcode2=link_CTA2] Anything you can give will help us reach our goal and get our new campaign video out far and wide so we can keep growing this people-powered movement!
Let’s go,
Debby
Dr. Debby Burnett is running to represent Colorado’s 3rd District in Congress. As a veterinarian of 20+ years, she’s worked with farmers and ranchers across our district to improve their lives and their livelihoods. As the mother of a 16-year-old, she knows how to get 20 things done at once. And as a rural Coloradan who owns a small agricultural business, she understands what the people of Western and Southern Colorado need — and that’s why she’s stepping up to give them a real voice in Congress.
CONTRIBUTE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306_db_video-em?refcode2=btn_biobox]

clean_body: [] Whoa Peter — we just released a new campaign video, and I want to make sure you’re one of the first to watch it! [] Peter, click here to watch and chip in $25 — or the most generous amount you can — to help us bring in 500 new donations by midnight tomorrow so we can make sure that as many folks as possible see it. >> [] Here’s the thing: Lauren Boebert has failed the people of Western and Southern Colorado. Time and time again, she puts building her own extremist brand ahead of the needs of our neighbors. Other times, she fails to show up entirely — like when she didn’t even cast a vote to avoid an economic catastrophe while tweeting 23 times against the legislation on social media. Tweeting isn’t representing, and that’s why so many Coloradans are ready to make a change and replace Lauren Boebert. There’s a lot on the line in this election, from accessing safe abortions and protecting our vital natural resources to keeping our kids safe in schools and defending our democracy. If we work together, we can replace Boebert once and for all. But right now, we need as many people as possible to see our new video. Click here to watch, and give the most generous amount you can to help us reach our goal of 500 new donations by midnight tomorrow. [] Anything you can give will help us reach our goal and get our new campaign video out far and wide so we can keep growing this people-powered movement! Let’s go, Debby Dr. Debby Burnett is running to represent Colorado’s 3rd District in Congress. As a veterinarian of 20+ years, she’s worked with farmers and ranchers across our district to improve their lives and their livelihoods. As the mother of a 16-year-old, she knows how to get 20 things done at once. And as a rural Coloradan who owns a small agricultural business, she understands what the people of Western and Southern Colorado need — and that’s why she’s stepping up to give them a real voice in Congress. name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ab710a2e181e431f889861e6edd9ff6a&_e=Kr1tfyMVb7TDz6Jn7DAWXR0mLkSxDQAWSmQAWCMnduqjtcmF7mayeyyEyjeQn4ZcDgqs0v8UWvIHqSKq_m963T04gjKYzklRS6USu0Zo81Y_bNck9Y-sBnMDwB9Bwgnut5Ad8l8WCwLHiem1zDlW1g2KYKSf_Kw0upezD-vRhG71eEUbTrqwQN2nuNFSniQrYJniLIfCh0HyU4pXLWMcgdsmoHq4iOs_U48HM_A9ZiUFw_yioM5qBDqtI5F2Zqcb3ItSQOVbn7QQyadFUKPw8g%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

name: Great America Update
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
Something strange is happening in our financial system.

| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy’s are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> “We’re going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years...”
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she’s found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70637%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FKGYic5ZwGJzzfOvaGHhUg&sysid=1) Dr. Prins says:
> ** “This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we’re about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result.” **
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a ‘reset’ to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. [Click here now to see her full (and free) presentation.](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70638%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=03WGOp7IPb49XSdBcFs3HQ&sysid=1) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. [Click here to see why.](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c70639%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TV4BLjK1m5RPhOJ2ugq%2brA&sysid=1)
---

Great America Update
---

name: SCOTUS ALERT [via AOTL]
subject: BREAKING NEWS: Allen v. Milligan decision released.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
This decision represents a significant step forward.
|
---

* * *
**BREAKING NEWS
The United States Supreme Court reaffirms the importance of the Voting Rights Act in a huge victory for voters in _Allen v. Milligan._**
* * *
The U.S. Supreme Court has ruled in favor of the Milligan and Caster plaintiffs in the _Allen v. Milligan_ case, marking a resounding and significant victory for Black voters in Alabama and across the country. Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, supported plaintiffs fighting on the behalf of Black Alabamians to ensure that their voices would be heard and rights protected. **The U.S. Supreme Court has reaffirmed its commitment to safeguarding the rights of voters across the nation, by upholding the protections enshrined in the Voting Rights Act (VRA), the landmark civil rights legislation that has stood strong for decades.**
The VRA -- often referred to as the crown jewel of the civil rights movement -- has been repeatedly upheld in numerous cases over the years and has received overwhelming bipartisan support for more than half a century. To compromise its integrity in any way would have been a grave disservice to our democracy. And because racially discriminatory voting processes still persist, the legal protections in the Voting Rights Act are still absolutely necessary.
**[Wins like these are amplified when grassroots activists like you are willing to get involved. All On The Line is committed to pushing back against gerrymandering, holding elected officials accountable, and ensuring fair representation for all. clean_body: This decision represents a significant step forward. | BREAKING NEWS The United States Supreme Court reaffirms the importance of the Voting Rights Act in a huge victory for voters in Allen v. Milligan. The U.S. Supreme Court has ruled in favor of the Milligan and Caster plaintiffs in the Allen v. Milligan case, marking a resounding and significant victory for Black voters in Alabama and across the country. Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, supported plaintiffs fighting on the behalf of Black Alabamians to ensure that their voices would be heard and rights protected. The U.S. Supreme Court has reaffirmed its commitment to safeguarding the rights of voters across the nation, by upholding the protections enshrined in the Voting Rights Act (VRA), the landmark civil rights legislation that has stood strong for decades. The VRA -- often referred to as the crown jewel of the civil rights movement -- has been repeatedly upheld in numerous cases over the years and has received overwhelming bipartisan support for more than half a century. To compromise its integrity in any way would have been a grave disservice to our democracy. And because racially discriminatory voting processes still persist, the legal protections in the Voting Rights Act are still absolutely necessary. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = This decision represents a significant step forward in our ongoing fight against gerrymandering and a significant victory for the American people as a whole. And we must keep up the fight. We cannot afford to let our guard down or allow any erosion of the progress we have made. = = ** In solidarity, All On The Line All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsTfn8fDfN

That's all we need.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osTfn8fDfN

Friend,

It's hard to believe, yet the first Republican
Presidential Debate is coming up soon.

Unlike the other candidates - Ron DeSantis, Larry Elder,
Nikki Haley, Asa Hutchinson, Vivek Ramaswamy, Tim Scott, and
Donald Trump, who have all had weeks, if not months, to
professionally fundraise - we are JUST getting this grassroots
movement started.

Now, this isn't a bad thing; however, it does make it
THAT much more difficult to qualify for the first debate. We
don't want our race to be over before it even starts, so we're
asking you to join the team with a generous donation of just $2
to our campaign, Doug Burgum for America.

CONTRIBUTE $2 NOW »

Every other campaign is asking for $1, yet we can do
better together. If every patriot reading this email donates just
$2, we'll be well on our way to making it on the debate stage in
Milwaukee in August. No candidate will work harder to earn your
support, which is why we are counting on folks like you to get us
to the debate stage so we can share our vision with America.

Please donate $2 or more RIGHT AWAY to help us qualify
for the first Republican Presidential Debate. >>

CONTRIBUTE $2 NOW »

Our team is going to send around a list with the names of
each supporter who gave $2 or more by the end of the day. We
would be eternally grateful to see YOUR NAME on the list, Friend.

With gratitude,

Team Burgum

CONTRIBUTE $2 NOW »

Fargo, North Dakota 58103

name: Vikram Mansharamani
subject: David Jordan and Vikram Mansharamani - NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY
body:
Podcast, radio show, conversations...
| | | |
---
# David Jordan, Founder & CEO of
# Seven Hills Foundation
---
In this week's episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with David Jordan, founder and President of Seven Hills Foundation, about his path from working in construction in Rhode Island to a wildly successful career as a social entrepreneur who today employs over 5000 people in three states and eight nations. David shares lessons learned from his leadership of the iconic Crotched Mountain School in the 1980s as well as his thoughts on returning to take over the school last year. He also reflects on some of the challenges of our day and his thoughts on how we can all make the world a bit better. Tune in via the links below.

---
---
PRIOR EPISODES ALL AVAILABLE ON DEMAND!
For those who missed the prior episodes of NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY, have no fear! They're all available on demand via the links below. As you sit in traffic during your weekend trips, tune in and use the opportunity to learn about some fascinating people as well as some of the most important topics of our times!
You'll find my conversations with John Avlon, Senior Political Analyst at CNN, Derek Leathers, Chairman & CEO of Werner Enterprises, Rudy Glocker, Founder of Burgeon Outdoor, former US Senator Kelly Ayotte, NCUA Vice Chair Kyle Hauptman, Miami Mayor Francis Suarez, NH Governor Chris Sununu, NH Education Czar Frank Edelblut, Commissioner of Business and Economic Affairs Taylor Caswell, GOP Presidential Candidate Vivek Ramaswamy, former Commander of NORAD and Retired Four Star General Lori Robinson, and former Chair of House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence Mike Rogers.

---
| |
---
---
|
---
|
Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist [Vikram Mansharamani](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b7CsfcRCV08rhTltCPtu7wewXNYubxD42Ip0P7kLiUPqohKbL0rCQKhmtEvSBSj0H5i6UwnTBrkLxhn3hFVpnrqGV4AC3LyqC_iAuad3-utZWpNTDy2HcoB4AuZhGcVInL6w7aGo7VCxf6glopBTSw==&c=wf1pH7Lj45oukYqw0wS2vuPNoijcfJIozI6NCa0N_g6wEgcB2oBALg==&ch=2OnSGjRL7QIBXsFTJDxlsx841o1og30lX-4WPagpMoXAuxoZ8eNmiQ==) dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. Serious, irreverent, entertaining, heart-warming, and occasionally tear-jerking, Navigating Uncertainty offers listeners bite-sized authentic biographies of high-impact leaders from all walks of life.Weekly episodes are released every Thursday via Apple Podcast, Spotify and everywhere podcasts are generally available!

To learn more about Dr. Mansharamani, please visit his website at [www.mansharamani.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001b7CsfcRCV08rhTltCPtu7wewXNYubxD42Ip0P7kLiUPqohKbL0rCQKhmtEvSBSj0H5i6UwnTBrkLxhn3hFVpnrqGV4AC3LyqC_iAuad3-utZWpNTDy2HcoB4AuZhGcVInL6w7aGo7VCxf6glopBTSw==&c=wf1pH7Lj45oukYqw0wS2vuPNoijcfJIozI6NCa0N_g6wEgcB2oBALg==&ch=2OnSGjRL7QIBXsFTJDxlsx841o1og30lX-4WPagpMoXAuxoZ8eNmiQ==).
Dr. Mansharamani is also planning to launch an occasional newsletter this summer. To subscribe (for free), please visit mansharamani.substack.com

clean_body: Podcast, radio show, conversations... | | | | David Jordan, Founder & CEO of Seven Hills Foundation In this week's episode, Dr. Mansharamani speaks with David Jordan, founder and President of Seven Hills Foundation, about his path from working in construction in Rhode Island to a wildly successful career as a social entrepreneur who today employs over 5000 people in three states and eight nations. David shares lessons learned from his leadership of the iconic Crotched Mountain School in the 1980s as well as his thoughts on returning to take over the school last year. He also reflects on some of the challenges of our day and his thoughts on how we can all make the world a bit better. Tune in via the links below. PRIOR EPISODES ALL AVAILABLE ON DEMAND! For those who missed the prior episodes of NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY, have no fear! They're all available on demand via the links below. As you sit in traffic during your weekend trips, tune in and use the opportunity to learn about some fascinating people as well as some of the most important topics of our times! You'll find my conversations with John Avlon, Senior Political Analyst at CNN, Derek Leathers, Chairman & CEO of Werner Enterprises, Rudy Glocker, Founder of Burgeon Outdoor, former US Senator Kelly Ayotte, NCUA Vice Chair Kyle Hauptman, Miami Mayor Francis Suarez, NH Governor Chris Sununu, NH Education Czar Frank Edelblut, Commissioner of Business and Economic Affairs Taylor Caswell, GOP Presidential Candidate Vivek Ramaswamy, former Commander of NORAD and Retired Four Star General Lori Robinson, and former Chair of House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence Mike Rogers. | | | | Navigating Uncertainty is a show in which acclaimed global trend-watcher and futurist == dives into how leaders make decisions. Through long-form conversations that move beyond sound-bites, Dr. Mansharamani explores how some of the most successful people think about tough choices. Serious, irreverent, entertaining, heart-warming, and occasionally tear-jerking, Navigating Uncertainty offers listeners bite-sized authentic biographies of high-impact leaders from all walks of life.Weekly episodes are released every Thursday via Apple Podcast, Spotify and everywhere podcasts are generally available! To learn more about Dr. Mansharamani, please visit his website at ==. Dr. Mansharamani is also planning to launch an occasional newsletter this summer. To subscribe (for free), please visit mansharamani.substack.com LINKS TO THE SHOW | | == | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | | | | | | Vikram Mansharamani | P.O. Box 1376, Concord, NH 03302 | | Sent by mailto:vikram@mansharamani.com in collaboration with

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41dc218247db4686af965dc764e7c631&_e=PodMV-6_5MIufSg7gUl4NUyWki49awwp9dQjmnXDuzFGtcV6F7Erjt3zFrQwpcpUj8_wjcHTbSgpA-sRhgolqCdRRi2FaibRZ3OzzVQNK3LlJdUiUQQAl2BA1qQlLW5iVNCfHwsE7-NW7bW0A9dKnRTXklKcAhN1LMu2S9aRN_F1-M7lTtOxfPXGxeCyMo70a3exknS_Ghi3-pVrwLhpMOLsoWjD72lDVcce8-jq5fWHIxgHVVwbPceJau2-q2pcSHNjPC2kiw0h7bblCTnL9A%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**
