clean_body: Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? Friend, Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells? They sing the national anthem. And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no " deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It's time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. name: Jon Tester
subject: I’m not the kind of guy you’d expect to see in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Hey folks, happy Thursday!
I wanted to take a moment to tell you a bit about why I’m in this fight.
I’m not the kind of guy you’d expect to see in Congress. I still get $12 flattop haircuts. And at home on the farm, I butcher my own meat.
I didn’t come to Washington to play into partisan hogwash—I came because I didn’t see anyone in our government sticking up for rural communities like mine.
I’m running to continue to deliver for Montanans, from holding our government accountable to standing up for veterans and protecting the Montana way of life.
But with Mitch McConnell and his dark money backers hellbent on taking back the Senate majority and targeting my seat to make their pipe dream a reality, I’ll need all the help I can get from my grassroots team.
Will you split a donation of any amount today between my campaign and Seth Moulton to help protect our Democratic majority and keep me fighting in the Senate for hardworking Montanans and their families? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]
Thanks for chipping in. I’m grateful you’re in this fight with me.
—Jon
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-tester]

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: This is the longest email I’ve sent you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/88?t=1&akid=128%2E52803%2ESOIB9z)

| | Peter, I usually try to keep these emails on the shorter side because I know your time is valuable. But I’m making an exception today because I’ve got a few important things to share with you, so it’d mean a lot to me if you read it through. **[(If you’re in a hurry but still want to chip in to my campaign for U.S. Senate, you can make a quick contribution here!)](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1935?t=9&amount=25&akid=128%2E52803%2ESOIB9z)** | | | [Donate](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1935?t=10&amount=25&akid=128%2E52803%2ESOIB9z)
---
Together, we’re on a journey to build a better Maryland. But it’s crucial that you have all the information on how I plan to get there. Here are some of my top policy priorities:
**Safe Communities for All**
As a former prosecutor, I know that it takes courage and cooperation to keep folks safe.
That’s the energy I’ll bring to the Senate. I’ll fight for common-sense policies with broad support, like universal background checks for gun purchases, communicate with experts and stakeholders, and develop smart strategies that keep Marylanders safe.
Our leaders must ensure that Americans can gather, learn, work, and live without fear. I’ll work with community leaders, experts, and stakeholders to keep our communities safe.
**A Quality Education, No Matter Your Zip Code**
Few things are more important than educating the next generation and setting our kids up for success. But it’s a sad truth that in Maryland and across the nation, your zip code is the best predictor of the quality of your child’s education.
That’s why, as County Executive, I secured historic funding for education, broke ground on ten new schools, and made sure students could learn online.
Teachers and students need someone who’s got their back in Washington. I’ll continue to fight to pay teachers fairly, fund schools at the necessary levels, and guarantee access to high-quality public education for all.
**Defending the Right to Choose**
I won’t mince words: Women’s health is under attack nationwide.
Far-right abortion bans are attacks on women’s health and safety. Far too many people are being forced to risk legal, financial, and personal consequences to receive basic reproductive and medical care.
Maryland must remain a safe haven for reproductive rights, and our leaders in Washington must continue to fight until everyone is guaranteed the right to choose – no matter what state they live in. I will be a faithful and committed advocate for choice in the Senate.
**A Fairer Economy**
Today, the wages of working and middle-class families don’t stretch as far as they once did. In fact, too many hardworking families are struggling to simply make ends meet.
A fair economy means that those who work full-time earn fair wages and a good quality of life. From tackling the housing crisis to reducing healthcare costs, we have all the tools to build an innovative, productive, growing economy that also provides workers with living wages and a good quality of life.
Peter, my to-do list doesn't end there. Dealing with climate change, modernizing our justice system, protecting voting rights and our democratic process all make the list. If I’m going to get all this and more done, I’ll need your helping hand.
**[Will you invest in a brighter future for the next generation of Marylanders and chip in $25 to my campaign for U.S. Senate?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1935?t=11&amount=25&akid=128%2E52803%2ESOIB9z)**
| | [Donate $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1935?t=12&amount=25&akid=128%2E52803%2ESOIB9z)
---
| | [Donate More](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/1935?t=13&amount=30&akid=128%2E52803%2ESOIB9z)
---
Thanks for reading,
Angela

| | [ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/89?t=2&akid=128%2E52803%2ESOIB9z)
---

| | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [click here.](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=128%2E52803%2ESOIB9z)
---

| | [ Chip in a one-time donation ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/91?t=5&akid=128%2E52803%2ESOIB9z)
---
| | [ Chip in a monthly recurring donation! ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/92?t=6&akid=128%2E52803%2ESOIB9z)
---

| Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate

Alsobrooks for Senate
PO Box 6058
Largo, MD 20792

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brady=20Batt=2C=20Executive=20Director?=
subject: Join us at our 46th Annual Dinner!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
We have a great evening planned for you!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570

clean_body: We have a great evening planned for you! Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd! With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms. We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! () State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. () Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press: “We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions. “Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative." Read the full statement. () Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here () . Contact: Steve Johnson Communications Director Washington State Republican Party (425) 460-0570 steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org) ============================================================

name: American Defense News
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
You probably haven’t seen one of these - YET.

| Dear Reader, You probably haven’t seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z0l7fk1gitsiv6jpcb0ffb61ugae78b8galjf7m0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9im6oj6c1h2bs) If you’ve been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you’ve almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a ‘Reverse ATM’. According to the _New York Post_ , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsvjv71vh114225gfvq4j3d4ltaepiid729egg38_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9im6oj6c1h2bs) They’ve been installed at places like Citizen’s Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They’ve even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There’s nobody in America who’s more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange ‘reverse ATMs.’ And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation’s financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what’s to come. BUT, folks who understand the ‘Reverse ATM’ phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says:
> ** “My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short.” **
To help folks prepare, she’s recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. [Click here now to see Dr. Prins’ free presentation.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zid3feuvg8k29k1rqoun7r5u3g5378l7kc004nno_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9im6oj6c1h2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. [Click here to see how.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmphutsqgsn75inge8d9p5q6kk48vhnjh77v01f0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9im6oj6c1h2bs)
---

American Defense News

Peter — North Carolina Republicans have abandoned teachers, working families, and state employees in their proposed budget. **Instead of securing resources for communities that need them, including for our public education system, the GOP prioritized boosting the wealthiest among us.** Right now, our state has a revenue _surplus_. This is the perfect time to give hardworking public school teachers the raises they deserve, address the mental health crisis, create job training opportunities, and more — as Governor Cooper’s proposed budget does. **[If you agree that North Carolina’s lawmakers should invest in the PEOPLE, add your name here to oppose the GOP’s budget>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64527514/410370053/1441101124?refcode=ea.ee209f08-1a06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.ee209f08-1a06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTIwOWYwOC0xYTA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ceA3WRz7X524H36clEg97lI1XZElFCQVduST3cMFy2Y=&emci=6a720247-5005-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=ee209f08-1a06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)** Peter, trickle-down tax cuts _just don’t work._ Giving a break to the wealthy doesn’t solve the real problems facing North Carolinians — from a lack of rural health care options to a public school teacher shortage. **What _does_ work is putting public tax dollars _back_ into our communities and giving folks the opportunities they need to succeed.** **[That’s why we CAN’T allow the GOP’s disastrous budget to take effect. name: Governor Gavin Newsom
subject: We need a 28th Amendment to the Constitution on guns
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Today, I am proposing the 28th Amendment to the United States Constitution to make our communities safer from gun violence.

Friends -
If Congress and the courts will not take action to help make our communities safer from gun violence, then we — the people — must do it ourselves.
Today, I am proposing a 28th Amendment to the United States Constitution to do just that.
The 28th Amendment will:
* Raise the federal minimum age to buy a firearm from 18 to 21.

* Mandate universal background checks.

* Institute a reasonable waiting period for all gun purchases.

* Ban civilian purchase of assault weapons.

I am asking you to add your name to say you support a 28th Amendment to make us safer from gun violence. It's a small and simple act, but it will speak volumes about the strength of this movement:
[**Add your name to become a Citizen Co-Sponsor of the 28th Amendment to make our communities safer from gun violence.**](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/signup/em-28th-amendment/?source=em230608-1-2m-full&refcode2=1420.4767699.Py_RA7&akid=1420%2E4767699%2EPy_RA7)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/signup/em-28th-amendment/?source=em230608-1-2m-full&refcode2=1420.4767699.Py_RA7&akid=1420%2E4767699%2EPy_RA7)
Convening a constitutional convention requires 34 state legislatures to call for this.
It starts with one, and California will be the first.
Will finding 33 more states calling to amend the Constitution be easy? No, of course not, I am clear-eyed about that.
But it has to start somewhere. It has to start sometime. And there's no better time than now, and no one better than you:
[**Add your name to say you want your state to call for a 28th Amendment to the Constitution to finally address gun violence in our communities.**](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/signup/em-28th-amendment/?source=em230608-1-2m-full&refcode2=1420.4767699.Py_RA7&akid=1420%2E4767699%2EPy_RA7)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/signup/em-28th-amendment/?source=em230608-1-2m-full&refcode2=1420.4767699.Py_RA7&akid=1420%2E4767699%2EPy_RA7)
Congress has not done enough. The courts prevent Congress and the states from doing what has to be done. Given that reality, it's up to us — together — to act.
The 28th Amendment.
\- Gavin Newsom
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/signup/em-28th-amendment/?source=em230608-1-2m-full&refcode2=1420.4767699.Py_RA7&akid=1420%2E4767699%2EPy_RA7)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=1420%2E4767699%2EPy_RA7).
PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
1787 Tribute Road, Suite K
Sacramento, CA 95815

Take a look at what Ashley’s been up to recently: | = Here's Ashley in front of a mobile billboard in Bensalem where Indivisible Bucks County is spreading the message on Brian Fitzpatrick’s failed leadership.= = Ashley spent the day knocking on doors for Central Bucks School Board candidate, and amazing friend, Heather Reynolds. Thanks to all the Democratic voters showing up at the polls, she advanced to the general! = Ashley spoke out at a Central Bucks School Board meeting against their hateful book ban policy enacted to rewrite history and silence LGBTQ and Black voices. Watch her speech= = In Doylestown, Ashley came out to support the Democratic candidates running for Central Bucks School Board and Doylestown Township Supervisor. Here she is with two Township Supervisor candidates, Jennifer Herring and Judy Dixon!= This summer, we’re continuing to build a broad coalition of Pennsylvanians from every corner of the district. body:
This is one of my biggest fights yet.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8qml0r7cvvv3c2ov6hi5asoadpoeagr4p1qaoc0_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9im6ob7clh2bs)

Fellow Patriot, This is one of my biggest fights yet. Turning Point USA is LEADING THE CHARGE against the World Economic Forum and its radical Great Reset agenda -- and I want to make sure America-loving patriots like YOU know how you can help STOP this dangerous scheme.
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmvgb3idejnlik5jsrlp9hfcc1ilc02gdjr2df20_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9im6ob7clh2bs)

name: Alex Padilla
subject: I know
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Hi there, it’s Alex.
I know my team and I have been reaching out a lot asking for your help to support my Democratic colleagues in tough races, so I wanted to take a second to reach out directly and share a few reasons why your support is so important.
1. **Our Democratic majority in the Senate is _only _one_ seat._** That means we’re going to have to win a lot of tough races — including races in states like Ohio and Montana that voted for Donald Trump in 2020 — in order to hold our majority and prevent Mitch McConnell from becoming Majority Leader again.
2. **Republicans know this too, so they’re already running attack ads against vulnerable Democrats.** Even though Election Day might seem far away now, Republicans aren’t waiting to go on the attack, so we’ve got to be ready to respond.
3. **We’re up against powerful and deep-pocketed special interests, and the only way we’ll be able to take them on is with a grassroots movement of supporters like you.** Big Oil, Big Pharma, and the GOP’s billionaire mega-donors are ready to pour tens of millions of dollars into these races. We can take them on and win, but it’s going to require lots of people stepping up and getting involved.

**So what do you say?**
[**Will you make a donation today to help me hold on to our Democratic majority in the Senate? From addressing climate change to protecting the right to an abortion to protecting our children from gun violence, there’s so much on the line in this election and we need everyone doing their part.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-june23.Jo0i-7&refcode=em230608-1-30&t=1&akid=1334%2E159979%2EQtdSSI)
Thank you. I really appreciate your dedication to holding on to our Senate majority, and it means a lot to me personally to know you’re on our team.
\- Alex
**[DONATE](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-june23.Jo0i-7&refcode=em230608-1-30&t=2&akid=1334%2E159979%2EQtdSSI)**

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1334%2E159979%2EQtdSSI)

name: Nina Harris, Field Director for Gabe Amo for Congress
subject: Volunteer with Gabe in June! 🏳️‍🌈📞🚪
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/105455/images/Gabe%20Amo%20Header_V6.png]
Hi Friend,

I’m Nina Harris, Field Director for Gabe Amo’s campaign for Congress. As our campaign continues to gain momentum, I wanted to reach out personally to invite you to get involved!

There are only 69 days until Early Voting starts! Democracy, reproductive freedom, gun safety, and Social Security and Medicare are all on the ballot — and Gabe is prepared to deliver for Rhode Islanders.

You can help make a difference in this race. Here are a few of the ways you can participate in our campaign in June, starting this week!

Walk with us [https://www.mobilize.us/gabeamo/event/566489/] in Providence's Pride parade on Saturday, June 17
Knock doors [https://www.mobilize.us/gabeamo/event/566483/] in the 1st Congressional District this Saturday, June 10
Phone bank [https://www.mobilize.us/gabeamo/event/565884/] for Gabe on Thursdays & Sundays
Throw a House Party [https://www.mobilize.us/gabeamo/event/564657/] for Gabe and get involved in Relational Organizing

Campaigns are never won by a candidate alone. It takes a community. We hope you will join our team and volunteer in the coming days, weeks, and months as we fight for the freedoms we hold dear.

[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/105455/images/FxjWKwMXwA47_Ih%20%281%29.jpeg] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/105455/images/FxU9DYGX0AglQX1.jpeg] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/105455/images/IMG_1982.jpg]

Click the links below to get involved!

With gratitude,

Nina Harris

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Speak out for Palestinian human rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, it's time
for Congress to take action to protect Palestinian human rights.

Today, Justice Democrats, Working Families Party, and Jewish Voice for
Peace Action are calling on Congressional Progressive Caucus (CPC) members
to sponsor Rep. Betty McCollum's bill, the Defending the Human Rights of
Palestinian Children and Families Living Under Israeli Military Occupation
Act.

This bill would ensure that no U.S. military funding is used to imprison
Palestinian children in the Israeli military detention and court system,
demolish Palestinian homes, or to further expand settlements and annex
Palestinian land.

The far-right Israeli government is currently planning for massive
settlement expansion, which will displace countless Palestinians from
their homes, so we must take action now. We need widespread support to
show members of Congress that we're expecting them to do the right thing.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134910?t=1001&akid=29334%2E1203867%2EsgWQYJ ]Peter, will you
add your name today and call on CPC members to co-sponsor legislation to
hold the Israeli government accountable for violence and protect
Palestinian human rights?

Add your name »

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/134910?t=1002&akid=29334%2E1203867%2EsgWQYJ ]Progressives in Congress should be fighting for every child to feel safe,
every family to feel secure in their home, and every community to feel rooted in
its land.

When we collectively raise our voices against injustice, we are powerful.

Thank you for taking action today,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you're struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1003&akid=29334%2E1203867%2EsgWQYJ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1004&akid=29334%2E1203867%2EsgWQYJ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230608-29334-footer&t=1005&refcode2=29334_1203867_sgWQYJ&akid=29334%2E1203867%2EsgWQYJ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1006&akid=29334%2E1203867%2EsgWQYJ

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Rick Larsen
subject: We celebrate our oceans by protecting them. ⛴ 🌊
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64530090/410379885/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2E1NDZhMy0xZjA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_VNwM8-WWEnW0nzdQ7MtwVRVATRpuoDXqlM3dZfzAI0=&emci=fb0671aa-5f05-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=a3a546a3-1f06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9494239)

| | Happy World Oceans Day! Here in Washington's Second Congressional district, **we have some of the most pristine oceans and aquatic ecosystems in the world.** Our communities have grown around these waters. For generations, Washingtonians have relied on these waters for transportation, jobs, and recreation. Take, for example, the Washington state ferry system. **Since the ferry system was created 72 years ago, ****ferries have been an essential part of our infrastructure**. You, your family, or your neighbor may plan your day around a ferry, and our entire community relies on ferries every day to connect us across the Puget Sound and its many inlets, straits, and bays. **Washington state relies on ferries because they are a necessity, not a luxury, and that is why I continue to fight for funding our vital infrastructure, like the funding I helped secure to modernize the ferry system to Lummi Island.** **But on World Oceans Day, we cannot just remember what the oceans do for us, we have to act to protect them.** From preventing ocean acidification to restoring marine habitats, I am committed to driving change and protecting our coastline and oceans. In Congress, I work hard to bring funding to our community to help restore our aquatic ecosystems. **Just this year, I worked with congressional leaders to bring more than $37 million in funding to combat climate change, restore wildlife habitat, and bring green jobs to our community.** **Today is the day to celebrate our oceans, and it is a great day to join the fight to protect them.** _Rick_ name: James O'Keefe
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

| | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d803d61563ff4ff4a8cd3f7216a43e51&_e=0zwAJ4tLcEOTgYMsDNPCV0enHnJu6EvZsUTtvcfRvIGyx_90W5-BNmYNvcpX7U3wz3_fETpOWuAdXGqo4geuq6CXQ_8LaEfnKtvLD-UHXIJBXK1uw7loco_uk_x8JxRufVhtib3m7xtPMG-CZfRx-ZI1uqW5JHSuNV2X4x4qqtygnom6lGm5i3MaFJDeGEfx2TgYqfpIMu4EAnphSYixOJaE9nMUiQnB6JRi00FDK2ueWRSlwm-nlAsa4SZ2_iF7f70afItDCsEjAbp4aWVE96k0TVu6rhelsl1CZtWXP82mLninF7Na8bc3BnS0zN_l6Mmm-G1aDHu5qJLB3mpbjEODtYTbklg1DqDVvLL8vsHwnLagSv7vdjFkE9zQDn-A9TVQypAhIL4vJlEq8cpJiw%3D%3D)
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d803d61563ff4ff4a8cd3f7216a43e51&_e=0zwAJ4tLcEOTgYMsDNPCV0enHnJu6EvZsUTtvcfRvIGyx_90W5-BNmYNvcpX7U3wz3_fETpOWuAdXGqo4geuq6CXQ_8LaEfnKtvLD-UHXIJBXK1uw7loco_uk_x8JxRufVhtib3m7xtPMG-CZfRx-ZI1uqW5JHSuNV2X4x4qqtygnom6lGm5i3MaFJDeGEfx2TgYqfpIMu4EAnphSYixOJaE9nMUiQnB6JRi00FDK2ueWRSlwm-nlAsa4SZ2_iF7X4vh6dIn3btMMT0GiZR3vCsYVluaxNuEhVT4Q3NqFgNAg0ffNNXCrrrGJ72e8s6ufSO9yFRMntqcwfOBAt0WGBkEJBwy3NIwQk0E2C9ILFI-DPsjDW9nkoSY2DYZLQvslOC8xUWopwg5pnSN8623JQ%3D%3D)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You've seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I'm unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I've chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan's quote on leadership: "Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**."

I've been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That's why I'm writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d803d61563ff4ff4a8cd3f7216a43e51&_e=0zwAJ4tLcEOTgYMsDNPCV0enHnJu6EvZsUTtvcfRvIGyx_90W5-BNmYNvcpX7U3wz3_fETpOWuAdXGqo4geuq6CXQ_8LaEfnKtvLD-UHXIJBXK1uw7loco_uk_x8JxRufVhtib3m7xtPMG-CZfRx-ZI1uqW5JHSuNV2X4x4qqtygnom6lGm5i3MaFJDeGEfx2TgYqfpIMu4EAnphSYixOJaE9nMUiQnB6JRi00FDK2ueWRSlwm-nlAsa4SZ2_iF7gY0hFTPeFmYAIX-11O7s7TgNdCo7W4g6T3dYHKMNHHf_7T_4-YxOUtahtlLa8A0msT18CWhtCiWA-kibNbPy9Ttdz_vhcatCl9MAt4LQK9ncVjidQ5TH2xpJ4xGBzzUdwW_Xhg2MVCC7D7-Yyzc8cA%3D%3D)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d803d61563ff4ff4a8cd3f7216a43e51&_e=0zwAJ4tLcEOTgYMsDNPCV0enHnJu6EvZsUTtvcfRvIGyx_90W5-BNmYNvcpX7U3wz3_fETpOWuAdXGqo4geuq6CXQ_8LaEfnKtvLD-UHXIJBXK1uw7loco_uk_x8JxRufVhtib3m7xtPMG-CZfRx-ZI1uqW5JHSuNV2X4x4qqtygnom6lGm5i3MaFJDeGEfx2TgYqfpIMu4EAnphSYixOJaE9nMUiQnB6JRi00FDK2ueWRSlwm-nlAsa4SZ2_iF7qdExJnF2lhDR-JuQOCiwGwdKwKGaYKKEOjYeDJMhQs-9c7l4-aUHr3Xcb7m_kQfI23M1gDsvrMxuEJE4HfDCRrXqi-hNXXqcSk7BP3iwhKxYCuzkEuWa6rf3gyzSliOl8-pgcSW0YHu34XWoavwYAA%3D%3D)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn't my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren't cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That's where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d803d61563ff4ff4a8cd3f7216a43e51&_e=0zwAJ4tLcEOTgYMsDNPCV0enHnJu6EvZsUTtvcfRvIGyx_90W5-BNmYNvcpX7U3wz3_fETpOWuAdXGqo4geuq6CXQ_8LaEfnKtvLD-UHXIJBXK1uw7loco_uk_x8JxRufVhtib3m7xtPMG-CZfRx-ZI1uqW5JHSuNV2X4x4qqtygnom6lGm5i3MaFJDeGEfx2TgYqfpIMu4EAnphSYixOJaE9nMUiQnB6JRi00FDK2ueWRSlwm-nlAsa4SZ2_iF7FrOFnL41xehrNuwcwKQ6j8WSH5jqa4z0PP5qVm_wjTGBhDrA3AEnUs-D3ewW70vavDraka7XOvU_V5QtcomMUXaJqrURdHoiniKfJDWB_gbFNZwK6l_7bmBS_PcWa8DiQvIacTy41XxBrBhIeRTNpw%3D%3D)?**

When you do, I'll be following up as the case progresses but I'll also keep you informed of the great work I'm doing at OMG . . . and it's exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I'll admit is thrilling. And I'm starting armed with all of the lessons I've learned to avoid the pitfalls I've experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we're more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

**[I'm asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d803d61563ff4ff4a8cd3f7216a43e51&_e=0zwAJ4tLcEOTgYMsDNPCV0enHnJu6EvZsUTtvcfRvIGyx_90W5-BNmYNvcpX7U3wz3_fETpOWuAdXGqo4geuq6CXQ_8LaEfnKtvLD-UHXIJBXK1uw7loco_uk_x8JxRufVhtib3m7xtPMG-CZfRx-ZI1uqW5JHSuNV2X4x4qqtygnom6lGm5i3MaFJDeGEfx2TgYqfpIMu4EAnphSYixOJaE9nMUiQnB6JRi00FDK2ueWRSlwm-nlAsa4SZ2_iF7YxDlKDEPsZ_yiB0dWRjE9eePXO6ZpxbmghpcpacGkkfQRrgdtqhgzkv8DyvBsrkLT0ZwLnd-ZSbJcLlwsu2NqZvGBTWLPS1r8Rg23ysFa5lWvdpeCRjrEWpKvEQ6NejwCDtd02_PYzdnh9II2ITo3w%3D%3D)**. And I'll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d803d61563ff4ff4a8cd3f7216a43e51&_e=0zwAJ4tLcEOTgYMsDNPCV0enHnJu6EvZsUTtvcfRvIGyx_90W5-BNmYNvcpX7U3wz3_fETpOWuAdXGqo4geuq6CXQ_8LaEfnKtvLD-UHXIJBXK1uw7loco_uk_x8JxRufVhtib3m7xtPMG-CZfRx-ZI1uqW5JHSuNV2X4x4qqtygnom6lGm5i3MaFJDeGEfx2TgYqfpIMu4EAnphSYixOJaE9nMUiQnB6JRi00FDK2ueWRSlwm-nlAsa4SZ2_iF7p-QZOjzDGTI-tQ8PyPKIPZlLfBoJcUF0XZIymq4jIkJ0XoO-eKuLTRYSJxjlvRCj6ERlixhTvkFcJASZ25rmvpKSs7kf0f_l1FRlqsPw06c4yaBNbuHG8fumj1p4mP1m6uF7AlCcCG4P_iddOr3p5w%3D%3D)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O'Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d803d61563ff4ff4a8cd3f7216a43e51&_e=0zwAJ4tLcEOTgYMsDNPCV0enHnJu6EvZsUTtvcfRvIGyx_90W5-BNmYNvcpX7U3wz3_fETpOWuAdXGqo4geuq6CXQ_8LaEfnKtvLD-UHXIJBXK1uw7loco_uk_x8JxRufVhtib3m7xtPMG-CZfRx-ZI1uqW5JHSuNV2X4x4qqtygnom6lGm5i3MaFJDeGEfx2TgYqfpIMu4EAnphSYixOJaE9nMUiQnB6JRi00FDK2ueWRSlwm-nlAsa4SZ2_iF7FcTjJp3dRCrVdRpsd4NQbUIy3ZR7kYJ-9fKobmPTWaudJKCcnI0PL4IFM1Jqz2_tv_GFHrdwFCkFMpDbS2xDi_3Q8BNyDGK0_m0KWwYd6CnOoMrgT1K9q55q-GQgWlXKgZ49BiALq75bVM2thfyk2g%3D%3D)**.

---

name: Ted Cruz
subject: He’s going to indict out of SPITE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
Fellow Conservative, He’s corrupted the Department of Justice.

He’s corrupted the FBI.

Merrick Garland has proven, time and time again, that he is not just willing but eager to lawlessly corrupt the machinery of our federal government to serve as an arm of the DNC. **And as I said on _Hannity_ on Monday and wrote you earlier this week, I firmly believe he is going to INDICT PRESIDENT TRUMP out of nothing but spite – _simply put, he HATES him!_ ** Every freedom-loving American patriot should be outraged. At the same time this guy is targeting President Trump, he’s doing all he can to cover up the Biden family’s corruption.

I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: **Merrick Garland is the most partisan and political attorney general in our nation’s history.** To this day, he is furious over the fact that he wasn’t confirmed to the U.S. Supreme Court during the Obama administration.

He must be stopped and I’m leading the charge. [__**Step up today to help fuel our fight at Team Cruz >>>**__](http://trk.tedcruz._nzxft6JCwmvs5Q)
---
[**RUSH EMERGENCY SUPPORT**](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
This Deep State corruption and weaponization of law enforcement we’ve seen under Barack Obama and now Joe Biden is a grave threat to the future of our great republic. **As a member of the Senate Judiciary Committee, I’ve grilled Merrick Garland before – and I can assure you, I WILL NOT LET UP in the fight to hold him accountable and end the targeting of conservative patriots in our country!** Thank you for any donation you cand send today. [_**Every contribution is a huge help.**_](http://trk.tedcruz.)

For Liberty,

Ted Cruz

name: collecting local signatures | Left Action
subject: Sign: Support a Constitutional amendment to ban assault weapons >>
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Add your name: Support Gavin Newsom’s Constitutional Amendment to Ban Assault Weapons >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T705133af-a2fd-4585-8dbe-1dfdb2dc8b27/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T705654aa-3ea9-444f-bd63-28c8ae2030cf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | California Governor Gavin Newsom is proposing a [28th amendment](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3abfeedf-7cb1-459a-85bf-efba6813d083/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) to the U.S. Constitution to fight our country’s gun violence epidemic. This is the kind of monumental change we need! And finally, we are going on the offense! The amendment would raise the federal minimum age to buy a firearm to 21 from 18, mandate universal background checks, institute a waiting period for all gun purchases, and ban assault rifles nationally. So far, our leaders have failed to act in the face of one tragedy after another. But this amendment would be the major step forward we need. Look, passing an amendment will not be easy, but there is broad support for these measures, so if we push hard enough, we can make this happen. [Add your name: Support Gavin Newsom’s Constitutional Amendment to tackle gun violence >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d8e2d3f-1e64-4702-b130-486bcc997610/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

name: Replace Sinema
subject: PETITION: Tell Congress to pass the Equality Act
body:
Sinema’s beloved filibuster stands in the way of the rights of millions of Americans | | | Peter – The LGBTQ+ community is under relentless attack, yet we’ve heard nothing but crickets from Kyrsten Sinema. Meanwhile, the main reason the Equality Act isn’t already law is because of the filibuster – the filibuster that Kyrsten Sinema teamed up with Republicans to save, and which also blocked abortion rights and voting rights legislation. LGBTQ+ people face discrimination across the country even with laws in place – but in 29 states there aren’t even anti-discrimination laws on the books to protect them. The Equality Act is needed to fix that – and make sure that no one is discriminated against just because of who they are or who they love. Why does Sinema think the rights of 41 Republicans to filibuster majority-supported legislation is more important than the fundamental human rights of millions of Americans? This is an issue of basic, constitutionally protected freedoms and protection from direct, discriminatory attacks against those freedoms. **Sinema promised to ensure those basic rights were protected–not to do the bidding of rich donors and uphold a racist procedural relic.** **That’s why we’re participating in this joint petition to demand that Congress pass the Equality Act and stop the denial of our freedoms.[Add your name HERE >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mHQLCfNlixKIGL2gVdtURMawg6H9n2SCjSwBcmUw8rjDdZnbbv8rR3JImj_sxHq92CqQkCfAiObiCZzAuH7H94CmA4TMS6Ej0epxKnzTKoGf0gvZ1ERO09a0-tPfcyfxiUo-BMu8apYKQHkirwVks5alD4iVmzQgn-fQF0ZRimsadxdo-og3xgu0lSvnzKHptPtplP3Geqjsoqu97g8dZU8tlr4tQfuKif5DRP5h1pBF4MTpGUlRE1229tHimeJUoXmJYSP7Pck1hbFOBzjlTdVi1BdAbMbi1lBd04zwsRgi-5qBUjqE5vIaqHf5pTEzIuQYwmya6U8ChJ7IfIonGLl-L8bJShjsmXZQP6XK2kNK2_WE18yvpIMa2QbCKYSb8retNsSN_kVEA_k_8WJpNA32LlFlpyfa_WGPiitThYO_TLWDCF-QJIrfZtygVMVQq8Eo74yLoCnX_t9JDEOUGqZmpH_2HQIvyQI3AZv4CQpqwk-1xZ2RFI8wWj7lSefBHNZKMOwJQZ8UsEHBkQJi3xg/3wv/k1IO_g6XTk-7BMhP7P5Wcw/h0/DGgqKbqa5A1bftT89GfpGTF8VRvsuRKXLizGgAG8-Zw)**[**__**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mHQLCfNlixKIGL2gVdtURMawg6H9n2SCjSwBcmUw8rjDdZnbbv8rR3JImj_sxHq92CqQkCfAiObiCZzAuH7H94CmA4TMS6Ej0epxKnzTKoGf9uS00VNqonlXfR8_JfiDQgkZpBgzA8o_E0IAW5IDEeVrTGFtx8dR5UMQSEjf9HZyCJfC4ooqnmm0XfJqU5nnoLprgglJrSwkkGBzgkckpdSvgqFRDDA9OLwKrGCfUNpubTBn3dHFntnLMCXSw8F-rl6aPSPUvAMwhXU0eGPczO05zO_9U6N3XTPAJ1zl1VCbtP7t4CJgAUqhI-xb8pMDECrapdH5-FieBJrIoT447I-qw9XVF1mNtTJQW91oQA97hYfR7DyqyuAp_DLa8x-TUB40mBYbvb0kNxl47TPzIjw/3wv/k1IO_g6XTk-7BMhP7P5Wcw/h1/5ama5VX9fxzdZLc18M17LpFDEVScEAW5JMJniwKZ-DA) We’ll be blunt: when Sinema was elected as the first openly bisexual Senator in U.S. history, the LGBT community – including us – were thrilled. name: Breaking Supreme Court News ---------------- via House Conservatives
subject: URGENT: New vicious ad blitz unleashed against Clarence Thomas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Here's the truth: Democrats are going after a trailblazing American...

| |
---
| | | Patriot,

_**[RIGHT NOW, the Liberal Mob is pulling out all the stops to get Justice Clarence Thomas IMPEACHED from the Supreme Court.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62795154:JMp-OyIAN:m:1:3299561967:33524C0168E490ABC2473C79B659A9F5:r "RIGHT NOW, the Liberal Mob is
pulling out all the stops to get Justice Clarence Thomas IMPEACHED from the Supreme Court.")**_

Newsmax just broke a story about a Liberal group unleashing a coordinated, six-figure ad blitz calling for Clarence Thomas to RESIGN from the Supreme Court!
---
| | | [STAND WITH CLARENCE THOMAS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62795154:JMp-OyIAN:m:1:3299561967:33524C0168E490ABC2473C79B659A9F5:r "STAND WITH CLARENCE THOMAS")
---
Here's the truth: Democrats are going after a trailblazing American who fought through hardship and injustice to become one of the greatest legal minds in history.

His unlikely rise to the nation's highest court should serve as an inspiring example of the possibilities and opportunities provided by our great nation.

Instead, Leftists are trying to destroy the reputation of a brilliant constitutionalist.
_Here 's the incredible story of the man they are smearing:_
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62795154:JMp-OyIAN:m:1:3299561967:33524C0168E490ABC2473C79B659A9F5:r "image")
---
* Born on June 23, 1948, in Pin Point, Georgia, Thomas, a descendant of slaves, grew up in a low-income home and faced racial discrimination in his early years.

* After his father left the family when he was two years old, Thomas' mother struggled to raise him and his siblings.

* A house fire left the family homeless when Thomas was still a child.

* After the fire, he was sent to live with his grandparents in Savannah, Georgia. It was the first time he'd had indoor plumbing and regular meals.

* Thomas' grandfather would prove to be a huge influence on his life, teaching his young grandson about the importance of hard work and personal responsibility.

* Thomas - whose grandfather impressed upon him the importance of a good education - became the first member of his family to enroll in college, attending Conception Seminary College and later transferring to Holy Cross College, where he graduated cum laude.

* After completing his undergraduate studies, Thomas attended Yale Law School, where he was one of the only black students at the time.

* Thomas began his legal career by working in various positions, including at the Missouri Attorney General's Office and the U.S. Department of Education's Office for Civil Rights.

* In 1981, he was appointed as the Assistant Secretary for Civil Rights under the Reagan administration.

* Thomas gained recognition for his conservative views and his strong commitment to originalism and textualism in interpreting the Constitution.

* In 1991, President George H.W. Bush nominated Thomas to the Supreme Court to fill the vacancy left by the retirement of Justice Thurgood Marshall, the first black man to serve on the court.

* Despite a contentious process, Thomas was confirmed by the Senate in October 1991, becoming the second African American to serve on the Supreme Court.

* His confirmation solidified his position as a conservative justice, known for his independent thinking and often dissenting opinions.

Despite the many hardships in his life, Clarence Thomas persevered to achieve success in his career. His journey is a testament to his resilience, determination, and ability to navigate adversity. But the Radical Left is going to do anything they can to DESTROY this man's legacy.

We have one request for you, _**[will you stand alongside House Republicans and fight to DEFEND Clarence Thomas against this unjust smear by the Radical Left?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62795154:JMp-OyIAN:m:1:3299561967:33524C0168E490ABC2473C79B659A9F5:r "will you stand alongside
House Republicans and fight to DEFEND Clarence Thomas against this unjust smear by the Radical Left? ")**_
---
| | | [STAND WITH CLARENCE THOMAS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62795154:JMp-OyIAN:m:1:3299561967:33524C0168E490ABC2473C79B659A9F5:r "STAND WITH CLARENCE THOMAS")
---
We are looking for 20,000 signatures by midnight tonight. Will you be one of them?

Thank you,
House Republicans

---
* * *
---
|
---
| Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC.

subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
You probably haven't seen one of these - YET.

| Dear Reader, You probably haven't seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7fee17aeca084b7186a91f6c3331f704&_e=9yoUu9wKzgTjXqH1R2usT61z5isuffYopguRmUGyIIIm_MlsJ92rqzIepsjz4s20VUKo1OYasv53qhScUQJuJfqwupw65aW15fEzy9A_kODdCOaeDgXxy39tQhWk6TPyM-n37-o3hHnBTlal5ewg2v7XiTGaW5sV2hJZtU3Ux5_CBRvkOi_2IxMSkGMClGiSNhAM7Qv65nOfNkQ5CbPwbuJvOWoa7niHdH9-23r8JSVBLovC4xLe5pDKUPKSasgc) If you've been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you've almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'. According to the _New York Post_ , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7fee17aeca084b7186a91f6c3331f704&_e=9yoUu9wKzgTjXqH1R2usT61z5isuffYopguRmUGyIIIm_MlsJ92rqzIepsjz4s20VUKo1OYasv53qhScUQJuJfqwupw65aW15fEzy9A_kOBj1GubBQgXkEB9zDiprwR6GqhO6tXZd3FlSP4LZNLEBPhog7P7KqcoCxWHhJTbzKu3VyQ5xsDSNLpKfH39-shsw5awSpyD2uCErU1JobgW9jsEVOeQf5TYhROcmsgB0dpHyaVnvwniy8Kfb-6ch5xD) They've been installed at places like Citizen's Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They've even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There's nobody in America who's more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation's financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what's to come. BUT, folks who understand the 'Reverse ATM' phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says:
> "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short."
To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. [Click here now to see Dr. Prins' free presentation.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7fee17aeca084b7186a91f6c3331f704&_e=9yoUu9wKzgTjXqH1R2usT61z5isuffYopguRmUGyIIIm_MlsJ92rqzIepsjz4s20VUKo1OYasv53qhScUQJuJfqwupw65aW15fEzy9A_kODQgHJjHkT5JGC2G9l7Ji7Lzj5FvJbynhJg9PXZAhbSjta3JF5UtDZVE6wJy6LQSqIS6VaiTtf8ggrdNl6G4HbOH6x7x2_Y6wY-wTzu3AQX2nw5tOlea2CIeBMYQe_QNSAin-KstUsjNL3I2S9mrgxi) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. [Click here to see how.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7fee17aeca084b7186a91f6c3331f704&_e=9yoUu9wKzgTjXqH1R2usT61z5isuffYopguRmUGyIIIm_MlsJ92rqzIepsjz4s20VUKo1OYasv53qhScUQJuJfqwupw65aW15fEzy9A_kOB1LAqOiokE6VxLi8sZ_xi6d1LLp9yNF1vUQor_G44p1Q_YDg2l4x6jvIlRjUmohG5dx_W8KBeLrh3u7-ENxcmoLuaNI5oAAsgZrBv2ix6MlmO6IzhtriduoVOJNAxzgk7e4uJLp96c0JrhZiw_PzSu)

clean_body: You probably haven't seen one of these - YET. | Dear Reader, You probably haven't seen one of these - YET. But you will soon. Machines like the one in this picture are popping up all across America. If you've been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you've almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM'. According to the New York Post , restaurants and other businesses are using them to avoid handling cash. They've been installed at places like Citizen's Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... Miami International Airport... They've even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? I recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There's nobody in America who's more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, Dr. Prins explained these strange 'reverse ATMs.' And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation's financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what's to come. BUT, folks who understand the 'Reverse ATM' phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. Dr. Prins accurately predicted the 2008 crash, the lockdown crash, and connected the dots between the White House and the Federal Reserve. And now, she says: "My research shows the Fed is installing the infrastructure for a massive overhaul to our financial system, and I expect it to go live by the end of July. In other words, time is short." To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. Regards, Maria Bonaventura Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics P.S. The last time we saw a similar overhaul to the financial system, folks who stayed on the sidelines lost almost everything. But folks who acted quickly had the opportunity to rescue their retirement accounts before they were decimated. Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:
---
| | The House just passed Josh’s bipartisan Senior Security Act, which will establish a task force to protect older folks from the debilitating effects of financial crime.

In 2019 and 2020 there were over 220,000 cases of elder abuse or neglect — a large portion of which were financial fraud cases. Our seniors deserve a cop on the beat of financial crimes — to guarantee they aren’t the victims of scams and bad actors.

Team DeSantis

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d565ccd721df401a7544b6cd42fa87bae4ad2696b5680771ecbb76dfa23f6fe5723ad1255eca97d5d0f02def6a504885602cd9c0075b2cfe)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron DeSantis was raised in the Tampa Bay area by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. In 2012, Ron was elected to
---
Congress on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, he fought to help our veterans, expose the weaponization of the IRS and hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and elite power grabs. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He even flipped Miami-Dade County red. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,
* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold actions against illegal immigration,
* defending parental rights,
* defunding DEI bureaucracy and faculty tenure in higher ed,
* waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,
* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,
* protecting the unborn,
* Counteracting the influence of the Chinese Communist Party and other foreign adversaries,
* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* expanding education freedom,
* lowering prescription drug costs,
* Reforming higher education,
* Improving Florida's infrastructure,
* holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* delivering record-breaking tax relief,
* helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,
* supporting law enforcement and our veterans,
* enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, including the death penalty for child rapists,
* ...and so much more.

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award-winning television anchor. They are the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---

body:
I just wanted to say thank you, to all of you. I was so happy to spend my birthday with my family and enjoy quality time and cake!

| Peter,

Yesterday was my birthday and I received an outpouring of well wishes and support from everyone on Team Wild. I couldn’t be more grateful to have all of you on my side.

I just wanted to say thank you, to all of you. I was so happy to spend my birthday with my family and enjoy quality time and cake!
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64532120/410386170/428766023?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230608-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTg5ZDI5ZS0yNDA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q1jffk_dcLSqqkOJdOXSdjQaY0SoA9WxQKS3rW2AE0w=)

clean_body: I just wanted to say thank you, to all of you. I was so happy to spend my birthday with my family and enjoy quality time and cake! | = | Peter, Yesterday was my birthday and I received an outpouring of well wishes and support from everyone on Team Wild. I couldn’t be more grateful to have all of you on my side. I just wanted to say thank you, to all of you. I was so happy to spend my birthday with my family and enjoy quality time and cake! = We’ve been through some tough battles together since I was first elected in 2018 and I never could’ve done it without your support. We’re coming up on another tough re-election in 2024 and if we want to win back the House majority, we need to protect vulnerable seats like mine. = | | | = Thanks, Susan Wild | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | BREAKING NEWS UPDATE FOR PETER! This ruling could force the creation of 2-4 new Black majority districts, and with only 5 seats needed to take back the House — this could make ALL THE DIFFERENCE. Peter, last year we contacted 3.1 MILLION Black voters to get them to the polls, and in 2024 we’re going to work even harder to mobilize Black voters as we fight to take back the House. | Not only is this a HUGE win for Black voters in Alabama, this ruling could reverberate to OTHER states (we’re looking at you Louisiana, South Carolina, North Carolina and Georgia 👀) We’re going all-out to mobilize as many Black voters as we can so that we’re ready to take back the House in 2024. But grassroots activism like this isn’t cheap, Peter, and we desperately need your help. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Thank you, The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. body:
Here in Alaska, we know our state’s political landscape is shifting. With your help, we’re going to prove it.

| | | [ ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64532415/410386969/1859846009?amount=25&utm_campaign=em_230608_battlegroundak&utm_source=em&utm_medium=em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MzkxOTJkNC0yNTA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=igoNEqrx8inqut7GfCaGF1ntSQOrAW0FA7Yv3LUnepc=&emci=929192d4-2506-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=939192d4-2506-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9512399)

| | | Friend, The 2022 elections proved that **Alaska is becoming a _pivotal_ battleground state.** Grassroots supporters like you fueled our movement to promote candidates like Mary Peltola and give them the edge they needed to win. Together, we were able to protect the nation from extremists like Sarah Palin and elect common-sense leaders who will work together to further Alaska’s progress. Friend,
---
The radical bureaucrats in Washington DC are at it again – did you know they are now allowing **non-citizens** to vote in elections?
---
**And to make matters worse, Chinese and Russian embassy staff can also now vote in elections held in Washington.**
---
We should **NOT** be allowing foreign diplomats to vote in elections **ANYWHERE** in the United States – _never mind in our nation’s capital..._
---
So, as you may have seen in the news, I’m taking action alongside my colleagues in Congress like James Comer to _hold DC liberals accountable and protect election integrity_.
---

---

---
_**We need to hear from you regarding this pressing news.**_
---
**This is why we have launched an official[**POLL**](https://links.steil4congress.com/u/click?_t=341f45e792a04ec6b4bc19a47b2f9a18&_m=cbefce69629944818ce3c7c9c510b561&_e=UIhLnICchcb5RYOFTtO74Tw8B-ur22gzKUPQfSkVWCbqSLjePwzTKd8T-eLu2YySJKf7-aj44OR3ySkN8UmXvnMxfLNR6l8uOxlSoewNn23rpQv9DgyJfb2J-6_KZPWwjQ5RTrWYrqK6SG6gp-h4hI2Uz638yvynYJLqzyfx1lxoSzszUWl9e_6winQExHpQy3D8CbdYOGiiBjrLQjIZPfS2WX2AIB-av3rderV1wBCA_51QkmrwvFbukcnCxOyzMp_JPH3SmrbcnerlR0_9T6Smgvxrgjht64XTWAZ002Z-jhVEMxSyJ5QWuyPqF9p5BXI2NpuX1Z0BUxp_T8qsd46yDBFmxexPOvhg-I5ykwi3RhBIZxvarbuG6ElTPYdSn8QYM8b_emPBAsJyB0_qpAIcFZ4eGg1P2jHRWjk8N8Xjf_ks0JuqiSF8XCjdDH--GPbceHTSl3STZyK2U2I98MeNvrk78Cbkgc1BQq8a-Eg%3D) to collect unbiased feedback from the American people. Please respond as soon as possible!**

_**Should Foreign Diplomats and other non-citizens be allowed to vote in American elections?**_

**JUST** REAL **NEWS**

The corporate news media wants your attention, and they'll do unscrupulous things to get it.

We don't work for them. We work for you (for free*).

^ more on that in a minute

**First, Ask yourself:**
1. | Wouldn't it be nice to trust the news I'm reading?
---|---
2. | Wouldn't it be even better if trustworthy news came straight to me instead of sifting the internet for a nugget or two of un-biased information??
3. | How much time have I wasted digging through an avalanche of stories across the Internet to figure out what's true and important?

[There is a better way!](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6c1d1800885c42e38abd20dce964dfad&_e=ekj4ztoxKfeBsUBmKiiLJTSlpf5OMUkLlUJHXKRoKJRncg1agIuxpUxNn8tc_DSRnZzOIWJk99I4Jm2Nqych-6-oBmuTco_-biuyhAIWrRKgwB6nv1_QDjauHEDubU83dttVmR4yg82vBXX4Fh3wC6Q6NcJ4ZWS2E-iBwSWHKveMFkWrx6wCRbvvT8K-CEldcTLBU6AT0QPOYvsnW-hvow%3D%3D)

Instead of being a Fake News victim — sign up today for a **FREE** newsletter called [_The Flyover_](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6c1d1800885c42e38abd20dce964dfad&_e=ekj4ztoxKfeBsUBmKiiLJTSlpf5OMUkLlUJHXKRoKJRncg1agIuxpUxNn8tc_DSRB79e2IidHCzjlY_--_wspmq4fDDzYLUFdvjNsiaSQhJxs3LMTIxxWaol_2SL1QPf_jCDObodZhFEzAx4jw3XVMvJGb_3xS0AXkZOcnyR5APMPkULqdLpQcJrzTz_YHbd7Uve1pxI-gHXuZiLuJOYfw%3D%3D). Without the hidden agenda, slant, or bias, our talented team of editors dig through hundreds of sources and pull out the most important news of the day - so you don't have to. Get informed on breaking news, politics, business, sports, world affairs, science, technology, and many other topics with a single email - a 5-minute read, once-a-day - delivered directly to your email inbox.

You know it's bad when half of the American people decided national news organizations simply want to mislead, misinform, and push biased opinions on the American public.

This massive shift happening in the American Media is a good thing. The corporate elite news media has lost the trust of the American people.

Don't don't get left behind & miss this EXCLUSIVE opportunity to sign up for FREE today.

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The truth about America’s Christian heritage
body:
Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a186c1fb3639454ab6951ea0ce172e21&_e=zCMWJINXEbaYNrAsxe_JhSJwhliyaDnJgL2llv2_L1XNrlxW7omN8zQbsUJmTTuN_fPlGfL59VAFmvoKaIqbrCXKTf3D0LSTBwDvqiXyidzzz_J92B4yWVC9iBOFOqhp5hJWq1aE-MOGFzHCcSNmuD12Se-DFfAeVqC7o2In5bfYX7VUn4VaVlUG9SAYXOsloBHX23VX2Ru-v4ndw5-I1Hw31xV4nfLMYN7oygdL47vGC_agfwaEZXHafv7F5ME2PCMMBj3eLG7K44zE5aLJsftv5rd-U741mjpTVk_KiOvaP2a7nJq6v3hCksctqop1NzNUZBJCeiJLTT1dcSKUsUTryOYaAQ_ivoZKhne4pAYmDAYKnXXT2KhpEGrbPcXunsty4x0TC-r4b4-1Gs-Ndw%3D%3D)
---
Hello, Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different. Our nation was founded on Christian principles, and the founders wanted our government to uphold those principles.

I've written a book whose title boldly declares what I know to be true: _America Is a Christian Nation_. Many would dispute that claim, but my book provides evidence for this truth using the very words and actions of the founders themselves. The book is a short read, accompanied by beautiful patriotic photos that I think you'll appreciate.
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a186c1fb3639454ab6951ea0ce172e21&_e=zCMWJINXEbaYNrAsxe_JhSJwhliyaDnJgL2llv2_L1XNrlxW7omN8zQbsUJmTTuN_fPlGfL59VAFmvoKaIqbrCXKTf3D0LSTBwDvqiXyidzzz_J92B4yWVC9iBOFOqhp5hJWq1aE-MOGFzHCcSNmuD12Se-DFfAeVqC7o2In5bfYX7VUn4VaVlUG9SAYXOsloBHX23VX2Ru-v4ndw5-I1Hw31xV4nfLMYN7oygdL47vGC_agfwaEZXHafv7F5ME2K1j3v6d3jEUhN8PQHIJXjjTT59ajuublYZLFEcoyEEOVT3r7Jyeya1tB6O4xWGY8KitjOBo-yk9h5dCRO54JJyPdnzZhKfUJyqFcuNhotWmywXHhsCEZeU59xMIDiqA-6pnR-HB-Lmac4LbNXd5mXw%3D%3D)
---
| | I would love for you to read this book and discover the truth about our nation's Christian heritage. As a token of appreciation for any gift you can make to Pathway to Victory today, we'll send you a copy of the book. You can secure your copy by donating here: [https://ptv.org/donate/america-is-a-christian-nation-by-dr-robert-jeffress/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a186c1fb3639454ab6951ea0ce172e21&_e=zCMWJINXEbaYNrAsxe_JhSJwhliyaDnJgL2llv2_L1XNrlxW7omN8zQbsUJmTTuN_fPlGfL59VAFmvoKaIqbrCXKTf3D0LSTBwDvqiXyidzzz_J92B4yWVC9iBOFOqhp5hJWq1aE-MOGFzHCcSNmuD12Se-DFfAeVqC7o2In5bfYX7VUn4VaVlUG9SAYXOsloBHX23VX2Ru-v4ndw5-I1Hw31xV4nfLMYN7oygdL47vGC_agfwaEZXHafv7F5ME2eiBrU371_uCPppAXCOkXQ2u96oCq6rV4fSP2EBNNK_vo6RyspYrLjweLti4NUmVRNgn1ILC42cI3fxu63-1mlwP53V6O4x-ejLdk3knY_iS24_JfC7uj0zlMLQxSfYJSy95mcB5sdOqohjOTm0qy7Q%3D%3D)

Your donation will be matched dollar-for-dollar thanks to a $500,000 matching challenge that ends on July 4th.

As believers, we must preserve America's unique heritage and fight for our religious freedoms. By understanding our nation's Christian roots, we can work to bring our country back to its founding principles. At the end of my book, I provide suggestions for how to do just that.

I hope you'll consider donating to _Pathway to Victory_ and receiving your copy of _America Is a Christian Nation_ so you can know without a doubt that the foundation of our country was solidly established in the principles of the Bible.

Gratefully,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

clean_body: | | | | We need your help! Tammy Baldwin, Democratic Senator from Wisconsin, is up for re-election and she is polling only 1% ahead of her likely opponent, Mike Gallagher. = This is critical. We have to hold on to the Senate and keep Mitch McConnell's hands off the gavel. Tammy is fighting for you and me, but she needs our help. = = Right now the GOP is working to recruit Congressman Mike Gallagher; a man who voted to eviscerate the Affordable Care Act, voted to protect Donald Trump in BOTH impeachments, and voted in favor of just about every anti-abortion measure he's seen. Mike Gallagher is wrong for Wisconsin. Mike Gallagher is wrong for the U.S. Senate. That is why we need to help Tammy Baldwin fight to stay in the U.S. Senate. Tammy Baldwin is a health care champion who helped catapult the Affordable Cares Act into law. She stands up for abortion rights. And she is committed to doing what's right for Wisconsinites, and every American. = Tammy and I are fighting every day to make our country a better place. But it's up to you and me and our grassroots movement to make sure she can keep up the fight. Onward! name: Andy Beshear for Governor
subject: Kentucky is the best place to do business
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Site Selection Magazine named Kentucky as #1 in the south-central region for their 2023 Prosperity Cup. Exciting news, Peter.

**_Site Selection Magazine_ named Kentucky as #1 in the south-central region—jumping ahead of Tennessee and Texas—for their 2023 Prosperity Cup, which ranks state-level economic development competitiveness.**

This ranking reinforces what we already knew — under Andy Beshear’s leadership Kentucky is the best place to do business. And it's not shocking to see why _Site Selection Magazine_ ranked us #1. Since Andy took office, Kentucky has:

🔹 Achieved the **longest** period of the **lowest unemployment rate** in its history

🔹 Had its **two best economic years** on record

🔹 Become the **electric vehicle battery capital** of the United States

🔹 And secured more than **850 private-sector new location and expansion projects,** and created **54,000 new jobs!**

It's clear: Kentucky's economy is on fire. Andy is continuing to work every day to strengthen our economy and create good-paying jobs — and he needs your support to keep up the good work.

[**Peter, we're grateful to have you on this team to re-elect Andy and build on the progress he's making for our Commonwealth. If you can, will you chip in now to help Andy win this race in November so he can continue growing Kentucky's economy?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64534085/410391075/907170691?refcode=em23_230608_econac_fndd_gq_act___abfg_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230608_econac_fndd_gq_act___abfg_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=5e029cf8-2606-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTAyOWNmOC0yNjA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oSyrDDzb955YjRCH1Wu8ULXIc8TVxbNuhg4svFp_G3I=)

body:
Thanks to a little-known IRS loophole...

| **“Amazon Loophole” could hand you $28,544 in “royalty” payouts** [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9brujthk8f2ch5kuraoau36er0o9c49f0qql40g_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9hm8or6clh2bs) Thanks to a little-known IRS loophole... Regular Americans can **collect up to $28,544 (or more)** in payouts from what Brad Thomas calls the “Amazon secret royalty program...” And the best part is, there are:
* NO age or income requirements... (It’s available to anyone 18+ or older)
* NO employment requirements... (You can be working part-time, full-time, or even be retired)
* And you NEVER have to shop or sell a single product on Amazon... (It only takes 5 minutes to set up!)

ICYMI: Chris Christie’s Contribution | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e0be145f1ffc/what-they-are-saying-about-chris-christie-13528889?e=d0a9afa930)
