**In Case You Missed It:
Chris Christie’s Contribution
From: **[**The Dispat** ch](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=878ce47d41&e=d0a9afa930) _“[Christie’s] The One GOP Candidate Willing To Deliver The Full Indictment.”_

|
---
**The Dispatch
Jonah Goldberg
June 7, 2023**

... “From the dawn of the Trump age, I’ve argued that the GOP has been full of ‘closet normals,’ or people who know that Trump is unfit for the job but refuse to say so publicly or do anything about it. Well, that’s not Christie anymore. Most of the candidates are running as closet normals, willing to put a toe or maybe a whole foot outside the door. Christie is running fully out of the closet.
“Think of it this way: Imagine if Christie were willing to let me vent my frustrations at him and I did so, reading him the riot act. And he responded, ‘Okay, what do you think I should do about it?’ I might say something like, ‘tell the truth about the guy’ or ‘go after him full-tilt.’ Well, he’s doing that. I don’t know if it’s mostly penance or ambition—I have to assume it’s both—but he’s the one GOP candidate willing to deliver the full indictment. ...
“I should also say, he’s really good at it. You can tell he knows how to talk to a jury. Whether talking to voters like they’re jury members is effective for getting votes is debatable. But, man, his indictment of the grifting nature of the Trumps was great.
“One last thing. In his announcement last night, Christie did a very long riff on ‘Big versus Small.’ Our politics today focus on small things, small ideas, small grievances, etc. ‘All throughout our history, there have been moments where we’ve had to choose between big and small,’ he said. ‘I will tell you, the reason I’m here tonight is because this is one of those moments.’ ...”
-###-

name: Our Revolution
subject: Look out your window. The climate crisis is here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

As smoke produces dangerous air quality on
the east coast, it's more apparent than ever that the climate crisis is
here, and there will be hell to pay for our society's greedy refusal to
confront reality.

President Biden has failed to take needed action, approving more drilling
permits than Donald Trump and greenlighting disastrous new oil drilling in
Alaska.

Even worse, Biden just caved to Joe Manchin and allowed a new pipeline in
West Virginia that will destroy the area and accelerate the climate
crisis.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8701?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230608_FR_Climate_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Climate&t=1011&akid=4355%2E5885482%2E0jtX_9 ]That's why we need your help. Can we count on you to support our work
to demand that Democrats follow the science to address the climate crisis
instead of just following the money?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to
Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8702?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230608_FR_Climate_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Climate&t=1012&akid=4355%2E5885482%2E0jtX_9 ]CHIP IN $10 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8703?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230608_FR_Climate_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Climate&t=1013&akid=4355%2E5885482%2E0jtX_9 ]CHIP IN $18 NOW »
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8704?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230608_FR_Climate_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Climate&t=1014&akid=4355%2E5885482%2E0jtX_9 ]CHIP IN $27 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8705?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230608_FR_Climate_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Climate&t=1015&akid=4355%2E5885482%2E0jtX_9 ]CHIP IN $100 NOW »
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8706?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230608_FR_Climate_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Climate&t=1016&akid=4355%2E5885482%2E0jtX_9 ]CHIP IN $250 NOW » [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8701?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230608_FR_Climate_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Climate&t=1017&akid=4355%2E5885482%2E0jtX_9 ]CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT »

Working with our allies in the Congressional Progressive Caucus, Our
Revolution generated thousands of calls to Members of Congress, calling on
them to strip Manchin's pipeline and environmental rollbacks from the
bill.

Unfortunately, it wasn't enough, but our mission is too important to stop
now. That’s why we’re rallying today in DC, urging Biden to stop the
pipeline, and why we’re gearing up for the climate fights to come.

Big Oil and the right wing will have more opportunities to roll back
environmental protections in the coming months.They will try to use the
Farm Bill, The National Defense Authorization Act and the Budget Bill to
get more giveaways at the expense of our people and planet.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8701?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230608_FR_Climate_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Climate&t=1018&akid=4355%2E5885482%2E0jtX_9 ]We need your help now to grow and support our group of climate
champions inside and outside of Congress. Chip in here to help us fight
the fossil fuel industry every step of the way!

When we organize, we win!

Our Revolution

name: Patton Oswalt
subject: About that smoke…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
What we're seeing right now is unprecedented.

| I'm Patton Oswalt, Virginia born and bred, and I don't remember growing up with skies this heavy with smoke, do you? _**What we're seeing right now is unprecedented.**_

Swaths of Canadian forest are ablaze, and the resulting smoke and haze have infiltrated the air we breathe here in the United States, degrading the air quality from South Carolina to Detroit, all the way up past New York City, which for a little while registered among the very worst air quality. Even the skies over my home state of Virginia are filled with an unsettling haze.

The air we're breathing, the atmosphere we're living in — **_it's not what it used to be_**. But this is not a natural disaster or something we can chalk up to “inclement weather.” This is a predictable result of decades of burning fossil fuels. **_This is the climate crisis_**.

These are dark times, literally for many of us, but we still have so much reason to be hopeful – the science says that we still have time to change course and avoid the worst effects of the climate crisis. [_**That’s why I’m asking you to join me in supporting the Jane Fonda Climate PAC with a contribution of any amount so they can elect leaders who will do the hard work it will take to end the era of fossil fuels before it’s too late.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64535227/410392924/-309595052?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230608-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ5YjU3YmFhLTI3MDYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ESBCDoq2ruKCF5iQDlw5ddI26tYVOWq_9Hxl1HrkXKo=)

clean_body: What we're seeing right now is unprecedented. | I'm Patton Oswalt, Virginia born and bred, and I don't remember growing up with skies this heavy with smoke, do you? What we're seeing right now is unprecedented. Swaths of Canadian forest are ablaze, and the resulting smoke and haze have infiltrated the air we breathe here in the United States, degrading the air quality from South Carolina to Detroit, all the way up past New York City, which for a little while registered among the very worst air quality. Even the skies over my home state of Virginia are filled with an unsettling haze. The air we're breathing, the atmosphere we're living in — it's not what it used to be. But this is not a natural disaster or something we can chalk up to “inclement weather.” This is a predictable result of decades of burning fossil fuels. This is the climate crisis. These are dark times, literally for many of us, but we still have so much reason to be hopeful – the science says that we still have time to change course and avoid the worst effects of the climate crisis. = | | | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = The solutions to this crisis are within reach, but the people in power in this country are choosing to ignore them for the sake of their fossil fuel industry allies. This is why the work of the Jane Fonda Climate PAC is crucial – they are committed to supporting candidates who will do more than pay lip service to the climate crisis with bandaid solutions. In the next few weeks, Jane’s team will be reaching out to announce a slate of climate champions they’re supporting in Virginia this year, with more local and state races across the country to follow. Every ounce of fossil fuels we burn contributes to the climate crisis, whether in Virginia, New York, or San Antonio, TX. name: Sara (personal)
subject: What National Pride Month really means
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Hi friends,
Happy National Pride Month! And since San Diego celebrates Pride in July, I consider it a happy Pride season !
Pride is about celebrating the resilient spirit of the LGBTQ+ community while also continuing to demand justice, equality, and dignity. It’s about creating safety and allowing our loved ones in this community a moment of respite in an endless state of vigilance.
For my siblings, Pride is about expanding what it means to live openly and authentically. It’s a daily invitation to be seen, to be heard, to be loved, in the hopes that one more heart might soften.
Pride is a celebration, to be sure. But, it’s so much more than the parades, the rainbow flag-bedazzled t-shirts, and colorful corporate logos splashed across social media. It’s a celebration of the capacity for hope, even when faced with daily reminders of the fight ahead.
It’s a yearly reminder that so many people have fought long and hard for the right to simply exist - to love freely and openly, and to have access to the same rights and protections under the law as everyone else.
It's a chance to reflect on the fact that bigotry will continue to shapeshift and spread if we let it - and how, at this very moment, trans and gender non-conforming Americans are being targeted by cruel and hateful legislation in statehouses all over the country.
Pride is a powerful protest rooted in our shared history of resilience and resistance. From the Stonewall riots that ignited the modern LGBTQ+ rights movement, to the assassination of local hero Harvey Milk, to the long-ignored suffering this community endured by our government’s inaction in the early days of the AIDS epidemic. That resistance and resilience are borne out of necessity - there is no other way.
All this is to say that even with all the progress we’ve made, even with the joy and cheer that Pride Month brings out in all of us, we have to remain vigilant. My siblings and all LGBTQ+ individuals deserve to live authentically and without fear of discrimination - and I hope you’ll be with us, side by side, in this fight, not just for a month or a season, but every day of the year.
Thanks for reading.
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: First, then, now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
Friend — Elissa Slotkin here.
I'm the Congresswoman and former national security officer running for the open Senate seat in Michigan.
My race could be the deciding factor in whether Democrats maintain the majority and, if elected, I would be the youngest Democratic woman in the Senate.
And this race is off to a busy start: my team has received so much back-to-back news this month that it can be hard to keep it all straight. So let us lay it out plain and simple for you has received so much back-to-back news this month that it can be hard to keep it all straight. So let us lay it out plain and simple for you:
FIRST: Politico reported that the Vice Chair of the New York Stock Exchange is considering running for the Senate seat in Michigan.
THEN: The National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC) launched their first attack ad against me, over 500 days away from the 2024 elections.
NOW: CNN just named Michigan as one of the 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2024.
So to put it all together: Our race is being watched as one of the most likely to flip, it’s clear that National Republicans are monitoring this race closely, and they just got a self-funding candidate with deep ties to Wall Street.
All of this spells out a lot of early trouble for our campaign. The best way we can prepare to fight back against their endless attack and seemingly empty pockets is with some grassroots support of our own. So what do you say, friend?
Can you please split a contribution between me and Michael Bennet today? The amount isn't as important as the donation itself, because every one sends a message about the strength of our grassroots campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-slotkin?refcode=X_060823_SlotkinTandem_act]

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64536993/410394787/1924984212?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDlmYzZlMGYtMjkwNi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=j08RfHWHuw5OLbf2gHcOcXKebXGIqTDwHJY_v984430=)
Friend,

**I recently launched my campaign to unseat David Schweikert in Arizona's 1st District.**

I want to share more about why I believe we're in a strong position to flip this seat. But first, I want to tell you my story and why I'm in this race. **[I hope you'll read this entire message, then consider making a donation to help improve lives in AZ-01 and beyond.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64536994/410394789/1924984212?refcode=em-6.8.23-seg1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDlmYzZlMGYtMjkwNi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=j08RfHWHuw5OLbf2gHcOcXKebXGIqTDwHJY_v984430=)**

I'm a first-generation American, and the proud daughter of Cuban immigrants who fled communism looking for a better life for their kids.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64536995/410394791/1924984212?refcode=em-6.8.23-seg1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDlmYzZlMGYtMjkwNi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=j08RfHWHuw5OLbf2gHcOcXKebXGIqTDwHJY_v984430=)
We were brought up humbly. Sometimes my dad worked two jobs to make ends meet. But for whatever we may have lacked, my parents made up for by instilling strong values -- fairness, hard work, and that family is everything.

I came to Arizona in the 1980s to continue my career in broadcast journalism. It's where I got my start exposing corruption and holding the powerful accountable. And it's where I met the love of my life, Grant Woods, and raised our five children together.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64536996/410394798/1924984212?refcode=em-6.8.23-seg1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDlmYzZlMGYtMjkwNi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=j08RfHWHuw5OLbf2gHcOcXKebXGIqTDwHJY_v984430=)
**Running for Congress wasn't a decision I made lightly, but when I think about why I'm doing this, I think about my family.**

This country gave so much to my parents. They fled Fidel Castro’s dictatorship to come here, and it's now being held hostage by extremists who lie, cheat, and take away our liberties. I think about my kids, and how I never imagined they could grow up in a world where they have _less_ control over their bodies than I did.

I've watched David Schweikert fail the people of Arizona time and time again. He's caved to Donald Trump at every turn and pushed extreme conspiracies that threaten our democracy. To add insult to injury, he's abused his power in Congress for his own personal enrichment.

I couldn’t sit on the sidelines any longer.

**My campaign to unseat David Schweikert is one of the most important races in our effort to take Congress back from the extremists -**** he barely kept his seat by less than a point last year****. Republicans only hold a nine-seat majority in Congress. Arizona’s 1st District is one of just ten GOP-held toss-up seats in the entire country.**

**[If you're with me, become a Founding Donor by chipping in $5, $35, $50 or whatever you can afford. Let's flip this seat and restore some integrity to this district.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64536997/410394799/1924984212?refcode=em-6.8.23-seg1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDlmYzZlMGYtMjkwNi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=j08RfHWHuw5OLbf2gHcOcXKebXGIqTDwHJY_v984430=)**

subject: 24 hours later and I’m glad I announced
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
I’m glad I’m running Hey Peter,

It's been a whirlwind 24 hours since I announced my official candidacy for U.S. Senate against Josh Hawley.

Thanks to the outpouring of support on social media and everyone who became one of our founding donors: **I'm certain my decision to run was the right one.** We're showing Josh Hawley his days of ignoring Missourians are almost over.

**[But to win and bring this campaign past the starting line, people like you need to get involved to help us start making a difference. Can I count on you to join our campaign today to help us build the coalition we'll need to FIRE Josh Hawley in 2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64538867/410395922/-1603316858?ms=em23_230608_lnch3_adv_gq_act___wb_ettx&refcode=em23_230608_lnch3_adv_gq_act___wb_ettx&source=em23_230608_lnch3_adv_gq_act___wb_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230608_lnch3_adv_gq_act___wb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=gGg+p0dP0R0gzszGlM6ZxMxSEn2tqZ1iqfYzWlXmXJA+subWDXSKluB/EpwgAt8MS1p0d1R9riZXSLqI75L/JUsTxM5dscitRhNGFg4GJJmR+a/s0hf381scqPhq/YDLikiByyvR0tsVveBPue/FYGIiit3sWUSVZWjLRAC7mw8=&refcode2=4cc5ae79-2a06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGNjNWFlNzktMmEwNi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xAnAIOZWijcNo26wy5mvvp1VSKn0HVzIeptKrFDC76Q=&emci=c04e5d4b-9d04-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=4cc5ae79-2a06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1020964)**

Washington could learn a lot from the work going on every day in communities across Missouri. Growing up, my family had our ups and downs. But we were close and filled with love. Together, we got through the tough times.

But I believe Missourians deserve leaders who try to help, too. That isn't Josh Hawley. He's in a rush to be famous — too focused on himself to focus on Missouri.

Whether you're a Democrat or Republican, from a small town or a big city, as Missourians and Americans, we need real leadership representing us. That's why I'm running.

**[So I'm asking one more time: If you're tired of politicians like Josh Hawley ignoring people like you, will you add your name TODAY to officially join our grassroots movement to FIRE Hawley?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64538868/410395930/-1603316858?ms=em23_230608_lnch3_adv_gq_act___wb_ettx&refcode=em23_230608_lnch3_adv_gq_act___wb_ettx&source=em23_230608_lnch3_adv_gq_act___wb_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230608_lnch3_adv_gq_act___wb_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=gGg+p0dP0R0gzszGlM6ZxMxSEn2tqZ1iqfYzWlXmXJA+subWDXSKluB/EpwgAt8MS1p0d1R9riZXSLqI75L/JUsTxM5dscitRhNGFg4GJJmR+a/s0hf381scqPhq/YDLikiByyvR0tsVveBPue/FYGIiit3sWUSVZWjLRAC7mw8=&refcode2=4cc5ae79-2a06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGNjNWFlNzktMmEwNi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xAnAIOZWijcNo26wy5mvvp1VSKn0HVzIeptKrFDC76Q=&emci=c04e5d4b-9d04-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=4cc5ae79-2a06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1020964)**

It's clear the people are ready to send Hawley packing, so let's do it together.

Thank you,

Wesley | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64538870/410395932/782375410?refcode=em23_230608_lnch3_adv_gq_act___wb_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230608_lnch3_adv_gq_act___wb_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=4cc5ae79-2a06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGNjNWFlNzktMmEwNi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xAnAIOZWijcNo26wy5mvvp1VSKn0HVzIeptKrFDC76Q=)

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Growing up poor, this country took a chance on me. Now I am asking for you to take a chance on this campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
The things I want in life are not exotic. I think most people feel the same way.

| Peter -

The things I want in life are not exotic. I think most people feel the same way.

I want loving relationships with my family. I want to help my constituents, and I want an America that lives up to its ideals.

Growing up poor, this country took a chance on me.

I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs, to name just two.

Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in Congress.

The truth is, Senator Sinema has been an advocate for the rich and powerful in the Senate.

But those folks have enough advocates there.

It’s the people deciding between groceries and utilities who need help.

That’s why I am running.

But if we’re going to win this race, it is going to take a historic grassroots effort.

I couldn’t get to where I am in life without help. And I can’t win this race either. It’s going to take all of us to win. So I am asking:

[_**Can I count on you to split $10 between Linda Sánchez and our Senate campaign? I would not be asking if it was not so terribly important.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64538976/410396001/-1545654490?refcode=BLU-SAN-20230608-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmM1YWU3OS0yYTA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X85ifbmQMnIBXdafDO491AWiMxjlYHs4fQYsK8YfcHA=)

subject: The Expanded Child Tax Credit (CTC), is an incredible anti-poverty, pro-family, pro-child & pro-middle-class policy. So what did Republicans--who claim to be the saviors of children and families do as soon as they got the chance? They eliminated it, of course
body:
Republicans want to cut this program entirely

| | |

| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. | | | | | Peter, **The Expanded Child Tax Credit (CTC), passed as part of President Biden's American Rescue Plan in 2021, lifted 50% of children below the poverty line out of poverty. **_Let me say that again: 50%._ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7e752dd9-7dc8-414c-bf1e-fe608d2cbb58/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _An incredible anti-poverty, pro-family, pro-child & pro-middle-class policy._ _So what did Republicans--who claim to be the saviors of children and families do as soon as they got the chance? They eliminated it, of course._ **_Now Democratic Congress members are sponsoring the American Family Act, to make the incredible Child Tax Credit, a permanent tax credit._** [**_A key group that fought for the Child Tax Credit successfully in the past, and will tell the stories of working people to help get it passed again, is More Perfect Union. They ensure that the stories of working people and policies that help working people, such as the CTC, are told in the media. Will you join us in giving More Perfect Union $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to fight to make the Child Tax Cut permanent?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcb258baf-d9dc-4761-881c-7b2fa8f94aca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for standing up for American families._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: Team Ro
subject: ICYMI: President Biden can still cancel student debt. Here's how.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

Right now, 45 million Americans are anxiously awaiting clarity on their student loan payments due to a condition in the debt-ceiling negotiations that will end the student loan payment pause on August 30 and the looming Supreme Court case on student loan forgiveness. Resuming these payments in the middle of an affordability crisis will be crushing.

Americans deserve more financial freedom, not less. They deserve the freedom to buy homes and build wealth. They deserve the freedom to pursue their dreams.

The student debt pause is one of the reasons Ro didn’t vote for the McCarthy Debt Deal. We need something better, something bolder.

We need the Khanna Plan—and President Biden must follow it.

Sign the petition: President Biden must follow the Khanna Plan. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/khanna-plan-student-debt-petition?contactdata=dmJAWzeJFAP0OpaS0CYLgktSFrES6PSyF6PLppKHixYYSyOyPQETY479/NoWQ4tmoO6liHa85s6Qzud7I2W+iImkuhLS8olUKjuaZm7SYxDTvE182YhHpy/WYHJ91LKnx8qkiqSFtbIUzrN84stiCA==]

Under the Khanna Plan, we will

* Extend the moratorium on student debt payments.
* Forgive student debt up to $50,000.
* Expand relief programs.

Sign if you agree: The Khanna Plan will revitalize the American Dream. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/khanna-plan-student-debt-petition?contactdata=dmJAWzeJFAP0OpaS0CYLgktSFrES6PSyF6PLppKHixYYSyOyPQETY479/NoWQ4tmoO6liHa85s6Qzud7I2W+iImkuhLS8olUKjuaZm7SYxDTvE182YhHpy/WYHJ91LKnx8qkiqSFtbIUzrN84stiCA==]

President Biden’s promise to cancel student debt helped land him the White House in 2020. He must now invoke his authority and stay true to his promise. He must stand and deliver for hardworking Americans by taking executive action and following the Khanna Plan.

In solidarity,
Team Ro

body:
With Guests Marjorie Taylor Greene and Trent Kelly |

| | Friend,

We hope you will join our guests Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene and Congressman Trent Kelly for our Republican Stump Speakin' event on June 24th at Cedar Hill Farm.

This is a free event for the public and we hope you will join us as we hear form local, regional, and statewide candidates who are on the primary ballot in Mississippi this August.

Here is the lineup:

Robert Foster

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
Biden, Merrick Garland, and the DOJ have set their sights on a new target...| | | Peter \- Joe Biden’s Department of Justice has gone totally rogue. Merrick Garland and the DOJ are up to the same tricks and targeting Republican candidates. **_This time, they are after Jim Justice, a conservative champion and one of the most successful Republican governors in the country._** They know that Joe Manchin is in trouble – the most likely Senate Democrat seat to flip, so they are coming after conservative all-star, Jim Justice.** ** **The time to ACT is now, Peter, and _push back against the corrupted DOJ!_**

[**STAND UP TO THE DOJ >>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=15908781660c43a1931e4c56d5bcf53e&_e=WQICVK35VQUVVuQlCceTtfHeH4kZd8ZSv6s-wQvq1jIIUg5yMosAvqWV6wMCHhRJUPK6d6_CGCkXcOf1kiYljVe0uz_u76EgQe7CbaP0bsIdXeO3Qe6jZe4G50kQA_aqfQjuN0Y1knzODYuuoaOIUCONhBW_IZaKDFxGe4AISco8Xw3zH6RkAvP_kDZdi8p1ejcIFNyG2ylB5Fkq7YnToYnbiv4ClZnHMH8qsQ4VWkeIwP7TYJUAdgqeug-QR-nC-POAJSgxAhtnVELxG4ahImxVyojfFrJLuAZ6x8OuwMdISdo7uHUIvfG4B6m3ONQJuZkFfWyil2jxKmjo1QCUvF_EoNvyZGkhB3tIkdpZ0-qgutExdKLGmD7yaqNCnvOghbPjI8yftFityqHBKBboxJKjxQlLcbP7jtEEaC4shwPFcYMzWcGhE2JCYdfTIuFH)

clean_body: Biden, Merrick Garland, and the DOJ have set their sights on a new target...| | | Peter \- Joe Biden’s Department of Justice has gone totally rogue. Merrick Garland and the DOJ are up to the same tricks and targeting Republican candidates. This time, they are after Jim Justice, a conservative champion and one of the most successful Republican governors in the country. They know that Joe Manchin is in trouble – the most likely Senate Democrat seat to flip, so they are coming after conservative all-star, Jim Justice. The time to ACT is now, Peter, and push back against the corrupted DOJ! Let’s not forget that Biden has weaponized the DOJ before to attack President Trump. With enough support, Republican Senate allies will be able to right these wrongs. They could end the Democrat Witch Hunt against strong conservative leaders. They could impeach Merrick Garland for his political games. They could stall the attempt to reverse all of Trump’s accomplishments. The political attacks are going beyond President Trump. This is a politically motivated strike on Jim Justice and Republicans everywhere. They’re coming for us next. We can’t let them surprise us while we’re waiting like sitting ducks. Act quickly. Act now. | | NAME: PeterEMAIL: | | Thanks, NRSC Rapid Response | | Contributions to the National Republican Senatorial Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Peter,

Freedom of the press has never been so important. At a time when GOP extremists across the nation are attacking journalism and the free press, we need to stand up for journalists and the responsibility of the press to keep the American people well-informed.

**MAGA Republicans have attacked the free press for years. They say every story they don’t like is “fake news” and have no interest in the truth.**

But Seth and Democrats are committed to protecting the free press and ensuring every American has access to truthful, honest, objective reporting about the stories and situations that impact their lives.

[We need to take back the House to block GOP attacks on journalists and the free press. This is about protecting the truth and preserving the Constitution. name: Lucas Kunce
subject: An important personal update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
My wife Marilyn and I welcomed our newborn son this week, almost two months early.
#
Hi Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce reaching out with an important personal update.
**On Monday at 9:47AM, my wife Marilyn delivered our newborn son, Harvey.**
7 weeks early. 3.3 lbs. An emergency c-section. I didn’t think I could be more amazed by Marilyn’s resilience — she started working as a kid to help her family survive, came to a new country for opportunity with no money and no friends, and became a successful professional at an environmental non-profit — but witnessing her strength, love, and fortitude during Harvey’s first couple of days in the NICU and her recovery has been incredible.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33916?refcode=em20230608-3236&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3236%2E614464%2EqypTh5)
Marilyn is recovering faster than expected and, for the most part, Harvey is doing well. He still has some time to spend in the NICU, but he is proving to be just as feisty as his mom and getting stronger every day.
Everything that happened this week has reminded me more than ever that the campaign we’re building here in Missouri isn’t about personal ambition or getting into office — it’s about making sure families like yours and mine are ok.
It’s about making sure we have a health care system where mothers — especially women of color like Marilyn — in Missouri, a state with one of the highest maternal mortality rates in the country, are safe in childbirth.
It’s about making sure people like me and you can have kids and afford to provide for our families afterwards without getting burdened by medical bills — like the ones that forced my own family into bankruptcy growing up.
And it’s about fighting for a Missouri where we can raise our children to live and thrive for generations with strong communities, opportunities, and good pay.
So yes, I’m running for U.S. Senate. But for my family, I still need to be the most attentive father and husband I can be — especially during this time.
That’s why I’m asking for your help, Peter.
Over the next few weeks, I won’t be able to make as many calls as I usually would to raise our campaign money during this end-of-quarter push — and there’s a real chance that if we don’t make up for it in online donations, our total fundraising number could take a serious hit.
I'm asking you to help me now so that I'm not in a position where I have to choose between spending time with Marilyn and Harvey when they need me and raising the resources to defeat Josh Hawley for all of us. With your help, we can do both.
**Supporters like you have always had my back — and now I’m counting on you to be there for me again.[So please, will you help my campaign stay on track while I take some time to be a father by chipping in $10, $25, or whatever you can afford today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33916?refcode=em20230608-3236&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3236%2E614464%2EqypTh5)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33917?refcode=em20230608-3236&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=3236%2E614464%2EqypTh5) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33917?refcode=em20230608-3236&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=3236%2E614464%2EqypTh5) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33917?refcode=em20230608-3236&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=3236%2E614464%2EqypTh5) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33917?refcode=em20230608-3236&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=3236%2E614464%2EqypTh5) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33917?refcode=em20230608-3236&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=3236%2E614464%2EqypTh5) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33917?refcode=em20230608-3236&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=3236%2E614464%2EqypTh5) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/33916?refcode=em20230608-3236&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=3236%2E614464%2EqypTh5)
---
Josh Hawley hasn’t done a thing to make Missouri better for parents and our children — from refusing to raise wages so we can take care of our families to voting against health care to even using his own position and power to control the lives of everyday people all across our state.
These issues are personal to me, just like they are to you. And I’m proud to be fighting for all of us in this race for U.S. Senate.
Thank you so much for having my back, Peter.
Talk soon,
Lucas

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230608-3236-footer&t=10&refcode2=3236_614464_qypTh5&akid=3236%2E614464%2EqypTh5)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=3236%2E614464%2EqypTh5). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

These issues are personal to me, just like they are to you. And I’m proud to be fighting for all of us in this race for U.S. Senate. Thank you so much for having my back, Peter. Talk soon, Lucas | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

name: Kash Patel
subject: New J6 Choir song with Donald Trump
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvc2ikt6svhlfrapvogfke1hm2nlfkefe6sfojtg_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9hm2pj4cth2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpge537dk28m3t4sb70f28172i9t16f15rvsji1o_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9hm2pj4cth2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zshrjjlebvqi3t29ofnlufkgdbjr3sl975ubgvv8_rp22sh2s8i66o73c9hm2pj4cth2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

name: John Fetterman
subject: Bob’s map
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
It’s going to take a whole lot of us to win this thing.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=133%2E552475%2ELJyCcD)
Peter, trust me: nobody knows the PA map like Bob Casey.
On Election Day 2022, he used his map to walk folks through the results coming in from counties across PA as our team won a historic victory + sent me to the Senate.
But now, Bob Casey is the one running in one of the most competitive + expen$ive battleground races in 2024.
So his team is going to cover a brand-new map of Pennsylvania with the names of supporters like you from top to bottom, to keep PA blue! 🔵 🔵 🔵
**[Can you chip in any amount to add your name to the PA map in Bob Casey’s campaign office?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230608-1?refcode=em20230608-1&refcode2=133_552475_LJyCcD&akid=133%2E552475%2ELJyCcD)**
**[Get On The Map ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230608-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230608-1&refcode2=133_552475_LJyCcD&akid=133%2E552475%2ELJyCcD)**
Peter, it’s going to take a whole lot of us working together to win this thing for my friend Bob Casey. We’re going to show up allllllll over the map to protect our narrow Democratic majority in the Senate.
Let’s do this. **[If you make a donation right now, Bob Casey’s hardworking team will write your name on the map — so let’s cover up all of PA with yinz + youse guys’ names.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230608-1?refcode=em20230608-1&refcode2=133_552475_LJyCcD&akid=133%2E552475%2ELJyCcD)**

Seriously, THANK YOU!!
❤️ John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator, Pennsylvania

body:
We will keep proving the naysayers wrong. We will keep showing what it looks like to make our government work for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected. Are you with us? | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64551698/410438118/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ14G_ENG_E_20230608_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzYyNDc4Zi01MDA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PyQDlV5srEfGaY93dMgIcBdtKW_D7EbGD2UecoCX1iU=&emci=f662478f-5006-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=f762478f-5006-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)

Right now, it’s crucial that Elizabeth has a strong grassroots movement by her side. Through the years, many pundits and naysayers have said that her plans — like creating a government agency to protect consumers from financial scams, passing a new tax on massive corporate profits, and getting student debt cancellation to the president's desk — are impossible. But we proved them wrong, and with strength in our numbers, we're going to keep it up. [**So, will you please add your name to say you personally endorse Elizabeth’s re-election campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64551699/410438119/-542630242?refcode=EMZ14G_ENG_E_20230608_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzYyNDc4Zi01MDA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PyQDlV5srEfGaY93dMgIcBdtKW_D7EbGD2UecoCX1iU=&emci=f662478f-5006-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=f762478f-5006-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908) | [**ENDORSE ELIZABETH**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64551700/410438120/-542630242?refcode=EMZ14G_ENG_E_20230608_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzYyNDc4Zi01MDA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PyQDlV5srEfGaY93dMgIcBdtKW_D7EbGD2UecoCX1iU=&emci=f662478f-5006-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=f762478f-5006-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)
---
Elizabeth dedicated her career to studying how working families in America are getting squeezed.
And in 2008, when Wall Street crashed the economy and millions of American families lost their jobs, their homes, and their savings, she went to Washington. Alongside a grassroots movement, she took on the big banks, fighting to create a government agency called the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau. And she beat them.
Elizabeth knows that the plans we’re fighting for today — policies that will tackle different pieces of how the rules have been rigged against working people — CAN happen, when we fight for them together.
We will keep proving the naysayers wrong. We will keep showing what it looks like to make our government work for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected. Are you with us?
[**Please click here to add your name to say you support Elizabeth’s re-election and the plans that we’re fighting for.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64551701/410438121/-542630242?refcode=EMZ14G_ENG_E_20230608_V1S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzYyNDc4Zi01MDA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PyQDlV5srEfGaY93dMgIcBdtKW_D7EbGD2UecoCX1iU=&emci=f662478f-5006-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=f762478f-5006-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9027908)

clean_body: We will keep proving the naysayers wrong. We will keep showing what it looks like to make our government work for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected. Are you with us? | | | Right now, it’s crucial that Elizabeth has a strong grassroots movement by her side. Through the years, many pundits and naysayers have said that her plans — like creating a government agency to protect consumers from financial scams, passing a new tax on massive corporate profits, and getting student debt cancellation to the president's desk — are impossible. But we proved them wrong, and with strength in our numbers, we're going to keep it up. | Elizabeth dedicated her career to studying how working families in America are getting squeezed. And in 2008, when Wall Street crashed the economy and millions of American families lost their jobs, their homes, and their savings, she went to Washington. Alongside a grassroots movement, she took on the big banks, fighting to create a government agency called the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau. And she beat them. Elizabeth knows that the plans we’re fighting for today — policies that will tackle different pieces of how the rules have been rigged against working people — CAN happen, when we fight for them together. We will keep proving the naysayers wrong. We will keep showing what it looks like to make our government work for everyone, not just the wealthy and well-connected. Are you with us? Thanks for being a part of Team Warren 2024, Team Warren = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2023 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

body:
It’s about fighting for our Northeast Ohio community and the hardworking people who make it feel like home.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64543498/410402608/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.08_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODQzNThjNy0yZjA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AifsUyuVTE0J9zTHherOseM485Ygp_idkNPBlx0SBKs=)
Hi Peter, it’s Emilia.

**Our campaign is about so much more than just keeping OH-13 blue. It’s about fighting for our Northeast Ohio community and the hardworking people who make it feel like home.**

But these days, an essential part of fighting for our community includes ensuring the dangerous, out-of-touch Republican agenda – _an extreme agenda that endangers our community, prioritizes politics over people, and falls far out-of-line with our values_ – stays far away from OH-13.

Look, we are a community of people who want to safeguard our jobs and bolster economic opportunity in Northeast Ohio, not eliminate jobs here at home and ship them overseas.

We are a community of people who want to ensure our Seniors receive the hard-earned benefits and healthcare they deserve, not gut Social Security and Medicare.

We are a community of people who want to protect our environment and preserve access to clean drinking water, not give handouts to Big Oil and polluters who will contaminate our air and water.

And we are a community of people who want more personal freedoms, not less.

**Peter, I vow to always put our Northeast Ohio community first. And I can confidently say that I’m the only candidate in this race prepared to do just that.**

[**But in a district as competitive as ours, I’m going to need your help to ensure I can stay fighting and delivering for OH-13 in Washington. That’s why I have to ask: Can I count on you to chip in $5, $25, or whatever makes sense for you to help keep me in the fight for our community?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64543499/410402609/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.08_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODQzNThjNy0yZjA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AifsUyuVTE0J9zTHherOseM485Ygp_idkNPBlx0SBKs=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64543500/410402610/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.08_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODQzNThjNy0yZjA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AifsUyuVTE0J9zTHherOseM485Ygp_idkNPBlx0SBKs=) | [$25 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64543501/410402611/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.08_b1_es_all-nd&amount=25&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODQzNThjNy0yZjA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AifsUyuVTE0J9zTHherOseM485Ygp_idkNPBlx0SBKs=)

Thank you for being in this fight with me,

Emilia

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

| | Team,

**How can democracy endure in America if our kids don’t learn to think critically about our nation’s past and present, and to respect each other despite their differences?**

Day in and day out, right wing politicians are trying to limit what our children are allowed to read and to learn. They are being taught that knowledge is _not_ power.

Recent book banning campaigns by right-wing extremists in Roxbury and Bernards Township have **placed New Jersey on the front lines of defending freedom of expression in the United States.**

That’s why we’re here. Districts for Democracy is determined to protect our kids and our schools from partisan culture wars and extremism. name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Ronchetti?=
subject: dangerous new laws in NM!
body:
Peter we have to protect kids and parental rights.. | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d3b3f45b1b&e=567664f14c)
**Have you heard about the new laws in New Mexico that could tear families apart and leave children to make life-altering decisions on their own?**

If not, we highly recommend you tune in to the latest episode of the [**No Doubt About It Podcast**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=e814646ced&e=567664f14c)with Mark and Krysty Ronchetti.
| [WATCH EPISODE 10 ON YOUTUBE](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=b0750539ea&e=567664f14c)
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=1e2105cf4b&e=567664f14c)
---
| **In this episode,** we have the privilege of speaking with Jodi Hendricks from the New Mexico Family Action Movement and Myke Peterson from Freedom Families United, both of whom are working tirelessly to combat these controversial bills.
---
➡ [**WATCH NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=2adb63c15f&e=567664f14c)

Together, we explore Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham's new laws that allow minors access to **sex change care and abortions without parental knowledge or consent.**

During our conversation, you'll gain valuable insights into the potential long-term consequences of such legislation and the importance of standing up to protect our children. Furthermore, we delve into the undercover work conducted by Freedom Families United as they expose grooming and hidden agendas in public schools.
➡ [**WATCH NOW**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=c1bae1a0be&e=567664f14c)**
**
Whether you're a parent, a concerned citizen, or someone interested in staying informed about what's happening in our schools and legislative systems, this episode is a must-listen.

The conversation is eye-opening and sheds light on the fight for parental rights and children’s health, as well as the power of the Referendum Project in New Mexico.
| [WATCH EPISODE 10 ON YOUTUBE](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=eb9db078a0&e=567664f14c)
---
To show your support and stay updated with the No Doubt About It Podcast, we encourage you to like, subscribe, and [**donate at our website.**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=39a85f4287&e=567664f14c)**
**
Your contributions will enable us to continue bringing important conversations like this to the forefront, making a real difference in the lives of families and children across New Mexico.

Thank you for your time and commitment to protecting our children's well-being. Together, we can make a positive impact.

Sincerely,
Mark and Krysty Ronchetti
|

clean_body: Peter we have to protect kids and parental rights.. | | | | | | Have you heard about the new laws in New Mexico that could tear families apart and leave children to make life-altering decisions on their own? If not, we highly recommend you tune in to the latest episode of the Mark and Krysty Ronchetti. | | | | | | | | | | | In this episode, we have the privilege of speaking with Jodi Hendricks from the New Mexico Family Action Movement and Myke Peterson from Freedom Families United, both of whom are working tirelessly to combat these controversial bills. ➡ Together, we explore Governor Michelle Lujan Grisham's new laws that allow minors access to sex change care and abortions without parental knowledge or consent. During our conversation, you'll gain valuable insights into the potential long-term consequences of such legislation and the importance of standing up to protect our children. Furthermore, we delve into the undercover work conducted by Freedom Families United as they expose grooming and hidden agendas in public schools. ➡ Whether you're a parent, a concerned citizen, or someone interested in staying informed about what's happening in our schools and legislative systems, this episode is a must-listen. The conversation is eye-opening and sheds light on the fight for parental rights and children’s health, as well as the power of the Referendum Project in New Mexico. | To show your support and stay updated with the No Doubt About It Podcast, we encourage you to like, subscribe, and Your contributions will enable us to continue bringing important conversations like this to the forefront, making a real difference in the lives of families and children across New Mexico. Thank you for your time and commitment to protecting our children's well-being. Together, we can make a positive impact. Sincerely, Mark and Krysty Ronchetti | Follow Us on YouTube Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter! | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | | © 2023 Choose Adventure Media. All rights reserved.

subject: Will you join Annie in taking a stand for Pride?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THEIR FUTURE PAC
body:
| | | If you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GLNp5FjRArZ2gECnWf63UZWzcCuYR-Es9PjYmAXR4JxZbuH_t8O228MjZNOxN7Lm2WoL5eKG3lZx13kI8WltFNG733fe2DQK8jQfh9yHLDbrT2-qtBuWxvMSUfCiNeWdWWNA61nPi5z0PwVRdO4SHqk9AOsY1IPXy5eQsvH173IhI33IYS07PuuXLLIYFSYVabr-r-_9znVGo_c2wlJwDSh9t7iHXAqSW5dOHgXS1TtuXFcF6vTwhwzdSSTsqXAhS5IykiAo04k9b0UbDdEER0vTp6TYDRr3OmZxOyA2cR4zpeRJpnwKFZw9DzFOz0h_LGDT88NZJgD91FG1eq5Cp2ixFm7CAVRIfR5E6Q2E7u7C-qur3pTmXjkBInZgvoPiXHJcJjFEMvbG3QgoCNSlGzbdQs8R5FU8vAoRZ8znL-1xD3ol13GzqozMNihDMVu2rri8A0a9t_h4C3xOMgpZGOg/3wv/4FXNfmXFTauFkzRc4BdKdA/h0/sBxHl0N3JdRydTvlIfUgj0BGpFVNcGI5io2gh2sQCtU) | | Start writing! For Pride Month, Annie wants you to help write letters to state representatives and demand they stop attacking trans kids. **_[Click here to start writing and read Annie’s original note below:](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk2aPz0xx7qbPDkb_Dorpgpvl-pW8pr-kr_dPDju_oj4on1S3Ww0jpn1Qv3toZY4m8IfAAup3MQGuQR-V9H5tTc84mqFmdwqR4van4DGF_VjdwdJ3IUhmq4E3STC-7MRaRLL8lGHQRPkkM6fPI7BWeGy_C3KJnaX37Rn7XrCTa6iq9kTCTxWeOWWZTAi0NGqOZvRSkCC9a3tmQ6R1JPwfLP5f3X-LA9wSPtsmq_2Plb9A_Fy4RZUWUy0FOZY7s2glAHZH6IU5YWSmMPdwREJbAeDb_ANrlzfq1EEKfUCeE8IzPdy0kGv4INd_TmU_h7baB_EnqIPNQGGqOtDudH7YUg7PMcn2z-iuHdKUZR_POvCZb5wne9oOQBOKzq2eVdflU/3wv/4FXNfmXFTauFkzRc4BdKdA/h1/fsyxzCEHAxL-ttdJTLb8jR2APTTAd1sme5vhBSLGo1Q)_**

* * *

June is Pride Month and I want to take this time to talk to you about why we all should care about the attacks taking place against trans kids.

Practicing pediatric medicine, this issue is critical to me. I’ll never forget walking into a patient room a few years ago to meet a teenage boy who had been admitted for attempting to kill himself. He was transgender and his parents didn’t support his gender identity. While he waited for a bed to be available at an inpatient psychiatric hospital, he suffered more intrusive thoughts, believing everyone would be happier if he was gone.

This isn’t an uncommon story. This is why I’m asking you to join me in writing a letter to our state reps to demand they stop targeting trans kids with hateful legislation. **_[Click here to start writing.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk2aPz0xx7qbPDkb_Dorpgpvl-pW8pr-kr_dPDju_oj4on1S3Ww0jpn1Qv3toZY4m8IfAAup3MQGuQR-V9H5tTc84mqFmdwqR4van4DGF_VjfNp5-VrZJGwb3CWYiCZETlSJHZ0IzpwUO-_9a-ZdWu0dGcEHvG0uReOFB_-zQ4bv126taRlpV4acKn_YXDadda7BGeXmvkrMk_2bn1xrclcpE7J9hjBzQFomnFzDX2uLJC6jt6Fi7tFoBVzaCKFddJqPk8rceRIhkgIdYB80CUEYiyjjNWuShXVLOfHSEJrNp_6M_2pGzp2yjtKT53dDCn-vMpAJJnlgW7qT1RRj56DSHv1s9YA_eKPUXrMvOQktVRL_JXX5ubBKAD9bA9LHKI/3wv/4FXNfmXFTauFkzRc4BdKdA/h2/oLM6_NsHhq0lkWXNQRu8ZaeA9sfulkYAMHQ433orNlk)_**

Here’s the truth: Teenagers are struggling. Transgender teenagers are struggling even more. They want love and acceptance just like every other teenager you know.

Some of them get it at home, some of them do not. Some of them get it at school, some of them do not. Some of them have a supportive adult in their lives, some of them do not.
Here’s what I know: The GOP does not care about transgender people, transgender kids, or gender-affirming care. They care about winning elections. They understand the political power of “othering” the most vulnerable in society, and, right now, that is trans kids.

State laws like South Carolina’s transgender sports ban contribute to the ongoing stigmatization of young people who are just trying to navigate their teenage years. These kids deserve love and acceptance, not bullying.

This isn’t about transgender kids. This is about science. This is about compassion. This is about the abuse of political power.

**_[Will you stand up for trans kids this Pride Month by signing a letter demanding accountability from state reps who have supported anti-trans legislation?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk2aPz0xx7qbPDkb_Dorpgpvl-pW8pr-kr_dPDju_oj4on1S3Ww0jpn1Qv3toZY4m8IfAAup3MQGuQR-V9H5tTc84mqFmdwqR4van4DGF_VjSl1VCoYbqGNormF_0e47JwgJneYTAhdbNyZ4BJCN1_GeXbhqFYN4Wv2EZ-h793wLJOLnyIAsJnZNbo8YfGgmuaBv_ZuYZEYWjU731j4eTsNvM1hy0oVasToQUT0nDXrMGhcVKDwFcGvrL-dpkJ4xZaUiyCIbwg7AhMcbe8YVdcscO5srj3c7Huywk7X4mFi2ug4YrQGoBJOEHsdj1-ukt_iCJlvZqnl2B4yUAxZo_Rq8TUXFXxSMgN2OfbEifimdAVGw8nEji0VDogTeILgWNU/3wv/4FXNfmXFTauFkzRc4BdKdA/h3/VC6Y7tCr6537V6yESFguPalwEcxXNZ71AVzCv6XUyHk)_**
**_[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk2aPz0xx7qbPDkb_Dorpgpvl-pW8pr-kr_dPDju_oj4on1S3Ww0jpn1Qv3toZY4m8IfAAup3MQGuQR-V9H5tTc84mqFmdwqR4van4DGF_VjbTl1eytuEjstW-_QZEV2fS_kx2l6wLW_FAsBTW7Hd39wsj9-1kBQPgOIViIkvgK4D9QSS-6uqvt3UhhqAjtHdyjQGHtiNyV4qXHMz96A78x6eXlJ_RqdWMulQwAw2wQCtDVccoV8gxdt1qc0WlOs554eJIrjpC6sKKvd-mFBgkON6-omA8SlzYIAB28MkEsd-4RZHVH4cpGyNcyC4u4T_ShzBvW0cx3vXNuTja2afnW1u5kqlbwO9CoRnaut1C6OwV6FvtayGkzDaC2KaE5Xmk/3wv/4FXNfmXFTauFkzRc4BdKdA/h4/dfgWq_2K1G7FwQDLKVLZeiB4V8e8r8qH2gh2SnUwhWo)_****** | | [Start Writing](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnk2aPz0xx7qbPDkb_Dorpgpvl-pW8pr-kr_dPDju_oj4on1S3Ww0jpn1Qv3toZY4m8IfAAup3MQGuQR-V9H5tTc84mqFmdwqR4van4DGF_VjUK16kBByt2alfJvSCpv37RU-SkEJ4loR1372Ecp1QG2RY4SmE1PiECgPzGWmnctMM7m18RmHMbPuuqWXXNBjAjoC1QOn08iGbIipy-d_tQ1f5SUrAsWzc0ouiiTqmI7bbmw5Sisuo3_7_Ehjm5gK7JkeE9geA3u_wEO7i5F1tZAkufBHRuIpDfixLpw5uOb9CbCCINi55trlpwmfV-JMawvFpCypsdkxQftKj-0aQEsELxIVeSqLAV0nbHxrMcL_9MyZhaRVv9PNlEtaCCG3Cc/3wv/4FXNfmXFTauFkzRc4BdKdA/h5/kaFLHL2Jyua9MI6dv62gNXCr5-g9vRe3pZFT9fJsnE8)
---

On the day my patient was getting ready to transfer to the psychiatric hospital, as I was leaving his room, I noticed him looking at my ID badge hanging around my neck. He saw my small pink, blue, and white transgender flag button. He looked at me, smiled, and said “I like your button.” It’s a small thing, but it mattered to him.

All kids deserve to have people in their corner who support them, not have their existence be belittled.

Thank you,

Annie

* * *
| | PAID FOR BY THEIR FUTURE PAC

---

To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Their Future Our Vote, please [click here](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GLNp5FjRArZ2gECnWf63UZWzcCuYR-Es9PjYmAXR4JxZbuH_t8O228MjZNOxN7Lm2s9-fJQwkmXVYn3DDOsndJGxFfqb7MYjju6gY_IiVWJftpBqmSHd0P94HQnnFRyAD0PzabzrAiGGYMavh6_VkZUmCqejXqCabH_ROZFV1DXq2fc2MvmHt17O4uvFYy72S/3wv/4FXNfmXFTauFkzRc4BdKdA/h8/kJBdD5t-ut_GgI3p0CPbygjuKQG29UxRDi55Zif8slU).

**Attorney General certifies CCFO ballot title**
SALEM, OR—June 8, 2023—This week, the Oregon Attorney General’s Office certified Constitutional Carry for Oregon’s (CCFO) ballot title for Initiative Petition 2024-021.

The draft ballot title read: “Amends Constitution: Creates constitutional right to carry a concealed firearm without a permit.”

The certified ballot title now reads: “Amends Constitution: Creates right to carry a concealed firearm without a permit; voids existing concealed carry restrictions.”

In a joint statement, the petitioners stated, “We have no plans to challenge the ballot title; however, it’s important to point out that the voiding of concealed carry restrictions in no way places firearms into the hands of felons or those otherwise unable to legally possess a firearm. A second point is that such individuals do not typically apply for concealed carry permits to begin with.”

At present, 27 U.S. states are already constitutional carry states.

After a 10-day appeals period placed by the Attorney General’s Office, and a three-day processing period by the Secretary of State’s Office, final signature sheets will be issued. The process of gathering the 160,551 signatures for the initiative to appear on the November 2024 general election ballot will begin thereafter. CCFO has until July 5, 2024, to submit signatures.

CCFO is a grassroots volunteer effort. The three chief petitioners are: Joel Pawloski, a retired Army Lt. Colonel in Marion County; Kerry McQuisten, the former mayor of Baker City in Baker County; and Jean Sampson, former city council member of Clatskanie in Columbia County.

More information can be found at www.ConstitutionalCarryforOregon.com.
# # #

clean_body: | | | | | | Attorney General certifies CCFO ballot title SALEM, OR—June 8, 2023—This week, the Oregon Attorney General’s Office certified Constitutional Carry for Oregon’s (CCFO) ballot title for Initiative Petition 2024-021. The draft ballot title read: “Amends Constitution: Creates constitutional right to carry a concealed firearm without a permit.” The certified ballot title now reads: “Amends Constitution: Creates right to carry a concealed firearm without a permit; voids existing concealed carry restrictions.” In a joint statement, the petitioners stated, “We have no plans to challenge the ballot title; however, it’s important to point out that the voiding of concealed carry restrictions in no way places firearms into the hands of felons or those otherwise unable to legally possess a firearm. A second point is that such individuals do not typically apply for concealed carry permits to begin with.” At present, 27 U.S. states are already constitutional carry states. After a 10-day appeals period placed by the Attorney General’s Office, and a three-day processing period by the Secretary of State’s Office, final signature sheets will be issued. The process of gathering the 160,551 signatures for the initiative to appear on the November 2024 general election ballot will begin thereafter. CCFO has until July 5, 2024, to submit signatures. CCFO is a grassroots volunteer effort. The three chief petitioners are: Joel Pawloski, a retired Army Lt. Colonel in Marion County; Kerry McQuisten, the former mayor of Baker City in Baker County; and Jean Sampson, former city council member of Clatskanie in Columbia County. More information can be found at www.ConstitutionalCarryforOregon.com. # # | "Help us fight! Donate to CCFO" | | "Visit www.KerryMcQuisten.com" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Kerry McQuisten's Common Sense Sanctuary, All rights reserved.

#
Friend,

The radical left is launching an all-out attack on the unborn and we must act fast to stop them. [**We need your support to fight back**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=08258412f35c465ca5e780a9bb2a3ece&_e=KILqJ5NeYy10REGpyusHkwSaBO_an693dUYv2L56VzpcKKM1lhIhWq-5nrlj2njJ97AmGRZHU2OGh3g3Ewot9CqflFeu5baFyClAFDs6ufN4TR9D6oWs7cIO1b38g6ZZQL0TD1L7CDSl3onb30sZb5-2aIlHh9xxXWL1kLZFIoO3ww3zD--cwM4Xl3ZKC2FwOwLLISZ5getMur9tTDDpsf0dIFGfOsgADqv1JCdLJWJCwzzLQgMdY4nqd1RzzdG6kKFUlPEvFaEYOHbz-TatscHAvYTehrmgsfUl6SkjNfROwMQ3uz_Pa87PbOpbStUNP2Q8H3Ad_UzK5JThSMG5PUMdReipzf-Gi8x0mOW71TmjeiTh3szVPF2If-LgPUsfvsNdg3DehojbD_6PHGam96Gck7nEZRIQJt-ZGccsLaM%3D) against the radicals' latest attempt to revive the long-expired Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) - an assault on mothers, babies, and the rule of law.

This dangerous and sweeping legal mandate for abortion on demand, funded with taxpayer dollars, would be enshrined in the U.S. Constitution indefinitely blocking state and federal legislation to protect the unborn and the consciences of Americans who do not wish to participate in abortion.

The Big Abortion Lobby and their radical allies are sparing no expense to make abortion on demand the law of the land, and even the late Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg agreed that the deadline to ratify the ERA has long since passed. But that hasn't stopped them from working with the Biden administration to legalize abortions at ANY point in pregnancy - up until the moment of birth and even after birth!

**[This is barbaric and we must fight back with everything we have.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=08258412f35c465ca5e780a9bb2a3ece&_e=KILqJ5NeYy10REGpyusHkwSaBO_an693dUYv2L56VzpcKKM1lhIhWq-5nrlj2njJ97AmGRZHU2OGh3g3Ewot9CqflFeu5baFyClAFDs6ufN4TR9D6oWs7cIO1b38g6ZZQL0TD1L7CDSl3onb30sZb5-2aIlHh9xxXWL1kLZFIoO3ww3zD--cwM4Xl3ZKC2FwOwLLISZ5getMur9tTDDpsf0dIFGfOsgADqv1JCdLJWJCwzzLQgMdY4nqd1RzzdG6kKFUlPEvFaEYOHbz-TatsdgaGJxSL7VqZ4Pis_wC5bK-SMnVHMibMtnhbid_--6_3rtxbU2pRVgXdejPNeH3BeMaC9wFRMpykC1WVrN8jCJhYkxeokNpiPNAHtnqDp58pJTaUjtA3yBVNy4FwpbHRfpkzEOp8eKNrq1aIiP7M7Y%3D)** The team at SBA Pro-Life America is committed to defending life and advocating for laws that protect innocent and vulnerable human life.

But we can't do this alone. We need your help to expand our policy research efforts, advance pro-life laws through direct lobbying and grassroots campaigns, and grow our voter education initiative to ensure pro-life Americans know where their lawmakers stand on protecting the unborn.

The abortion lobby is spending a record amount of dollars to bring about their radical agenda, but with your generous contribution today, we can fight back against their assault on the unborn and protect innocent lives from abortion on demand.

Please act now and make your gift using this secure link: **[https://secure.sbaprolife.org/stop-big-abortion-extremists](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=08258412f35c465ca5e780a9bb2a3ece&_e=KILqJ5NeYy10REGpyusHkwSaBO_an693dUYv2L56VzpcKKM1lhIhWq-5nrlj2njJ97AmGRZHU2OGh3g3Ewot9CqflFeu5baFyClAFDs6ufN4TR9D6oWs7cIO1b38g6ZZQL0TD1L7CDSl3onb30sZb5-2aIlHh9xxXWL1kLZFIoO3ww3zD--cwM4Xl3ZKC2FwOwLLISZ5getMur9tTDDpsf0dIFGfOsgADqv1JCdLJWJCwzzLQgMdY4nqd1RzzdG6kKFUlPEvFaEYOHbz-TatsdZj9qmzmjqErGfPU9mko4_EsGF3vL8ulu_Wwn7fc713gFIe5UKCRxmRZuv_5v-e0yjVZZ06bNL7nWLnxdbPqG-UHgbCNbSXAT0xk6-SEFB3nPY0l6CpJ3xzgciya8wB-IFWAn5kt7ZuWF44aaKAmbk%3D)**

We cannot wait any longer - every moment counts!

For _LIFE_ ,

Marjorie Dannenfelser

name: Rep. Chris Deluzio
subject: Change starts with you, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
United Rural Democrats [https://can2-prod.s3.amazonaws.com/uploads/data/000/670/558/original/logo.png]
Hi Peter –

During my first 6 months in Congress, I’ve worked with Republicans and Democrats in Washington on the most important issues this country faces.

In my district, Pennsylvania’s 17th, people desperately need change. They’ve told me personally about the need for health care reform, support for caretakers and educators, economic opportunities for workers and small business owners, and better working conditions for all.

Before serving in Congress, I served in the Iraq War, worked as a voting rights attorney, and fought to organize a union. These experiences have undoubtedly shaped the public official I am today. I have learned, first and foremost, the importance of creating lasting change from the ground up.

That’s why I’m excited to have the opportunity to speak with you, Peter, at an event in partnership with United Rural Democrats – which recently endorsed my reelection campaign.

I hope you’ll join me June 15 at 7 p.m. EST for a virtual conversation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/urd_cc_deluzio?refcode=230608_cd_event_l1] about the 2023/2024 election cycle and how we can best serve and win in communities like mine. You can RSVP and ask me questions through the link below.

RSVP & SUBMIT QUESTIONS HERE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/urd_cc_deluzio?refcode=230608_cd_event_b1]

Thank you, and I look forward to seeing you soon.

- Chris
United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS

subject: Republicans tried to expel me.
body:
Republicans’ far-right extremism is a danger to our democracy, our communities, and our children. Their hate-fueled agenda is despicable, and I refuse to back down. I hope you’ll join me. | | |
---
| | Hi, it’s Tennessee State Rep. Gloria Johnson. You may remember me as one of the members of the Tennessee Three and the only one who Republicans failed to expel. Throughout my time in the state House, I’ve made it my mission to speak the truth. To stand _up_ for what I believe in and stand _against_ hateful, backward legislation. Republicans’ far-right extremism is a danger to our democracy, our communities, and our children. They’re targeting the LGBTQ+ community under the guise of “protecting children” as they cater to the gun lobby and ignore the devastating consequences of gun violence and the harmful effects of their hate-fueled agenda. It’s despicable. My constituents elected me to represent them in Nashville, and I take that responsibility seriously. **That’s why even after my Republican colleagues attempted to expel me for speaking out against gun violence, I refused to back down.** The people of Tennessee deserve better than anti-democratic schemes and cowardly indifference – and I’m ready to continue fighting for them. [_**Will you split a donation of $10 to support my campaign and help the DLCC elect Democrats to state legislatures nationwide? By building Democratic power at the state level, we can secure a better future in states like Tennessee and beyond.**_](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNr-hN1AWcIDxSbdRc7c9e4J9MC8CzBZDUx97avgp74FB2Mi4V6wVQLW04Bx7xsxZNlG2L0H-a2pXv2wr5n2aOqopZhD_UlZtV1ANCeWvYJga_v_wRJlMiG-kzcZlUd7WcFcwrKA52REPRQSPF6xnkuKzfK-rNOWPn44WbwdK4kJ5NZmK3N_UlALA0g3BPhFQ4G9QjnkBYNoxpx-EKToArrDRD9pg91yBF1DNwvFF_RZA6zvtHuwlxHV1JvQ6D6zOD0w2zQBCw5qG_DsZfK5cKJsG5anhwfCET_NaXGRJN0d34gzEcgXx18oDTugaBZQ2hOVzR_HQRJHm8d59tDSYBJnjb6WF5g8thbUk8KO9GehDgICtCmEXVryBDd7das0I/3wv/qjWEg411QwuzZQ_fR2HcKQ/h0/AuPnjvFIG0nV99_TmOG7mQvOhp6dj4EvdMCHJwYp9RY) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between the DLCC and TN Rep.
