name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Former Home Depot CEO issues dire warning for Americans
body:
Something strange is happening in our financial system.

| Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy's are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning:
> "We're going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..."
What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she's found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=962cc8c983cc4970bfc08fbc45ef400e&_e=4O3GSt18xfJGnP98PGn-ldFA63UOj2GsT5s3zRrPfvXrZfaLYAvoHNCeBAfml8ruv7rdNGw5MUYKlg3a5fZ29CCBXFQpXqXoHGdcK2kkIIv1kApn4C6qR5f4DtP9DRftLhLSm6smrmfH9Ncyp4B3B6_DMnbMdBHdwutie4k-lr6p85CT81EocEUdOcQ6TKTqw4jD3XU01ZMWPu6czzAxJv32GeLB6dm7_E9l3e7IhGLc_Q1IzVUHyFrlfNNWPjm8) Dr. Prins says:
> "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we're about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result."
According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. [Click here now to see her full (and free) presentation.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=962cc8c983cc4970bfc08fbc45ef400e&_e=4O3GSt18xfJGnP98PGn-ldFA63UOj2GsT5s3zRrPfvXrZfaLYAvoHNCeBAfml8ruv7rdNGw5MUYKlg3a5fZ29CCBXFQpXqXoHGdcK2kkIIuCck5NkOCeTqo4s_qJ8sHwKulqy2bUddBUKnWuPstGfjcpLJH1bLwHHfq5xF9iU0JnmnJjLYhkV95QWksDxmlC6JYMKDVXqbc_na2dn26JZNeNt-5bTsgdf2PkbXP3WJV6zSH9wBqMmi504bheBRnH) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics **P.S.** The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. [Click here to see why.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=962cc8c983cc4970bfc08fbc45ef400e&_e=4O3GSt18xfJGnP98PGn-ldFA63UOj2GsT5s3zRrPfvXrZfaLYAvoHNCeBAfml8ruv7rdNGw5MUYKlg3a5fZ29CCBXFQpXqXoHGdcK2kkIItDIkfH43feNrZ4wg99a-bWNhs_h8zexTRBMWohE5yggwMSHJmxNXux4H10bAwJeFWNRQoAzaf_B-RVYY3D6p8UNQuDwN1c9ejrUaUb8ZhI7749-O39K4SDsP3Xqx9lFdpmvWLt7cgEFDJTiikf0ckt)

clean_body: Something strange is happening in our financial system. | Dear Reader, Something strange is happening in our financial system. According to analysts at UBS, more than 50,000 retail locations could shut their doors in the months ahead. Already, Walmart, Foot Locker, Bed Bath & Beyond, and Macy's are cutting stores. And former Home Depot CEO Bob Nardelli recently issued a grim warning: "We're going to see a lot of bankruptcies. [This is] different than anything I have seen in my 52 years..." What does it all mean for your family and your money? Dr. Nomi Prins has dug deeper into the research, and she's found something startling. Amid all the turmoil predicted by Nardeni and UBS, Prins has found a single firm that could be the canary in the coal mine foreshadowing the next major crisis in America. All it takes is one look at this troubling chart to see why - Dr. Prins says: "This chart tells you everything you need to know about the next crisis in America. In short, what we're about to see is a currency crisis - but not the kind of currency crisis most folks expect. This firm - along with many others - will almost certainly go bankrupt as a result." According to Dr. Prins, our money is about to change forever... and the overhaul is set to happen in just a few weeks. To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains all the details of what she calls a 'reset' to our financial system. In it, she lays out all the evidence of this currency crisis, and what you can do to prepare. Regards, Maria Bonaventura Senior Managing Editor, Rogue Economics P.S. The last time we saw a similar transformations to our money, folks who failed to prepare were blindsided. But those who moved their money beforehand had the opportunity to multiply their nest-egg as a result. Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

Friend,
The Republican National Committee has officially released its criteria to make it on the Debate Stage. By August 23rd, we need:
✔︎ Over 40,000 national contributors
✔︎ At least 200 unique donors per state or territory in 20+ states and/or territories
✔︎ And poll consistently above 1 percent

We all know Christie is the only person who will TELL IT LIKE IT IS, demand the truth, and expose Donald Trump’s many flaws on the debate stage. No other GOP candidate running has done it, and no other candidate can do it or will do it—DeSantis, Haley, Scott, and Pence–they’re all afraid.

Christie meets the polling requirement, but now we need YOUR HELP to get 40,000 national contributors.

## Why Chris Christie:

Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. Governor Christie's voice at the debates will ensure our party engages in the robust, direct, truth-telling conversation we need to start winning again. Join us in supporting Chris Christie's candidacy for president and ensuring his direct, no-nonsense agenda at the RNC-sponsored presidential debates. Your participation is vital in making this happen. Sign up today to "Tell It Like It Is" and help our party and country select a president we can all be proud of. Together, we can shape a brighter future for America.

clean_body: | | | | We need you on our team. | Friend, The Republican National Committee has officially released its criteria to make it on the Debate Stage. By August 23rd, we need: ✔︎ Over 40,000 national contributors ✔︎ At least 200 unique donors per state or territory in 20+ states and/or territories ✔︎ And poll consistently above 1 percent We all know Christie is the only person who will TELL IT LIKE IT IS, demand the truth, and expose Donald Trump’s many flaws on the debate stage. No other GOP candidate running has done it, and no other candidate can do it or will do it—DeSantis, Haley, Scott, and Pence–they’re all afraid. Christie meets the polling requirement, but now we need YOUR HELP to get 40,000 national contributors. | | | | | | Listen, this is up to me and you; either we get Christie on that debate stage, or Trump will win the nomination again. And make no mistake, Biden beat Trump once, and he’ll beat him—again. We can’t afford that to happen—Biden has left our country more divided than ever. Americans are less prosperous and feel less safe, and four more years of Joe Biden is not an option we should be rooting for. In order to stop Biden from winning, we need you to become a Debate Captain, and make sure Christie is on that stage! Do you accept this challenge, Friend? Thank you, Shannon Debate Team Leader | Why Chris Christie: Chris Christie is a proven leader who fearlessly tells it like it is. As a successful governor in a blue state with a track record of real accomplishments, Christie has consistently confronted challenging issues head-on, making difficult decisions without hesitation. To ensure a conservative Republican victory in the 2024 presidential election, we deserve an open, honest debate that focuses on critical issues. name: Tina Kotek
subject: Pride is about inclusivity, acceptance, and love
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
**Happy Pride Month, Peter!** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64545868/410414488/-703574061?s=20&refcode=AU_TK_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20230608_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Mjc0ZjgyNC0zODA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z9CFSWMWQq4ZFw8PP6cR5eTRkV5BeA_6RTD-F7b1hRk=&emci=6b19ac6b-2906-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=4274f824-3806-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=15353729)
**_Click_**[** _here_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64545869/410414489/-703574061?s=20&refcode=AU_TK_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20230608_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Mjc0ZjgyNC0zODA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z9CFSWMWQq4ZFw8PP6cR5eTRkV5BeA_6RTD-F7b1hRk=&emci=6b19ac6b-2906-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=4274f824-3806-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=15353729)** _to watch my video wishing Oregon a Happy Pride!_** June is the time of year we especially celebrate the LGBTQ+ community and their invaluable contributions to Oregon and the entire country. Whether it’s in the arts, in our schools, in our hospitals, or even the Governor’s office, LGBTQ+ Oregonians are making strides for true equality all over our state, and those achievements deserve to be celebrated this month and always. But let’s not forget that Pride is not all parades and rainbows. Pride started as a protest. At a time when LGBTQ+ attacks are taking place in legislatures and classrooms all across the country, we must be steadfast in our commitment to inclusivity, acceptance, and love. And to all the young people figuring out their identity: You are seen, you are heard, and you will always be welcome to be who you are in Oregon. There are many challenges our community is facing right now, but I will never stop fighting to make sure Oregon is a safe and inclusive place for everyone. Let’s make this Pride month a time of unity and love where everyone, regardless of sexual orientation or gender identity, can truly thrive. Have a great and safe Pride month! — Tina | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64545870/410414490/-636061749?contactdata=8D1AGkpo1bhIpzaUNYeB16/9lkTVyY1SyTwgWuxlMYhvkxLswb8FydIlEeGiIEU1+V/KPMDxQ1RCLBmxJ3UH1WVccDgmYsz0PRdW2kGOSosvfB+W/xPD2oW3J4Oe4M/d6tpO4H0qhqgsslxSX16MXWhwGe/umg802+ZZpAtMHIs=&refcode=AU_TK_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20230608_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Mjc0ZjgyNC0zODA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z9CFSWMWQq4ZFw8PP6cR5eTRkV5BeA_6RTD-F7b1hRk=)

body:
In the first 5 months of the 2023 youth fellowship, participants have already completed 340 hours of field work in their communities. | | |
---
Friend, We’re halfway through our 2023 youth fellowship program with our fellows learning critical skills necessary to be leaders in their communities. **Have you wondered what one day of the youth fellowship might look like?** Here’s a look at our last meeting’s agenda:
* 10:30-11:00 -- Q&A; with Stephanie Chang, State Senator District 3
* 11:10-12:40 -- Confidence & Communications
* 12:50-1:50 -- Deep Dive: Environmental Justice, Clean Water

From meeting elected leaders and community organizers to skill training to issue advocacy, we’re providing participants with 32 hours of instruction as well as 32 hours of field work―training the leaders of tomorrow, today. **Our youth fellowship places an emphasis on training people of color, women, and girls.** This year’s fellows are 100% BIPOC with 85% identifying as women, 7% men, and 7% non-binary. [**Check out my email from yesterday, which includes testimonials from past youth fellowship graduates and a look at what some of our graduates are doing today. Then pitch in to my Rooted in Community Leadership PAC to power our youth fellowship and provide young people with the training they need to be leaders in their communities now and for years to come.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xKt0keCNTVajO6ZcDQ5a57zLtpwSELFEskW2JnpGFNe8FGFJ0UmFiJl1S9HNbh_tzK27heDRrQQSnJzSomFzAMTnoMQf17SgvybBE4fdLIFmeR8-FLs7wLpYKTgr2C7skgboytB4TUFMptGfVFL88wnG23HVVYUhXfHyJO-mqN4WAQjJFRBZBwb0Sa2KqiSrHHsZ9F2wKnphOrnR2BD4lyP15xjyhRmqJDVu832RxD2PEpO-h3z7X5TGP-3UOJ2vCIBa94Hve4UQEhGX-EC5H85jr4wbCTp467VBU3p0zMy3g8UyftWc-1lRxDPrFZHYkPNMbR2FoMtE325MuFyqA99HCUu94UnpCTv9j6H8MN4sVN6Sy-XBXfXkYYIyCYdHWvgY4TCm9rPw-3rQtHFJzkMAKr-zpeGtfGHLjDU4i88Q3kSiw5qpUbpkQwMcb6o08irgA66f_KmSz13oxl_NVuYCD_b7PPjhdc3-B9ZGZ3a_QMZ9z55lPpAH0T2lZsClYvr8OXlJGrUAMnEgrPIXgrGi_ZVZHv2BEbQflqrEVp0Q/3wv/SMyy2Hl-TFWEZ6Z_ngfRTw/h0/VC9umWHZ-h8iQHV6_hrejxRKZqObG9Lm7M6NUXvSyog) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xKt0keCNTVajO6ZcDQ5a57zLtpwSELFEskW2JnpGFNe8FGFJ0UmFiJl1S9HNbh_tyUMNN-pfUDPcGigfiHqRmXjl9V4qFIEwidSQjh6HM8_xfK_PyJqFatvHqxhv3tLC3TgrNRnYxEtPV8Mg1pyvZBwUIaBCdZd18RLg_oQbnFTx-Bye_HMG2_X1NvLhqQn7oqHstvLhkbM7xR-k3T610m-GI5joYGt3tNkTW50t4NwZee8IAS0ZSctr92PNKThczt1zQE9JHxTb74X6ZreDXN4wVe7llTuhQeRPrkVBBbEBJT0iEaX2uUC4S3uEVEibeX_Zes-9uqyH29eF7_vqh9sGItY4sdG9wXKQ5Ws1nS7WUvYo0bgpdLbVILcNT4mGHj-CDWSZP72dRvjNOaUifgaxQ5gFK3wEwdDNDMNklIiuZrFZko0R9MnazjSvmSvudbqAZlizthpkIWCrh92pxB4iufFY4_suczdpycYOW8JuzA2rqMeeLDB-UeSUy2p2cwnCS_ZoUYWSXvuuXF01-fRqjYU4yJBQeBPN2xt2MLS3ekwF_KDONXUriaX2RqyIw_OG-g9pP7fZSY-ZtWbuVue_okgjXt1v6DVKkcAnUhrg/3wv/SMyy2Hl-TFWEZ6Z_ngfRTw/h1/uqsj8GP8EpUer0URF3w8-Lmx0EpNHrCgDWrGDP5E1bw)

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Wed, Jun 7, 2023
Subject: “I was very excited to not only learn more about what’s going on in my community, but also to learn about myself”
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
Even as right-wing hate is attempting to tear our country apart, **I am still optimistic about our future**. This is because young people are more engaged in politics today than any time since the Civil Rights Movement of the 1950s and ‘60s.
And, this younger generation is the most diverse of any in U.S. history.
**Through our Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, we’ve developed a youth fellowship program to train young people of diverse backgrounds, ages 14 – 24 on the skills to be effective organizers on a range of issues impacting our communities.** This year’s fellows are 100% BIPOC with 85% identifying as women, 7% men, and 7% non-binary.
Past graduates have gone on to be student government leaders on their college campuses, worked as local and regional organizers on youth engagement and student GOTV efforts, and worked in areas ranging from environmental justice to Palestinian liberation.
**Here’s what a few Youth Fellowship graduates said about their experiences:**
> _“I was very excited to not only learn more about what’s going on in my community, but also to learn about myself more―being able to speak in front of people and learn how to engage with my peers.”_
> _“[The fellowship] thoughtfully and safely [created] an environment for all of us to get together and talk about our field work, social issues, and our lives. It's really a great thing that the Tlaib Team has put together.”_
> _“Being in this fellowship, I have now gone out of my way to connect with community activities and others doing great things for our community.”_
In the first 5 months of the 2023 youth fellowship, participants have already completed 340 hours of field work in their communities while also receiving instruction from local community organizers about criminal legal reform, the history of the labor movement and union organizing, environmental justice and access to clean water, education justice, and gun violence prevention.

clean_body: In the first 5 months of the 2023 youth fellowship, participants have already completed 340 hours of field work in their communities. | | | Friend, We’re halfway through our 2023 youth fellowship program with our fellows learning critical skills necessary to be leaders in their communities. Have you wondered what one day of the youth fellowship might look like? Here’s a look at our last meeting’s agenda: 10:30-11:00 -- Q&A; with Stephanie Chang, State Senator District 3 11:10-12:40 -- Confidence & Communications 12:50-1:50 -- Deep Dive: Environmental Justice, Clean Water From meeting elected leaders and community organizers to skill training to issue advocacy, we’re providing participants with 32 hours of instruction as well as 32 hours of field work―training the leaders of tomorrow, today. Our youth fellowship places an emphasis on training people of color, women, and girls. This year’s fellows are 100% BIPOC with 85% identifying as women, 7% men, and 7% non-binary. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | I am inspired by the passion and activism of the next generations of leaders. Thank you for joining me in providing them with the tools to succeed. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib**** Date: Wed, Jun 7, 2023 Subject: “I was very excited to not only learn more about what’s going on in my community, but also to learn about myself” To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Even as right-wing hate is attempting to tear our country apart, I am still optimistic about our future. This is because young people are more engaged in politics today than any time since the Civil Rights Movement of the 1950s and ‘60s. And, this younger generation is the most diverse of any in U.S. history. Through our Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, we’ve developed a youth fellowship program to train young people of diverse backgrounds, ages 14 – 24 on the skills to be effective organizers on a range of issues impacting our communities. This year’s fellows are 100% BIPOC with 85% identifying as women, 7% men, and 7% non-binary. Past graduates have gone on to be student government leaders on their college campuses, worked as local and regional organizers on youth engagement and student GOTV efforts, and worked in areas ranging from environmental justice to Palestinian liberation. Here’s what a few Youth Fellowship graduates said about their experiences: “I was very excited to not only learn more about what’s going on in my community, but also to learn about myself more―being able to speak in front of people and learn how to engage with my peers.” “[The fellowship] thoughtfully and safely [created] an environment for all of us to get together and talk about our field work, social issues, and our lives. It's really a great thing that the Tlaib Team has put together.” “Being in this fellowship, I have now gone out of my way to connect with community activities and others doing great things for our community.” In the first 5 months of the 2023 youth fellowship, participants have already completed 340 hours of field work in their communities while also receiving instruction from local community organizers about criminal legal reform, the history of the labor movement and union organizing, environmental justice and access to clean water, education justice, and gun violence prevention. Organizing young people did not happen overnight. It’s taken a multi-year, year-round organizing strategy to train and mobilize young people. Younger voters are concerned about the climate crisis, workers’ rights, college affordability, access to clean water, housing, LGBTQ+ rights, immigrant rights, abortion rights, and racial and social justice.In order to advance our shared agenda, we must continue to invest in youth leadership. name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: will you invest in a pro-choice majority?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I'll cut right to the chase. Far-right extremists are waging an all-out war against reproductive rights. This is the fight of our generation — and we cannot afford to lose.
We're already living in a country where, in some states, abortions are banned before most women even know that they're pregnant. Where patients and doctors can be prosecuted as _felons_. Where politicians are interfering with and surveilling Americans' most private, personal medical decisions.
But at the same time, we've seen voters across the country, from Kansas to Michigan, head to the ballot box to _reject_ this far-right anti-choice agenda. The vast majority of Americans support reproductive freedoms. **If we all stand together as one, we can defeat the minority of extremists and restore reproductive rights nationwide. And that starts with defending our Senate majority next fall. **
GOP megadonors are going to be working overtime to elect their anti-choice candidates. The only way to fight back is with a united, grassroots movement. **[_That's why I'm asking you invest in a Pro-Choice Senate majority today. Please, will you make a donation to restore reproductive rights and win the fight of our generation?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64545858/410414368/-2054302023?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4198-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWQ1NGViYy0zNzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dpygQJjFICAIagMOB-ovVmrqODdJihZgTNZNB3AukQQ=)**

clean_body: | | | Friend, I'll cut right to the chase. Far-right extremists are waging an all-out war against reproductive rights. This is the fight of our generation — and we cannot afford to lose. We're already living in a country where, in some states, abortions are banned before most women even know that they're pregnant. Where patients and doctors can be prosecuted as felons. Where politicians are interfering with and surveilling Americans' most private, personal medical decisions. But at the same time, we've seen voters across the country, from Kansas to Michigan, head to the ballot box to reject this far-right anti-choice agenda. The vast majority of Americans support reproductive freedoms. If we all stand together as one, we can defeat the minority of extremists and restore reproductive rights nationwide. And that starts with defending our Senate majority next fall. GOP megadonors are going to be working overtime to elect their anti-choice candidates. The only way to fight back is with a united, grassroots movement. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for fighting for a brighter, fairer world. With love, Kirsten | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. name: Maria Elvira Salazar
subject: Big tech silencing Americans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
| | | Fellow American, Technology can be a blessing. And in America, we’ve made some of the greatest tech advancements in the world. _But while some technology saves lives, today our major corporations are using technology to silence conservatives like you and me._ A select group of CEO’s shouldn’t be patrolling what we can say and who we can talk about, Fellow American. _That’s why it’s time to take a stand._ **[Do YOU think big tech has gotten too powerful in America?](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=813ca4cdc69b496ebbfea528f1fd497f&_e=ZkbBJO68gSZ6XBGnleKNVuakPbE-AnQ43K2c0M7xYHBPmaZBSKhuj06pMIUGXyjATTogYdQPpqNdtdULupkWpb-LPqoN8PmCKFU1LnEox3gSlPDhxKWv_LKjpMHlyDobjcr7hdUyf-kZXl6uy56ys7qLJMhzLWv-w-D6RPw99sq1v8a9t9pHmhR2dH3TVJBznVAg8HODGHFh-e1TbdYG7M1zdPKZOtphla18HZ8kwAGPHTCEw-LCsvABz1uCz9Y42nSUB71LXU0fc4U94H_edaDqEt3dS-21KZDO7OofcBy67EcO_dGsP5XHpC3bjMDSbV9ncKS6QaNVRer9ALSeS1wfPXPIj9KFuzu1VEBm2yI1UWNizXxD4pkwoZUwTjbqbzWyAY6FGp4WHszI48vFd4DO7yfiJjMCHICay_V-eiM%3D)**

name: SECURE THE BORDER
subject: We can’t trust Joe Biden and Kamala Harris to do it...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, When Joe Biden and Kamala Harris took their oaths of office, they promised to protect and defend our great nation.

_But right now, they’re doing NOTHING to keep Americans safe from one of the biggest dangers our country is facing..._

**...ILLEGAL IMMIGRATION.**

Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and the rest of the Democrats are letting drugs, weapons, and criminals _pour_ into our country through the Southern border.

They won’t take a stand to keep our country safe - **but I know patriots like YOU will.**

**We need every patriot to take a stand to BUILD THE WALL now before our border is gone for good.**

[**Sign our “Protect the Border” petition now and DEMAND we finish the southern border wall and KEEP AMERICA**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=2f61d443bab440f091228165e8683b34&_e=bW2uf6ob-xJ8A5M2dJ2v2FYMu1SFxwSzol98BU-ebGukf0zaKb8KswXaHE0v3aiDcaHEOvydSexC_ITlHX4C-yvxg2J0zxh8aovItxnmrhSclC_9RWv9ofTRxLsdjWp_FoUvXTOOf8XgfNBdBMx0tIBFzfbkiCjLiQGySF6_YV8Gb7cyWylZDuLo0DfhMk32BxLZkq4xWZNsSKKXe04RE6r--mh7XbQv9HuXXNVVmjWVboxxubX9sxnAvzSj_hfBQeSyo54l-MThnUhw08WW9F8E0yfL1CDdeyeGTH6goMgG8QihQIhhcjFo6ipY91ENCpRmgbKI3FetHoH5puyYdNiY3ZItO8ywH6IEQCf-SRSKUBPT68C4LZrG0POD_b-r1APzxW-ZDX-eaPxcjPk_ag%3D%3D)

name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: Victory for ALL Americans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
An important step toward equal voting power and representation for voters of color
|
---

Team -- today, the Supreme Court of the United States, in _Allen v. Milligan_ , upheld a lower court decision striking down Alabama’s discriminatory congressional map as a likely violation of the Voting Rights Act (VRA) due to the state’s failure to provide Black Alabamians an equal opportunity to participate in the political process. _Allen v. Milligan_ is a redistricting lawsuit originally filed by Alabama voters with the support of our affiliate, National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), after the state legislature enacted a discriminatory congressional map.
This is a victory for all Americans, and it is an important step toward equal voting power and representation for voters of color across the country. It is also a testament to the tenacity of the voters of Alabama, who knew their rights were violated as a result of a map drawn in an unconstitutional and discriminatory manner, and took this fight as far as they could to **not only ensure their rights, but the rights of Americans across the country.**
As a result of today’s decision, the case moves forward, returning to the trial court for implementation of a fairer congressional map that all Alabamians want and deserve. The lower court ordered a second Black opportunity district be drawn in Alabama precisely because **Black Alabamians have been too long denied the opportunity to elect a candidate of their choice in all but one of the seven congressional districts.**
All of the protections enshrined in the Voting Rights Act of 1965 are still needed today. Although we have made significant progress since the Civil Rights Movement, **we still live in a nation where the safeguards found in the Voting Rights Act for minority communities remain necessary and must remain robust.**

****_All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering._**

clean_body: | | | | Alysa here with another fundraising update from Team Kim. Here's the bad news: we were close – but last month, we fell short of our fundraising goal. I'll be honest with you, it's disappointing. But here's the good news: the sky is not falling, and we have confidence in the strength of our movement to bounce back. Our next deadline is a big one. The end of June is our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. We have just $17,291 left to raise by June 30. = Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = At the end of the quarter, we report our fundraising numbers, and everyone, including potential opponents, can see them. So it's absolutely vital that we meet our goal by the deadline. In the past three elections, Republicans spent millions trying to buy this seat. But, thanks to people like you – this grassroots movement won out each time. = Andy is counting on us! name: Adam Schiff
subject: Trump blended my face with a wolf’s
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2455%2E5257348%2EBvFRWV ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, Donald
Trump is out with his first big presidential TV ad — and within the first
second, I’m who he’s going after:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jun2023_abs_em.FUvtzW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230608_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2455%2E5257348%2EBvFRWV ]Image of Adam Schiff on TV screen in Trump TV ad

Trump is still coming after me for impeaching him and prosecuting him in
his Senate trial: He hates that I worked to hold him accountable for
multiple egregious abuses of power — and he has a score to settle with me.
And he certainly doesn’t want me in the Senate standing up to his cronies
there.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jun2023_abs_em.FUvtzW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230608_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2455%2E5257348%2EBvFRWV ]Derek,
before I go any further, rush a $10 contribution to our campaign so that
we can respond to this unhinged attack from Donald Trump’s campaign. The
opening salvo of the 2024 election is aimed at me personally, and I’m
counting on this team for the resources to help us fight back.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jun2023_abs_em.9HINAX&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230608_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2455%2E5257348%2EBvFRWV ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=jun2023_abs_em.5j4Bsc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230608_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2455%2E5257348%2EBvFRWV ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jun2023_abs_em.RWa6IA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230608_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2455%2E5257348%2EBvFRWV ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jun2023_abs_em.9Bj7kB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230608_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=2455%2E5257348%2EBvFRWV ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=jun2023_abs_em.wTG104&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230608_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2455%2E5257348%2EBvFRWV ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230608_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=2455%2E5257348%2EBvFRWV ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

That first image wasn’t even the end of it. Later on in the ad — and I’m
not kidding about this — they blended my face with a wolf.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jun2023_abs_em.FUvtzW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230608_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=2455%2E5257348%2EBvFRWV ]Black and white image of Adam Schiff's face overlaid with a growling wolf

“Like a pack of rabid wolves, they attack.” — Trump ad narrator

Bizarre? Yes, but it goes to show just how dangerous Trump thinks I am to
his goal: Winning this election and continuing to tear apart our democracy
to serve his own corrupt self-interest.

This is just the start of Trump’s attacks against me personally. He went
after me again, and again, and again during the midterms.

He attacked me by name at his MAGA rallies.

He repeatedly smeared me on his social media website.

After calling me a traitor during his presidency and saying there used to
be a way of dealing with traitors.

Now, he’s sending a signal to every MAGA Republican that I’m Public Enemy
No. 1 — so I need your help to fight back.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=jun2023_abs_em.FUvtzW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230608_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=2455%2E5257348%2EBvFRWV ]Chip in any amount to help our campaign respond to Donald Trump’s
attack. Let’s win this Senate race and show Trump that the harder he tries
to tear down our democracy, this incredible grassroots movement will
protect it no matter what.

Thanks for adding your support at this critical time,

Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230608_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=2455%2E5257348%2EBvFRWV ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=jun2023_abs_em.hzT4iC&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20230608_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1015&akid=2455%2E5257348%2EBvFRWV ]DONATE MONTHLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=2455%2E5257348%2EBvFRWV ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=2455%2E5257348%2EBvFRWV ]Privacy Policy

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: Has our military gone woke?
body:
| | | From teaching radical transgender ideology to critical race theory, our military has gone _**woke.**_

We need to focus on teaching lethality, operations, and strategy - not pronouns.

Now, I’m asking YOU to step up to keep wokeness out of our armed forces. **

subject: IRS loophole allows ANYONE to collect up to $28,544 before June 13
body:
Thanks to a little-known IRS loophole...

| **" Amazon Loophole" could hand you $28,544 in "royalty" payouts** [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=01205f5cf3e8401bbd75cdbd76db5d57&_e=XHora7yw8_LpSKcVJOSJFrH-Ypy8R0CzGRd5qXSu4xsRDM9bbZSDANpz_LDeuSDbsS1GpDXBO3D1XaBpyO7syFKgCMQ2RPwMB3_z9P_4RMH9bKxGtKXB-evpbvao9F-BBJQ-ezKO7cBX3Fr7BVtPN03TpohAeJsT4gx5iemV0EKyTMkPouAebyIbc-mmufU6OddgDMO5JrMR0O0aL310cBVeOygc9EIg5KJ8QXjXEYDG1j2skn9jOBxfE6YgroFL) Thanks to a little-known IRS loophole... Regular Americans can **collect up to $28,544 (or more)** in payouts from what Brad Thomas calls the "Amazon secret royalty program..." And the best part is, there are:
* NO age or income requirements... (It's available to anyone 18+ or older)
* NO employment requirements... (You can be working part-time, full-time, or even be retired)
* And you NEVER have to shop or sell a single product on Amazon... (It only takes 5 minutes to set up!)

See how to collect the next payout before the strict cutoff deadline. **[Watch short video now.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=01205f5cf3e8401bbd75cdbd76db5d57&_e=XHora7yw8_LpSKcVJOSJFrH-Ypy8R0CzGRd5qXSu4xsRDM9bbZSDANpz_LDeuSDbsS1GpDXBO3D1XaBpyO7syFKgCMQ2RPwMB3_z9P_4RMFkhlmbYAEdi94paDTDo0tXwqtYbRJpRhlVmgDztinejoH-f5lsXf0Kv5TuC5ARBJ_ftC1tLNjGfC9eXP96k44i88u583U_iI_9M63XVAMTdjyoD4CY5ukms-0yWavcJdrl5zRxwXvyLKWnId4H316S)**

(It only takes 5 minutes to set up!) See how to collect the next payout before the strict cutoff deadline. ** Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:
Let’s talk!
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=38%2E1163%2Eq7SLoi)
I spent some time the other day calling some supporters who chipped in to emails like this one. _I had simply wonderful and truly insightful conversations with those supporters, and I hope I get the chance to talk with you directly as well._
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230608-1?refcode=em20230608-1&refcode2=38_1163_q7SLoi&akid=38%2E1163%2Eq7SLoi)
Lateefah calling folks who contributed through the links in our last email!
Your concerns — like getting dangerous guns off the street, protecting our environment, and tackling housing insecurity and affordability — are the exact reasons I am running for Congress. **I'm going to bring people together to make headway on some of the most intractable problems we can solve in DC while remaining unwavering in our East Bay convictions and values.**
I want to personally thank the grassroots supporters like you who are powering our movement by giving you a personal phone call to express my gratitude.

Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=15f2fe88019741ed98a1ea50dad4ad8c&_e=b_po1o4IP2B3PM0fUIAhnTb71mBYvbWQ3YZ6XLBv53flWLfiAmmwuqe95Le3Ew7CJ-zWZ1EWjmpgp2BU_gq2YAxquvg2ahyQ6eSYXwcLItvtsCcCbxK59AiRfs-hTIK4svMoDr4d2CC85fRJzzA6VoMY7W1mIVm-eEKDILiEORNLiWhNhFct8aWQ5QEJIXgGFgVQXMycymF1E_PuXD1BGKzpYQH6c0WN0IyoQ4fduz3H46AY4qA8vDMwG97t2H1hYZb11bmtrjx7_iHMw7lfhFNyXNd_bnw7u7hAf7jvWJRl1vAuJuq4ChaqxF4ffqi5)

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=15f2fe88019741ed98a1ea50dad4ad8c&_e=b_po1o4IP2B3PM0fUIAhnTb71mBYvbWQ3YZ6XLBv53flWLfiAmmwuqe95Le3Ew7CJ-zWZ1EWjmpgp2BU_gq2YAxquvg2ahyQ6eSYXwcLItvtsCcCbxK59AiRfs-hTIK4svMoDr4d2CC85fRJzzA6VnG2Jmc-pCvxgtJpXU_Kw4L9yyONe7EXthmUd6wpzwi5Tk6TMl9Oi2kRe3lqjD4dx7tZhf9OX3iUNutgfsh_X6rE1Rh4nQXkq1VSIfweoZ9xe1ZozcZbCL8QPaoCFOduBsxz_26-ZkMMTJRorpGVRZwOULUMp8hCsIgjgQzOaFF1)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=15f2fe88019741ed98a1ea50dad4ad8c&_e=b_po1o4IP2B3PM0fUIAhnTb71mBYvbWQ3YZ6XLBv53flWLfiAmmwuqe95Le3Ew7CJ-zWZ1EWjmpgp2BU_gq2YAxquvg2ahyQ6eSYXwcLItvtsCcCbxK59AiRfs-hTIK4svMoDr4d2CC85fRJzzA6Vkqypk8TmerpW_6pb1-XSTYHb8DNKSAYF9374RKTr-m2wv107f1AISStGu3oLSoEBtptPJgfAlWjuHdMKv6vdjm7HiU_JN4f4LT1O9TS5wg4KRM-x2gsKE0DaaSX5rMGV6focqrw2SHfYD_I9ccTyGq2eG4atjhQQ2tO-jJoKC-t)
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=15f2fe88019741ed98a1ea50dad4ad8c&_e=b_po1o4IP2B3PM0fUIAhnTb71mBYvbWQ3YZ6XLBv53flWLfiAmmwuqe95Le3Ew7CJ-zWZ1EWjmpgp2BU_gq2YAxquvg2ahyQ6eSYXwcLItvtsCcCbxK59AiRfs-hTIK4svMoDr4d2CC85fRJzzA6VspI3Syq7S1D-7E7iYIMwy_3AoMYi4d_LDDIpOi7_9j0EPUvBPIJo8K2tzl6WqVLXdVoUWPEjYH3DW5JOpKEKvitzhVcnpzobwgvEJYr77Z7DT05PmWHFJyWRsKgivx0Lll0oh_UWuyQrsKv-EF6pTSO0wY1-ijTIUPQDnpnO13a)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=15f2fe88019741ed98a1ea50dad4ad8c&_e=b_po1o4IP2B3PM0fUIAhnTb71mBYvbWQ3YZ6XLBv53flWLfiAmmwuqe95Le3Ew7CJ-zWZ1EWjmpgp2BU_gq2YAxquvg2ahyQ6eSYXwcLItvtsCcCbxK59AiRfs-hTIK4svMoDr4d2CC85fRJzzA6VjG5WKZ5kRJ3VMGV7c4dSiqpaixJs7UPyWXSMR2_k3z5rAGYb12Uk3tpJ4BTxF5GhrEmqEkQAH9CDF9XgxRNE6rqS_gxrYytSlSAjli2QhAM-_eVGr01Op4Ako7JTBhGkhRsZfIpcfwGI9BK4wHwoZIuvuD549bXnGNEqOYUv1xp) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=15f2fe88019741ed98a1ea50dad4ad8c&_e=b_po1o4IP2B3PM0fUIAhnTb71mBYvbWQ3YZ6XLBv53flWLfiAmmwuqe95Le3Ew7CJ-zWZ1EWjmpgp2BU_gq2YAxquvg2ahyQ6eSYXwcLItvtsCcCbxK59AiRfs-hTIK4svMoDr4d2CC85fRJzzA6Vv3s1YpIB_cHU53y-JmAdfjTdlcX8H67OunTEwYBW47U2PkExAundGQDEATnyGtSCYeu32YnhzjAyUJ_hRkJPymOqw7TiLNugEcFKKR5eSmNzEdd8tsR9gtGJKE6RdExgBrbI3w7KRrAZA-iDy41ljx4pXnNgtyQqH96SZRPVFGU)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=15f2fe88019741ed98a1ea50dad4ad8c&_e=b_po1o4IP2B3PM0fUIAhnTb71mBYvbWQ3YZ6XLBv53flWLfiAmmwuqe95Le3Ew7CJ-zWZ1EWjmpgp2BU_gq2YAxquvg2ahyQ6eSYXwcLItvtsCcCbxK59AiRfs-hTIK4svMoDr4d2CC85fRJzzA6Vro1gnGnd1exLZh4gnOhTjhXN4mSKnNsgHeO9QcF68o5lpSZ_vaYQ3Gtj8qwjM4vIB1jOLvbrhQNcp-c6y6uyCiaWJAJN2LFvHVVtpNk0h8J-aYBpN6WYPt9Y56l92iT5O965STwUF3-03h78095PS2Ou5XSmfMT-_Hcf1QJnJp9) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!

Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

As it continues to make these exceptional conditions all the more normal, ever more unprecedented wildfires will rage out of control, unleash untold destruction, and poison our air.
They will start to ravage places previously untouched by these disasters and grow even more catastrophic where they are already common. California’s 2020 wildfires will be repeated writ large.
**_Everyone will suffer._**

clean_body: The Climate Crisis is HERE AND NOW — but we still have time to fight back. = Team, this week, our nation has gotten a sneak peek of the apocalyptic new normal the Climate Crisis is bringing to life: = = = = The unprecedented Canadian wildfires, which are sending smoke hundreds of miles away, are a direct effect of the Climate Crisis driving drought and record-high temperatures. As it continues to make these exceptional conditions all the more normal, ever more unprecedented wildfires will rage out of control, unleash untold destruction, and poison our air. They will start to ravage places previously untouched by these disasters and grow even more catastrophic where they are already common. California’s 2020 wildfires will be repeated writ large. Everyone will suffer. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = = We refuse to sleepwalk through the apocalypse. body:
Re: Brandon’s war on corruption plan. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64547060/410420110/17860314?refcode=ea.95579256-3d06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.95579256-3d06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTU1NzkyNTYtM2QwNi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uH5K_ikDuFhAk0x035sIsCSCVNa6q9jLWIG_GM7ao-U=)

Peter, fighting corruption is Brandon's _number one_ priority, and we want to make sure everyone knows it!

Even the media can't get enough of his groundbreaking plan: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64547061/410420111/-1470085607?refcode=ea.95579256-3d06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.95579256-3d06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTU1NzkyNTYtM2QwNi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uH5K_ikDuFhAk0x035sIsCSCVNa6q9jLWIG_GM7ao-U=) Brandon’s message is simple: **As governor, he’s going to tell the special interest, lobbyists, and the good ol’ boys that the party is over.** [Please, take a moment to read Brandon’s Ethics Reform Plan below, then chip in $25 (or whatever you can) to help him defeat Tate Reeves and make this plan a reality for Mississippi >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64547062/410420112/-1470085607?amount=25&refcode=ea.95579256-3d06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.95579256-3d06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTU1NzkyNTYtM2QwNi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uH5K_ikDuFhAk0x035sIsCSCVNa6q9jLWIG_GM7ao-U=) | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64547063/410420113/-1470085607?refcode=ea.95579256-3d06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ms=ea.95579256-3d06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTU1NzkyNTYtM2QwNi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uH5K_ikDuFhAk0x035sIsCSCVNa6q9jLWIG_GM7ao-U=)**

* * *
Brandon Presley’s War on Corruption Plan
**CURB THE INFLUENCE OF LOBBYISTS AND GIANT CORPORATIONS**
* Limit the gifts that politicians could receive from lobbyists, and require regular disclosure of gifts and lobbying activities.

* Set boundaries on the unlimited flow of campaign contributions from individuals and groups, and ban direct contributions from corporations.

* Ban state politicians from receiving campaign contributions during the Legislative session.

* Enforce a one-year waiting period for former government officials to become lobbyists and vice versa.

* Implement tougher punishments for politicians who violate ethics and campaign finance laws.

* Open up the Legislature and state government to more transparency by expanding the open meetings law and holding every state agency accountable for responding to public records requests on time.

**CLEAN UP THE LARGEST PUBLIC CORRUPTION SCANDAL IN STATE HISTORY**
* Hire an independent investigator appointed by the Ethics Commission that cannot be fired by the governor or the legislature, a departure from Tate Reeves, who fired the investigator once he got too close to his lobbyist buddies who gave him football tickets.

* Create a Task Force on Public Integrity with appointments from the state auditor, attorney general, and executive director of the Department of Finance and Administration to review all state contracts and evaluate the performance of any recipient of taxpayer dollars, with a focus on the Department of Human Services because, under Tate Reeves’ watch as lieutenant governor, he failed to provide oversight of $77 million that was stolen or misspent at DHS.

**CREATE A STRONG, NON-PARTISAN WATCHDOG**
* Empower the Mississippi Ethics Commission to hold state government accountable as a non-partisan and independent body with the authority to audit, investigate and penalize politicians who violate ethics and campaign finance laws.

* The Ethics Commission will hold all campaign finance reporting and enforcement responsibilities.

* Require campaign finance reports to be available online and easily accessible to the public, and due every 30 days in an election year and quarterly in non-election years.

**RESTORE INTEGRITY TO THE GOVERNOR’S OFFICE**
* Establish a “Governor’s Blue Ribbon Task Force on Transparency and Accountability” comprised of private citizens and good governance experts. The Task Force shall recommend to the governor and legislature specific action items to clean up state government.

* Support legislation to prohibit companies seeking a license, permit, or non-competitive contract, along with their agents, PACs, and employees, from donating more than $250 to political campaigns from the date of solicitation and/or for 12 months after the final award is made.

* Require the governor’s office and all state agencies to keep records of all meetings with lobbyists and companies and individuals lobbying the government for contracts or legislation that benefits them.

The GOP could be forced to redraw the Congressional maps in states like Georgia, which could help us fight GOP gerrymandering and give us another Democratic leaning district.

clean_body: new district in Georgia? | | | BREAKING NEWS: Democrats win at Supreme Court The Supreme Court just upheld the Voting Rights Act and rejected a gerrymandered map in Alabama that would have diluted Black voters’ power. This is a major win for democracy that could have a wide-reaching impact everywhere. According to Democratic voting rights attorney Marc Elias, this ruling means Georgia could receive a new competitive Congressional district. The GOP could be forced to redraw the Congressional maps in states like Georgia, which could help us fight GOP gerrymandering and give us another Democratic leaning district. With such a slim GOP majority in Congress, this district could be the tipping point. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = This is HUGE news, Peter, and we need to start working IMMEDIATELY to both fight for fair maps and organize our voters to make sure we win a new district. =** Thank you, GA Dems | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

First up, we’ve got Governor **Brian Kemp** in Georgia.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64547456/410421405/1474372866?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230608_e_hallofshame1_v1s3_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzg3NjgzYi0zZTA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Iu4AhySMScOQB4C0I64zlJXE-m6MM66in65Gz73VQ4=&emci=9838271e-3806-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0c87683b-3e06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)
* During his time as Secretary of State, he oversaw canceling over 1.4 million voter registrations and advised closing a higher percentage of voting locations than in any other state — disproportionately silencing people of color.
* As governor, he has signed laws imposing burdensome voter ID requirements, restricting ballot dropboxes, criminalizing passing out food and water to voters in line, criminalizing hardworking county officials and denying them desperately-needed election funds, and several more.
* He has been at the forefront of some of the most dangerous and harmful anti-voting policies in the nation.

Next is Governor **Ron DeSantis** in Florida.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64547457/410421406/1474372866?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230608_e_hallofshame1_v1s3_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzg3NjgzYi0zZTA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Iu4AhySMScOQB4C0I64zlJXE-m6MM66in65Gz73VQ4=&emci=9838271e-3806-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0c87683b-3e06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)
* As governor, he has signed multiple laws to restrict the right to vote, including creating a state agency that could be used to criminalize and intimidate voters and implementing his version of a congressional map that reduced representation for Black voters.
* Just last month, he signed another law to restrict and penalize organizations working to register voters.
* His attacks on voting are just part of his ongoing and dangerous campaign to deny the people of Florida their fundamental freedoms — which extends to banning conversations about race and gender in schools.

Last but not least is Governor **Greg Abbott** in Texas.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64547458/410421407/1474372866?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230608_e_hallofshame1_v1s3_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzg3NjgzYi0zZTA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Iu4AhySMScOQB4C0I64zlJXE-m6MM66in65Gz73VQ4=&emci=9838271e-3806-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0c87683b-3e06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)
* He is at the helm of Texas extremists’ scheme to block voters from exercising their rights, with over 40 anti-voter bills proposed just this year.
* In 2021, he signed a sweeping restrictive voting law which he proclaimed was a “paradigm” for other states — further restricting vote-by-mail and creating new criminal and civil penalties for poll workers.
* He called for investigations into elections in Harris County, home to Houston, prompting lawmakers to introduce a bill that could allow the Secretary of State to take over how elections are run in the county.

[_**If these anti-democracy governors make you angry, we’re right there with you. Will you sign your name to show that you strongly oppose their nationwide extremist anti-voter agenda?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64547459/410421408/1474372866?refcode=bsc_emm_ffa_20230608_e_hallofshame1_v1s3_f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYzg3NjgzYi0zZTA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Iu4AhySMScOQB4C0I64zlJXE-m6MM66in65Gz73VQ4=&emci=9838271e-3806-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=0c87683b-3e06-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=1037277)

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Not great.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
First, the good news...

| **First, the good news:**

Our campaign is funded by a record number of individual donations made by people from all backgrounds and from all communities — almost all of these donations coming from working people united in their desire for change.

Meanwhile, poll after poll shows us leading against Senator Sinema and Kari Lake — winning in a 2 person race or three person race.

**Now, the bad news.**

The average donation to our campaign has slipped from $40, to $30, now all the way down to $21 this month. It’s a refreshing change for people sick of the role money plays in politics, but we haven’t had the number of donations so far in May to reach our goals. Not great.

So we have two options:

First, either we need lots and lots of donations to help us reach our goals. Or, we need people to chip in just a bit more than they normally would.

Normally we ask people who haven’t given to our Senate campaign to contribute $3.

But today, we need to ask you to do a bit more, if you can. Will you? For Ruben? For this race? For a good vote in the Senate for the next six years?

[_**Can you please split $10 between Ruben Gallego’s campaign for Senate in Arizona and Fight For Progress? Our goals are not arbitrary, they are set to reach what we need to win this race.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64547530/410421601/880176479?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230608-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgxYTNlMzk3LTNlMDYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fMoX9xs10ff8QdOipNP-Zd0tbXFFnhi7Z4DAXYO2400=)

clean_body: First, the good news... | First, the good news: Our campaign is funded by a record number of individual donations made by people from all backgrounds and from all communities — almost all of these donations coming from working people united in their desire for change. Meanwhile, poll after poll shows us leading against Senator Sinema and Kari Lake — winning in a 2 person race or three person race. Now, the bad news. The average donation to our campaign has slipped from $40, to $30, now all the way down to $21 this month. It’s a refreshing change for people sick of the role money plays in politics, but we haven’t had the number of donations so far in May to reach our goals. Not great. So we have two options: First, either we need lots and lots of donations to help us reach our goals. Or, we need people to chip in just a bit more than they normally would. Normally we ask people who haven’t given to our Senate campaign to contribute $3. But today, we need to ask you to do a bit more, if you can. Will you? For Ruben? For this race? For a good vote in the Senate for the next six years? = | = | = Thank you. We don’t have any billionaires waiting in the wings to fund this campaign. It’s up to us. Together. For Arizona. For America. Ruben Gallego for Arizona * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. body:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64548460/410425205/71430186?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=100,50,25,5&code=jtk198-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjU0YWNjZi00MDA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fOWEYCON0EfJsw18TvRTagVQkZexQmpMnmqO8Gcxjhk=&emci=40b23137-6e05-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=1b54accf-4006-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=18332626)

Peter, background checks are a crucial way we can ensure that guns aren’t getting into the hands of the wrong people, like convicted felons and abusers.

**Right now, our current legislation is broken and filled with loopholes, including:**
* Unlicensed private sellers, doing business online and at gun shows, aren’t required to do a background check on buyers, opening the door to millions of dangerous gun sales.

* All gun purchases at licensed sellers are allowed to move forward by default if a background check takes longer than 3 business days, allowing those illegally prohibited to obtain deadly weapons.

These NRA-backed loopholes have opened the door for thousands of people to illegally obtain firearms.

We must fix this broken system and amend our laws to protect our country and our communities.

[_**Will you sign onto our petition by 9:00 AM and urge Congress to close these loopholes and pass universal background checks on all gun purchases?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64548546/410425634/-127820196?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NTkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjExMjZiODYtNDEwNi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qsnsLb7eO-MRd95BoyVNE5i5W_RreNATup-J5s4O5Y0=&emci=5ab761c7-2406-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=61126b86-4106-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=7937656)

name: Crow HQ
subject: Half a pack of cigarettes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
|
#
---
Folks – it doesn’t take a scientist to tell you that climate change is real. All you need to do is look outside: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64548555/410425646/-2136351806?amount=5&refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_RES_AC30_20230608_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDEyNmI4Ni00MTA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5haonqQqgOfQ2U93Te718sMGp3fdy8TP9nuEO8SEP9Y=) This is the sight Americans on the east coast are seeing right now. _Pure orange fog._ Major wildfires are ripping through Canada, pushing that smoke downwards. The result? Being outside for 24 hours in this air quality would be equivalent to smoking half a pack of cigarettes. But dystopian scenes like today’s are just the beginning. These devastating wildfires — including recent ones in Colorado — are a glimpse of what’s in store if we don’t take immediate action. Frequent wildfires. Drought. Flash floods. The climate crisis isn’t some distant issue. Coloradans know full well that the problem is right here, right now. **It’s past time we 1) agree that climate change is real, and 2) take the bold action necessary to stave off the worst of the climate crisis.** [_**Our kids deserve a healthy, livable planet. Jason is committed to climate action — today and every day. clean_body: | Folks – it doesn’t take a scientist to tell you that climate change is real. All you need to do is look outside: = This is the sight Americans on the east coast are seeing right now. Pure orange fog. Major wildfires are ripping through Canada, pushing that smoke downwards. The result? Being outside for 24 hours in this air quality would be equivalent to smoking half a pack of cigarettes. But dystopian scenes like today’s are just the beginning. These devastating wildfires — including recent ones in Colorado — are a glimpse of what’s in store if we don’t take immediate action. Frequent wildfires. Drought. Flash floods. The climate crisis isn’t some distant issue. Coloradans know full well that the problem is right here, right now. It’s past time we 1) agree that climate change is real, and 2) take the bold action necessary to stave off the worst of the climate crisis. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Let’s do everything we can to protect the Colorado (and world) we love. — Team Crow | Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. I've dedicated my life to inspiring MILLIONS of young people to love America again and to WIN the American Culture War. **Now Turning Point USA and I are taking on the secretive World Economic Forum (WEF) and their dangerous GREAT RESET agenda ... and I want to reach as many Americans AS POSSIBLE with our important plan to DEFEAT the Great Reset.** [**Because this fight is so important, I am GIVING AWAY my new book,_The American Response to the Great Reset,_ for a gift of ANY AMOUNT to Turning Point USA. Please make your gift and claim your book right now.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3b5e83bcc12e48018b45194ef084fbcb&_e=VFhVEpUhxZfACM7RlyQiWdYQcQhU4nGYmHGl9bG_k7DTLI1YixKoFkZ4t_y4ft_vu19DWbBGn4W-BTVTBhj1bl63sNHHZdRZobWhnPGEgVSNB-mc5jo7wURsfEcLbmCp29hhrgXNXz7EN3VCNA2FhVXydZ7EvcTgm21ida0x2wpFzoRD4cauyB9IWBq1ttIu6-uy5enh0lE05LkMTUyniWQrdcdCfXw9h4qXUDjmB7hx4jpaByvwqSEMuFIXdTSUdHeBJtoADSNG4g7f1we2uPZjretedz0KWk6YxiFFxLA%3D)

If you're trying to understand the MASSIVE challenges in America today, from skyrocketing inflation to wide-open national borders to medical tyranny ... you must read this book. If you want to make a difference and preserve FREEDOM, PROSPERITY, and AMERICAN GREATNESS for your kids and your grandkids ... you must read this book. | | | | | Peter, **It’s getting close. June 20th is our chance to ensure abortion remains legal in Virginia next year.**_ _ _We only have a slim one vote pro-choice majority in the State Senate because_ _ __one of 2 Democrats who make up our majority, Joe Morrissey, is a "pro-life" Democrat who'll sign any awful anti-choice Republican garbage._ [**_But we have the perfect solution!__ __If you join us, in less than two weeks we'll replace the anti-choicer with progressive champion & former State Delegate. Laschrecse Aird, who's challenging Morrissey in the June 20th primary._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3115cd9f-3297-4204-84f9-7b2f02853b7b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Aird is exactly the kind of candidate we must get behind. She grew up impoverished to a teenage mother and father who worked multiple jobs to get by. This motivated Aird to run for the VA House of Delegates. _ _In 2021, she was named Legislator of the Year by the Virginia Education Association. Aird was also lauded by the Virginia Chamber of Commerce for job creation. Two very different groups--both seeing Aird's __accomplishment and integrity. Now that's someone who can bring people together._ _Not surprisingly, when comparing Aird to Morrissey, this was the result:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbf3b9372-4e1e-428a-87a9-07ab1bb035aa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Aird has made abortion rights the centerpiece of her campaign, running for "Roe Not Joe." She'll be taking that fight all the way to June 20th, but early voting has begun, so we must **SUPPORT AIRD** **NOW** or risk an anti-choice majority! _ [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action's own "Roe Not Joe," fundraiser, and support Lashrecse Aird with $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taae9467e-c45f-446d-80be-7bfa39bd7e0a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you! | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7d191f7c-58bf-4657-be6a-7a4e1fbf4402/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

June 20th is our chance to ensure abortion remains legal in Virginia next year. We only have a slim one vote pro-choice majority in the State Senate because one of 2 Democrats who make up our majority, Joe Morrissey, is a "pro-life" Democrat who'll sign any awful anti-choice Republican garbage. Aird is exactly the kind of candidate we must get behind. She grew up impoverished to a teenage mother and father who worked multiple jobs to get by. This motivated Aird to run for the VA House of Delegates. In 2021, she was named Legislator of the Year by the Virginia Education Association. Aird was also lauded by the Virginia Chamber of Commerce for job creation. Two very different groups--both seeing Aird's accomplishment and integrity. Now that's someone who can bring people together. Not surprisingly, when comparing Aird to Morrissey, this was the result: Aird has made abortion rights the centerpiece of her campaign, running for "Roe Not Joe." She'll be taking that fight all the way to June 20th, but early voting has begun, so we must SUPPORT AIRD NOW or risk an anti-choice majority! Thank you! | | 100% of your support goes directly to this campaign Peter,

On June 20, we have the opportunity to replace the last anti-choice Democrat in the Virginia Senate with a proud EMILYs Lister: **Lashrecse Aird (VA-SD13)**.

body:

Gracias, Peter — so many of you filled out the survey earlier this week to share your thoughts and stories with me and I am so grateful for the time you took to do that. You shared stories of being worried about cuts to Medicare and Social Security, of not knowing whether you were eligible to vote and struggling to understand voting requirements. You shared about members of your family that are worried about losing access to Veterans benefits. You shared your concerns about the proliferation of guns in America, and in Texas specifically. Many of you expressed support for common-sense gun safety and keeping military-grade weapons off our streets and out of our schools. **[Peter, your stories and concerns are the reason I am running to represent TX-15. South Texans deserve an advocate in Congress who will fight for the issues that matter to YOU and your family — and with your help, I’ll get to Washington and do just that. Will you chip in now to support getting a real people’s champion in Congress?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_0FC_k2Bnfg6hSnLGD2lvvFjm8D75SMWvgPFIbnc4h_nYCI5j3GPzlNBrXVt5LCTeSGjZd5LzVJBsvgV3nzobvIhOHAjOFPvIVub9CFKR7q4YS1qQrrJQYlTaP-d2hIOXx3spohY7Ac8edGuo1fgP92hok0WKOBxp1y1-KL2ftsLKx2xWap9h_1_ATg7i1M6OkNSnzvjsuhOKvsiAkEpqVUF7iVyvtFhVgDUw55AQmDaQO9D0VVhIgqIQEgi2YwNJ5koCknf7vnQzmF7w1QV4FuQxxqqI7JvjfdDxpULMQpFkrPq8Glzngk6n7DvYmENsDmRIShfGkTwJVaGY2UngLtVKabTDuSMYGm-qnU5xmDUtQBZ2I_JPc4aphpy6q-8v/3wv/dIPjaphzTKyctXfVrAdA9A/h1/4Yjv5xqyILWraC2BAKxv4i7WBXkZjt_YB_4Ah2EQk0k)** **[Donate](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ySVaDaV5oWUMSiiW973_z_0FC_k2Bnfg6hSnLGD2lvvFjm8D75SMWvgPFIbnc4h_mo02TFAbyOABAUjSmnvCFv1t2foudcgQIy5oqt0OSgoi34NzMhk24dpC7n_hoTgh9a49jQDktr9PbgaCjmR2DxsNLXRCSrIXpKNmijOTQQuwPIedIK7AdjC3KYPj70-gibH-Gu2annuytjmsxZq9jLLFkxqo8nIJt1cmko5MQBBi66XhuUaEmgMGeKtNoQ3ELf8lE1-k6mkOYV9PmpHZEuY59O0t9JcOGGIQWXuLDMIc4AJHGbVPaEgKChTdC5SaTaRhsqw84YHcf2HDnv0SrU7BJRn1qo763gNb6GXNCSXlRit_xbsvEse5CH8sEpVFRURA0GjBePh1vxM8KKdJ2T/3wv/dIPjaphzTKyctXfVrAdA9A/h2/vEtsq6j4vSdtrx6ufUjseYDow0gKsVwFUpVXiglJRnc)** Monica De La Cruz has proven time and again that she’s not in Congress to fight for the concerns of real people on the ground. name: =?utf-8?Q?Becky=20Edwards=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Together, Let's Uphold Our Commitment to Utah
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BECKY EDWARDS FOR CONGRESS
body:
It is with great honor that I announce my candidacy for the U.S. House, seeking to represent our beloved state of Utah in the special election. | | | | |
---
# Commitment to Utah
|
---
Hello Team Becky!
Your support in my Senate race last year meant the world to me, and I want you to be the first to know that I am running for Congress to replace Chris Stewart as the representative for Utah’s Second Congressional District!
**I need you on my team, and hope I can count on your support again!**
My family loves a good sports analogy, and so I’d like to share one that has been on my mind since I decided to run again.Last year, Team Becky gave everything and left it all on the field.
It took all of us to gather signatures, attend rallies, place lawn signs, and grow our grassroots effort to to get on the primary ballot. We made it to the “championship game,” if you will. We may not have won, but our team set historic records. We received:
1. The MOST votes for a challenger in a U.S. Senate Primary in the history of Utah;
2. The MOST individual campaign contributions (individual donors) in the history of Utah; and
3. The MOST primary votes for a woman in a statewide primary race in the history of Utah

This time? **We’re taking home the title!**
**How you can help:**
You can [**gather signatures**](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=e31e8afb67&e=6484bb6dd5), follow and engage on social media, and [**donate**](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=f32f5ade8b&e=6484bb6dd5).
**We cannot do this alone.**
I am excited and eager to come together again in this special congressional election. Let’s do this!
Becky
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | [DONATE](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=265e56de6a&e=6484bb6dd5)
---
| | [VOLUNTEER](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=340a324939&e=6484bb6dd5)
---
|
---

Becky Edwards for Congress PO Box 26141 Alexandria, VA 22313-6141 USA

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I believe that these are the types of fights our elected leaders should be taking on
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Big problems require big solutions.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20230608-8403-header&t=1&akid=8403%2E434096%2EClzzuy)
Derek,
I first ran for office because I’d studied how the system was rigged against hardworking people, and I wanted to do something about it.
I’m running for re-election because while we’ve made tremendous progress together, we’ve still got some serious challenges ahead of us.
The governor of Idaho recently signed an extreme “abortion trafficking” bill into law — restricting residents from traveling for abortions in states where it's legal.
Two Black lawmakers in Tennessee were expelled from the state House last month for peacefully protesting against gun violence following a horrific mass shooting in Nashville.
Anti-LGBTQ+ legislation is popping up all over, threatening the right to health care, expression, and safety for trans, gender-nonconforming, and nonbinary people.
Our judiciary system has been hijacked by the far-right, and these institutions continue to give the public more and more reason to lose trust. The more recent examples? I could bring up how a federal judge in Texas ruled to reverse the FDA’s approval of mifepristone — one of the most common methods of abortion. Or, I could go with the recent revelation that Justice Clarence Thomas has been accepting undisclosed luxury trips and other favors from GOP megadonor Harlan Crow.
Look: I won’t sugarcoat what we’re up against. Our values and rights are under siege from powerful interests. The gun lobby. Anti-abortion radicals. Big Pharma. Fossil fuel giants. Right-wing extremists. All using their deep pockets to block change. All hoping that we’ll get so frustrated we just tune out. Yeah, right.
**[I’m going to keep doing everything in my power to stand up to these extremists and fight for the bold, systemic change we need to protect our democracy and our values. If you’re able to, please split a donation of $5 between me and John Fetterman to help continue this fight.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230608-1?refcode=em20230608-1-8403&refcode2=8403_434096_Clzzuy&akid=8403%2E434096%2EClzzuy)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230608-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230608-8403&refcode2=8403_434096_Clzzuy&akid=8403%2E434096%2EClzzuy)**
Big problems require big solutions, and I’m in this fight all the way.
We can end the filibuster, pass a national law protecting abortion rights across the country, and expand the Supreme Court to rebalance this hijacked institution and prevent more damage from being done.
We can pass my Judicial Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act to give Americans confidence that their judges are held to the highest ethical standards and are free from conflicts of interest.
We can continue mobilizing across the country and provide resources for critical local downballot races, ensuring that pro-democracy candidates are leading the charge to protect our rights and election integrity in the states.
Real change doesn't just happen because of decisions made in Washington. It happens because people all across the country get into the fight — pushing from the outside while elected officials work on the inside.
I'll keep up the fight in the Senate, but I'm counting on you to stay in the fight, too.
**[If you believe that these are the types of fights our elected leaders should be taking on, please pitch in $5 to support my re-election campaign and John Fetterman to fuel this fight. I’m so grateful for your support.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230608-1?refcode=em20230608-1-8403&refcode2=8403_434096_Clzzuy&akid=8403%2E434096%2EClzzuy)**
Thanks for being a part of this, Derek,
Elizabeth

**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230608-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230608-8403&refcode2=8403_434096_Clzzuy&akid=8403%2E434096%2EClzzuy)**

[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
---|---|---
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8403%2E434096%2EClzzuy)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8403%2E434096%2EClzzuy)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.
