name: Team Salinas
subject: Celebrating the LGBTQ+ community
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
Happy Pride Month, team!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64549329/410428884/-1979597813?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.08_b1_ts_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTI3YzBlNC00NjA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cKayNHViMHITW1OEfstfz4K761cdcy6ckRrnXuWqoMM=)
---
Happy Pride Month, team! **This month, we get the opportunity to celebrate the LGBTQ+ culture, community, and history.** It’s also a chance to highlight the LGBTQ+ Oregonians who have helped shape our state. But this Pride Month, it’s important that we recognize the unprecedented attacks the LGBTQ+ community is facing. Republicans have introduced countless anti-LGBTQ+ bills targeting transgender children and their parents, criminalizing their free speech and expression, and making our LGBTQ+ friends and family live in fear. **As the mother of an LGBTQ+ daughter, the fight for equality is personal for Andrea. name: CaucusRoom
subject: When Conspiracy Theories Come True
body:
What You Need To Know Today! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-alkjdut-trhiujldw-e/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alkjdut-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Thursday!**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alkjdut-trhiujldw-y/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alkjdut-trhiujldw-j/) **Not a Right Wing Conspiracy** **[Half of gas stove models sold in the United States today won't comply with a first-ever efficiency regulation](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alkjdut-trhiujldw-t/) **on cooking appliances, according to a new analysis from the Department of Energy. **Here to Stay** An estimated**[2 million immigrants released from the southern border into the interior U.S. likely will not face removal](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alkjdut-trhiujldw-i/). **Meanwhile, Robert Kennedy Jr has**[accused Biden of presiding over an 'open border' ](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alkjdut-trhiujldw-d/)**with Mexico and allowing thousands of migrants to illegally break into the U.S. **Addicts Love It** New York City, as a **["public health" strategy, has unveiled "drug-themed vending machines,"](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alkjdut-trhiujldw-h/)** according to the New York Post, and the devices are "a huge hit with local addicts."

**Climate Change or Summer?** **[AOC pushed the Green New Deal](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alkjdut-trhiujldw-k/) **in reaction to record-hot temperatures in Puerto Rico and wildfire smoke from Canada overwhelming U.S. East Coast cities. **Amazing Photo!** Brazilian photographer has finally [**succeeded in capturing an incredible picture of Christ the Redeemer appearing to 'hold' the moon** ](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alkjdut-trhiujldw-u/)with both hands after three years of failed attempts. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alkjdut-trhiujldw-o/)!**
* **[Video Proof](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alkjdut-trhiujldw-x/)**.
* A helpful **[guide](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alkjdut-trhiujldw-m/).**
* **[We're not](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alkjdut-trhiujldw-c/) **gonna take it!
* **[Spam](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-alkjdut-trhiujldw-q/)**.

Our aim is to ensure common-sense legislation is prioritized by our legislators and build a better Virginia. That’s why your opinion matters to us the most. | Every response helps us better understand the most urgent issues facing Virginians. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64549362/410429031/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjAxMDU0My00NzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0sHxmiV9qCC38Gfw_5JUgKcZJgRovP_lhlnscaE6vrc=&emci=ba54e560-4406-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&emdi=32010543-4706-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&ceid=9494239)

| | **BREAKING NEWS:** Today the United States Supreme Court ruled that Alabama's Republican led legislature diluted the power of Black voters by drawing a congressional map with only a single Black majority district. **This is a win for Alabama, for America, and for our democracy.** Our democracy relies on the integrity of our elections, but gerrymandering, like we saw in Alabama, does nothing but undermine our democracy. I applaud the court for upholding the law and protecting our democracy. **But this singular win will not restore our democracy.** We must pass the America Votes Act, a bill I introduced in Congress to protect and expand the right to vote across America. Our grassroots campaign will not stop fighting for voting rights because every American deserves a voice, and that is why: I am fighting to make vote-by-mail a national right. I am fighting to ensure same day registration for EVERY American. I am fighting to end pernicious voter ID laws. American Democracy is a gift given to us by the many generations who fought for our rights, and now it is our responsibility to lead this fight. Our grassroots campaign is fighting to protect our democratic values. **[Can I count on you to join this fight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64549363/410429032/1596212816?refcode=2023-06-09-scotus&recurring=0&amount=17&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=32010543-4706-ee11-907c-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjAxMDU0My00NzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0sHxmiV9qCC38Gfw_5JUgKcZJgRovP_lhlnscaE6vrc=)** name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4db640f404e643aabc7cd2fa22e49769&_e=eI6PVmYg0OgM9CXPK_qeBAHyYiDYxc_qyPBh1svU0rrXRIK-RFpbf58OjcExjRPBwehA8D71tbLJKNeQ8xH_JGfvR-GDFj-4fvc5YqXyglPeckmoVkD5vCHQ3yMHDZkhw5jxk5cGxJilV1OJq4qYGH6HROby5Zk_Bx1mqQDyPUWOw9abdkapp__LijMndNtv_nzsKE75ybNmmJG_n9xMTFLVQXhDZ4elMALsTcKn2OiDxDbiAMZC_I_ouhL0PAkS-vutqrTHZBz3-wmoOhy1W4WObNW-B7XqzDiBRq8s1AfQfxVGTs-W1Xgj_KHrmp_UZrsdI6HWM6K2mqqK1RuxysPd4A-wmJCc93ALhmyN6p-sqDhmuedCOIlARFRxCNzN3SjMT6RM6nj0mnvaTnmFDE7oes1UCN39iXqgoTqmuEc%3D) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars."
Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4db640f404e643aabc7cd2fa22e49769&_e=eI6PVmYg0OgM9CXPK_qeBAHyYiDYxc_qyPBh1svU0rrXRIK-RFpbf58OjcExjRPBwehA8D71tbLJKNeQ8xH_JGfvR-GDFj-4fvc5YqXyglPeckmoVkD5vCHQ3yMHDZkhw5jxk5cGxJilV1OJq4qYGH6HROby5Zk_Bx1mqQDyPUWOw9abdkapp__LijMndNtv_nzsKE75ybNmmJG_n9xMTFLVQXhDZ4elMALsTcKn2OiDxDbiAMZC_I_ouhL0PAkS-vutqrTHZBz3-wmoOhy1WwTXj7PC0ifnVrsL1PFqI05-8tGoz1BWFj3zgcIID51y9jNNfknn20nnpEs3QxWvtt07GmAhvBaUftqbKxK2R7LeoTX-2tFIaIW7O6M4ud1QiCSuTUMUkREuX01GvjA5aqfMryxlFqefvcxxmCDIBCA%3D) If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "**The Second World Wars** " on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4db640f404e643aabc7cd2fa22e49769&_e=eI6PVmYg0OgM9CXPK_qeBAHyYiDYxc_qyPBh1svU0rrXRIK-RFpbf58OjcExjRPBwehA8D71tbLJKNeQ8xH_JGfvR-GDFj-4fvc5YqXyglPeckmoVkD5vCHQ3yMHDZkhw5jxk5cGxJilV1OJq4qYGH6HROby5Zk_Bx1mqQDyPUWOw9abdkapp__LijMndNtv_nzsKE75ybNmmJG_n9xMTFLVQXhDZ4elMALsTcKn2OiDxDbiAMZC_I_ouhL0PAkS-vutqrTHZBz3-wmoOhy1WzKLPIcV_t6iKCUNpFw7bXzlxS5g3ZyVnLcCx2EXu505-MZm8DwrU8KigfD47k7tuGI16d-bOUccclWLJG96ZO4ekYQIvaAdaqPrLw6ViIy9mccdHqZUZSMHjqidx_KwGnO8P01ORV01KBoaqfrleVc%3D)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

clean_body: Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we're losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled "The Second World Wars." Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict's diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here's a secure link to reserve your copy of "The Second World Wars " on DVD: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

_(Me getting a fresh cut)_
Hey folks, happy Thursday!

I wanted to take a moment to tell you a bit about why I’m in this fight. I’m not the kind of guy you’d expect to see in Congress. I still get $12 flattop haircuts. And at home on the farm, I butcher my own meat.

I didn’t come to Washington to play into partisan hogwash – I came because I didn’t see anyone in our government sticking up for rural communities like mine.

I’m running to continue to deliver for Montanans, from holding our government accountable to standing up for veterans and protecting the Montana way of life.

**But with Mitch McConnell and his dark money backers hellbent on taking back the Senate majority and targeting my seat to make their pipe dream a reality, I’ll need all the help I can get from my grassroots team.**
**[Will you split a donation of any amount today between my campaign and American Bridge to help protect our Democratic majority and keep me fighting in the Senate for hardworking Montanans and their families?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64550234/410432128/-154960198?amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2701-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzMjNkMDgxLTQ4MDYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=s9YHrnPUgAR0BMPXU2LF6rqSYRT2-U6MGyluMBC93CI=)**

I didn’t come to Washington to play into partisan hogwash – I came because I didn’t see anyone in our government sticking up for rural communities like mine. I’m running to continue to deliver for Montanans, from holding our government accountable to standing up for veterans and protecting the Montana way of life. But with Mitch McConnell and his dark money backers hellbent on taking back the Senate majority and targeting my seat to make their pipe dream a reality, I’ll need all the help I can get from my grassroots team. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Jon Tester and American Bridge PAC will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for chipping in. I’m grateful you’re in this fight with me. – Jon | | | | | | | | | | | From taking down Trump in 2020 to expanding the Senate majority in 2022, American Bridge is working around the clock to hold Republicans accountable and DEFEAT them by making sure Democrats around the country are elected up and down the ballot. A monthly donation is the most impactful way to power our critical work. Please, will you make a monthly recurring donation right now? | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Add Your Name: We need federal LGBTQ+ protections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=24421%2E3422442%2EPSVi5W)
Derek,
No person in America should be discriminated against or face violence for who they are, how they express themselves, or what their gender identity or sexual orientation is.
But for LGBTQ+ people in many states—especially for queer and trans kids—it’s their daily reality, and it’s only getting worse. This year alone, Republicans have introduced 400 bills to restrict the rights of transgender and non-binary Americans, and dozens have been passed into law.
This isn’t just a red-state problem. Right here in Huntington Beach, the Board of Supervisors just voted to ban the Pride flag from being flown on county property.
In the face of a record-shattering wave of dangerous and discriminatory anti-LGBTQ+ state legislation, **the Human Rights Campaign declared a state of emergency for LGBTQ+ Americans for the first time in its history.**
[**Federal protections for the LGBTQ+ community are long overdue and urgently needed. If you agree, will you sign our petition?**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/20230608-em-lgbtq-protections/?source=EMAI08_1_PRI_20230608_V1_F&t=2&akid=24421%2E3422442%2EPSVi5W)
**[Sign our petition ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/20230608-em-lgbtq-protections/?source=EMAI08_1_PRI_20230608_V1_F&t=3&akid=24421%2E3422442%2EPSVi5W)**
Katie will always stand with the LGBTQ+ community in California and across the country. In Congress, she was proud to vote YES on the Equality Act, to prevent discrimination based on sexual orientation and gender identity. While this bill passed the House in 2021, it stalled in the Senate—thanks to the filibuster.
Katie is running for US Senate, where she’ll continue fighting for legislation so that LGBTQ+ Americans are protected. [**Your support will help make that possible.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230608-1?refcode=EMAI08_1_PRI_20230608_V1_F&refcode2=24421_3422442_PSVi5W&akid=24421%2E3422442%2EPSVi5W)
**[Sign our petition ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/20230608-em-lgbtq-protections/?source=EMAI08_1_PRI_20230608_V1_F&t=4&akid=24421%2E3422442%2EPSVi5W)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230608-1?refcode=EMAI08_1_PRI_20230608_V1_F&refcode2=24421_3422442_PSVi5W&akid=24421%2E3422442%2EPSVi5W)**
—Team Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAI08_1_PRI_20230608_V1_F&t=5&refcode2=24421_3422442_PSVi5W&akid=24421%2E3422442%2EPSVi5W)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=6&akid=24421%2E3422442%2EPSVi5W)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=24421%2E3422442%2EPSVi5W)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Team AOC
subject: We wouldn't ask if it wasn't important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
We know some of you are asking why you should make a donation to a candidate in a non-election year. Here are 3 reasons why:
1\. **_We rely entirely on you._** Our campaign takes 0 corporate donations. There’s no super PAC coming to protect us from the attacks constantly coming our way.
2\. **_We are organizing year round._** Today, we gave out 2,000 masks to protect our constituents from the Canadian wildfire smoke. During the pandemic, we ran a food distribution program for over a year. In 2021, our Census outreach saved a congressional seat. Our free-tutoring program served over 1,000 students.
3\. **_Disinformation and hate speech never takes a break._** Last week, Elon Musk personally spread disinformation about Alexandria to millions of people. Fox News mentioned Alexandria _76 times a day_ when she first got elected. We are constantly fighting back against disinformation and hate speech from every direction.
[We know you can make a donation to a lot of different places right now. But we hope we’ve explained why we hope you’ll keep giving here — even if it’s small. Our average donation is $14.70, but today can you chip in $3 to keep our campaign going strong?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230608-1.F0qmTS&refcode=em20230608-4447-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4447%2E2526796%2E5yG_62)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230608-1.F0qmTS&refcode=em20230608-4447-P_FND_EGR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=4447%2E2526796%2E5yG_62)**
From all of us here on the campaign, we thank you for your continued support.
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230608-1?refcode=em20230608-4447-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=21&refcode2=4447_2526796_5yG_62&akid=4447%2E2526796%2E5yG_62)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230608-4447-P_FND_EGR_GOL&t=22&akid=4447%2E2526796%2E5yG_62)**

name: Mike Pence
subject: Putting my hat in the ring
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Pence For President
body:
This is not a decision I came to overnight, Friend. It has taken years of prayerful consideration with my wife Karen and our family.
I believe that God and the Constitution must return to the forefront of our families, our communities and our government.

This is not a decision I came to overnight, Friend. It has taken years of prayerful consideration with my wife Karen and our family.

After many long nights and longer conversations, we came to this conclusion: Our nation is at a crossroads, and the decisions we make next will chart our nation's course for decades to come.

**I believe that God and the Constitution must return to the forefront of our families, our communities and our government.**
---
| | | [JOIN TEAM PENCE](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=190fc17c8a97468786cde8993b9949cd&_e=7IxL7DlpCqCYIIfr7zxoN3AnOCpfEBDTk4ayZYAgvKuUosXEAJWaKTVxqPgy12A8IqfdqbBa4sxvQ0DO0uTX-tew5-AqEyXEcNIJNbmnZYj1IdREGy1P0WN9XH_yupGRGTsWBdsfjB-ljp8W-lnrJXVm-pzvApbqUyQVNIXvpFTrg8Q5c0DVmioAxjfwNvSlY6HvePC5qTnm00yPjnEBT_0uI16etVXdArw68xfq-K0S20L0MDDg42DP4L9UYWO3ahKezf3ey4ejcUJmEextsBtyJiyS3TN9Yam8PTiAFZwWHioBtj56xnlvHBJw2k-QJaQgleLz_HVfsYqfn65AMpGZ5aV7SmxglyvsE81DrLK6Lvo0eO7FmTRGBZ-KHXwRuCwGQCiSbNFEnUBy94lcNQ%3D%3D)
---
Growing up in Indiana, surrounded by God-fearing, hardworking Hoosiers, I always knew that I wanted to give back to the state and the country that had given me so much. During the Trump-Pence administration, I was able to take steps toward achieving that goal with conservative policies that put American families FIRST.

**But our work is far from over. **

Our values have never been under attack like they are today: from our schools, to our police departments, all the way to the car sitting in your driveway, Biden's White House and their far-left elitists have never been less connected to Americans' day-to-day lives, yet they have more say over what we do than ever before.

**Bottom line: America is in dire need of common sense leadership. From one God-fearing conservative to another, I 'm asking YOU to be a leading voice in our campaign to bring our country back to what it once was.**
---
| | | [JOIN TEAM PENCE](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=190fc17c8a97468786cde8993b9949cd&_e=7IxL7DlpCqCYIIfr7zxoN3AnOCpfEBDTk4ayZYAgvKuUosXEAJWaKTVxqPgy12A8IqfdqbBa4sxvQ0DO0uTX-tew5-AqEyXEcNIJNbmnZYj1IdREGy1P0WN9XH_yupGRGTsWBdsfjB-ljp8W-lnrJXVm-pzvApbqUyQVNIXvpFTrg8Q5c0DVmioAxjfwNvSlY6HvePC5qTnm00yPjnEBT_0uI16etVXdArw68xfq-K0S20L0MDDg42DP4L9UYWO3qwt-xJnj5VS8dqozNVyV2AC7GwIngL_RcsigmbMiY2bxfQskrlzlGN5THrpiI1xLO4yz9XWGohYLs6XErspMGj3puy-pXFwCGHuX6ldtH5V3I5VQkPX4fl17c4QsW18A27L9CZswVit8EIdTg6KTFA%3D%3D)
---
_**[If you want to return to common sense, God-fearing leadership, then I ask that you make a $15 gift to our campaign today.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=190fc17c8a97468786cde8993b9949cd&_e=7IxL7DlpCqCYIIfr7zxoN3AnOCpfEBDTk4ayZYAgvKuUosXEAJWaKTVxqPgy12A8IqfdqbBa4sxvQ0DO0uTX-tew5-AqEyXEcNIJNbmnZYj1IdREGy1P0WN9XH_yupGRGTsWBdsfjB-ljp8W-lnrJXVm-pzvApbqUyQVNIXvpFTrg8Q5c0DVmioAxjfwNvSlY6HvePC5qTnm00yPjnEBT_0uI16etVXdArw68xfq-K0S20L0MDDg42DP4L9UYWO3qs6E8cKFC-HBqinMYspYGp3rkx__CxvVe79J3k6h5IH88xp5WeCEOWd0aupyA9AQEFOLe8Nl4RKkEBoBP58U8WMplvLyxgizrbMbkx9ukTquF0MlmJtfwZvFQcG2o3SiGNbCihG3WaD8YwOLdYB3-w%3D%3D "If you want to return to common sense, God-fearing leadership, then I ask that you make a $15 gift to our campaign today.")**_

If Bidenflation is hurting you too much to get involved financially, that's perfectly ok. I simply ask that you keep our campaign and everyone involved in your prayers - we're going to need it.

Thank you for your time, Friend, you'll be hearing a lot more from me soon.

God bless you and God bless America,
---

---|---|---
Probably the worst kept secret in all of politics was that Florida Governor Ron DeSantis would run for president of the United States. I served with Ron in the U.S. House of Representatives for about six years, and we were pretty close. Not best friends close but certainly good friends.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..JU43xNQkwj7JUFIiaDK1-Vjio8EUT9c5H5FVzYgS8Jg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=123660696)
When Ron entered Congress in 2013, he had the peculiar characteristic of being an antiestablishment hawk--one who had served as a naval officer at Gitmo, no less. Most of the war hawks in Congress were strongly aligned with establishment figures like Lindsey Graham and John McCain, but Ron always had disdain for them and saw them as part of the problem.
He's exceptionally smart and disciplined, so it's possible he simply understood better than most people that political success often has more to do with who your friends and enemies are than with how you vote. The Tea Party movement was still in full swing, and an up-and-coming Republican didn't want to be associated with Graham or McCain, even if that person quietly voted with them on some of the biggest items.
It's also possible Ron viewed fiscal issues as being of paramount importance, which made him feel more at home among Tea Party conservatives. Despite being a hawk, he wasn't keen on nation-building. He viewed military force as a potential means to push U.S. interests but not as an effective tool to transform foreign countries into liberal democracies.
During my time in Congress, as chairman of the House Liberty Caucus (not to be confused with a separate, more infamous group I co-founded, the House Freedom Caucus--a story to be told a different time), I kept a private scorecard of my colleagues' votes. Layered on top of my personal relationships with them, I developed a strong sense of who they are and what motivates them.
In our first few years together, Ron and I were on the same side of many issues, but he was among the least libertarian--and least likely to be persuaded--of the persons I considered my best allies. He was most reliable on basic economic matters, like spending bills, and least reliable on subjects like war and civil liberties, including surveillance and privacy.
Recently, I looked back on our more than one hundred email exchanges from 2013 through our first couple years in the House Freedom Caucus. It was both a fascinating and sobering experience...

body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64550799/410434423/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTNmNTA0OS00YzA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dLmtS9GU-imT6EvLqzQBhQion8-AkYk5Ivz7haH9hsg=)
---
Peter, did you know that Rep. Mark Takano is the _very first LGBTQ+ person of color to be elected to Congress?_

But that’s just the beginning of what Mark has accomplished – he uses his lived experiences as a gay and Japanese American man to uplift marginalized communities at every turn.

[**Peter, will you chip in $7 to support Mark’s incredible work in Congress? Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b37eb2677a74d5db9255ea9ad1537d5&_e=Mh2Fr2x8ZqqQzRPkpcgGK4-Gx0SZLhKlu2QfKw3Ob0VMPjiSJK32Lh7cMYGZ7JsLvOtJKL2H8zH6OC9mlCdKO-TnD5mwqXMvTCMEdav7hU8KUcO0ge737PxCKDz106Ym-upsNy6IJ-rslvLk_kkMrU23Zvj3AB5ETzDqgIwDzTdqrhcs_ReC0ziuRgQxCtVXw5W0Zxm1Ee_bS_0mEmSgwgX6XZLdW3TNmNhUzKFGT9BoWYOoyDazPmJV3Hb6TWRt9Ch7oXOsV6ZX6RJOnmmJCw%3D%3D)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b37eb2677a74d5db9255ea9ad1537d5&_e=Mh2Fr2x8ZqqQzRPkpcgGK4-Gx0SZLhKlu2QfKw3Ob0VMPjiSJK32Lh7cMYGZ7JsLvOtJKL2H8zH6OC9mlCdKO-TnD5mwqXMvTCMEdav7hU8KUcO0ge737PxCKDz106YmMa2vHf7_ycXT0J10JIioMT0jjEDZ1lJHAh5Rb2q0hJ4J3s3dR_HK-AjVQxKj5oy52eUa18nM1ZeBz66-KFMBo9Xz58yFNtjdmMXZnGu6x4GkHEXjO_DWTQmrZWnogQa-IdLiZfZcq431RFWcFZ6SwA%3D%3D)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5b37eb2677a74d5db9255ea9ad1537d5&_e=Mh2Fr2x8ZqqQzRPkpcgGK4-Gx0SZLhKlu2QfKw3Ob0VMPjiSJK32Lh7cMYGZ7JsLvOtJKL2H8zH6OC9mlCdKO-TnD5mwqXMvTCMEdav7hU8KUcO0ge737PxCKDz106YmQtkMRXdMpmxNJlqO_fanQdEq4FpfedE7N1Z3dLy2vzfI3fV5IuZef8KcJuld30W6Dm-Kp3snun4HgVzIYLyyS5tUpesWGT1DVG-eiDXjBhTZieCTcuIDOD5-S35oHivOQhljSG76UQVE1HI40-itfg%3D%3D)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. name: Wiley Nickel
subject: An update on our fund
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306-q2-wn-blue-fund?refcode=230608-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306-q2-wn-blue-fund?refcode=230608-email]Peter,
Asking for money is not my favorite part of this job. But I know it’s important, and the funds we raise help us reach voters, spread my message, and build a strong coalition - all things that are absolutely essential for a winning campaign.
Today, the Supreme Court upheld provisions of the Voting Rights Act to keep states from racially gerrymandering their Congressional districts. This is a huge win, but the fight for voting rights and fair maps is one we must remain committed to. That’s why I’m asking you to get involved in our campaign, because if Bo Hines wins this race he will do all he can to limit voting access and roll back the progress that’s been made.
So I make the asks because I know what’s at risk if we let this seat flip. The issues we all care about so much: voting rights, reproductive freedom, and accessible healthcare rely on who represents our community in Congress.
Our 48-Hour Flip The House BLUE Fund is nearly over, and we still have $875 left to raise to reach our $2,500 goal by midnight. So while it’s no fun to ask for your donations, I’m doing it because I know how we show up this quarter will determine our ability to win this race in 2024.
That said, can you rush in a $25 donation right now so we can reach our goal by midnight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306-q2-wn-blue-fund?refcode=230608-email&amount=25]
Thank you for sticking with me and for your support of my campaign.
Wiley Nickel
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306-q2-wn-blue-fund?refcode=230608-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2306-q2-wn-blue-fund?refcode=230608-email]
Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. His 2022 opponent, Bo Hines, has announced he'll run against Wiley in 2024. Support #TeamWiley with a monthly donation today!

name: Biden HQ
subject: An inside look at the bipartisan budget agreement:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Help ensure we can finish the job of building a better America. | | |
---
Peter, On Saturday, President Biden signed the bipartisan budget agreement into law. We hope you’ll give us a moment to explain how it’s a big win for our economy and for the American people, and then [chip in $25 to the Biden-Harris reelection campaign to ensure we can finish the job of building a better America.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZyN9RztRkJJQ0soD-Ys57ovAvJRsEK4Ufw97fQhwLQaBJesoEVJTLarHFIFH3eL_dV0qXF7IalHaowOkU-eyCoJN3i9sq-5mCgEzUQbQOR7s09VdI4kqMpb6gtuRNeMj9dbp_aV4iAtdrX_K2DwtvaNPgRit_yEdtBmtO3OP8eMMEvRyifSE8i2h82dhEdQ0Fm1MA-4iUNvLEuCyQIhng_SVX_q7xokBV_GnUEIbihZP4lCTLm6JwbQIGGz1ikYm1NnMetiJmAQLSreShDgbhYZiDsfVNpyOHe-tlds0_4OcyEk-Y2Oj2MHR19FbgbRvIAVSEp3eHq4LKW9RyUkWCVkWiDsxfI_LFqc9-aKsqIyvKNACHL0guO3n6Rq949xCZMLnp6rYZUg4LLX0LJyBsCw/3wv/Wynx9efPRoq1Y8GRAmW1zg/h0/11YocLAhPGvXniEHpoHKdAJeWhmJmuZUeAmLIydQOPc) **Passing this budget agreement was critical -- and the stakes could not have been higher, Peter.** If we had failed to reach an agreement on the budget, America could have defaulted for the first time in our 247-year history. _Our economy would’ve been thrown into recession. Retirement accounts for millions of Americans could’ve been decimated. Eight million Americans could have lost their jobs._ Instead, we’re:
* **Protecting the Biden-Harris administration’s key accomplishments.** The agreement protects the _Inflation Reduction Act_ , which gives Medicare the power to negotiate lower drug prices and lowers costs for working families; the _CHIPS and Science Act_ , which is going to bring key parts of our supply chain to America; and the bipartisan _PACT Act_ , the most significant law in decades for veterans exposed to toxic burn pits and for their families.
* **Rejecting cuts to programs that veterans, seniors, and families count on.** From expanding access to health care for veterans and their families to ensuring that Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security were protected, President Biden kept his word that these programs would remain intact.
* **Cutting spending, putting us on a much more fiscally responsible course than the one President Biden inherited when he took office.** Over the next 10 years, the deficit will be cut by more than $1 trillion. And that will be on top of the record $1.7 trillion reduction of the deficit in President Biden’s first two years in office.

**President Biden is investing in America, in our people, and in our future. clean_body: Help ensure we can finish the job of building a better America. | | | Peter, On Saturday, President Biden signed the bipartisan budget agreement into law. We hope you’ll give us a moment to explain how it’s a big win for our economy and for the American people, and then Passing this budget agreement was critical -- and the stakes could not have been higher, Peter. If we had failed to reach an agreement on the budget, America could have defaulted for the first time in our 247-year history. Our economy would’ve been thrown into recession. Retirement accounts for millions of Americans could’ve been decimated. Eight million Americans could have lost their jobs. Instead, we’re: Protecting the Biden-Harris administration’s key accomplishments. The agreement protects the Inflation Reduction Act , which gives Medicare the power to negotiate lower drug prices and lowers costs for working families; the CHIPS and Science Act , which is going to bring key parts of our supply chain to America; and the bipartisan PACT Act , the most significant law in decades for veterans exposed to toxic burn pits and for their families. Rejecting cuts to programs that veterans, seniors, and families count on. From expanding access to health care for veterans and their families to ensuring that Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security were protected, President Biden kept his word that these programs would remain intact. Cutting spending, putting us on a much more fiscally responsible course than the one President Biden inherited when he took office. Over the next 10 years, the deficit will be cut by more than $1 trillion. And that will be on top of the record $1.7 trillion reduction of the deficit in President Biden’s first two years in office. President Biden is investing in America, in our people, and in our future. But he can’t do it without you, Peter. \-- Biden HQ

name: Tamie
subject: Jim Jordan’s Abuse Cover Up
body:
While serving as an assistant wrestling coach at Ohio State University, Jim Jordan turned a blind eye to sexual misconduct by the team's doctor, Richard Strauss. Under Jordan’s protection, Strauss’ abuse continued unimpaired for almost two decades and impacted an estimated close to 2,000 students and 170 wrestlers at that time.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64551881/410438848/1649708063?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAwNjciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWUzNGNlYmMtNTEwNi1lZTExLTkwN2MtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=lIbJ9KX-VKA3cfjRa7jB-1FmJ0AY-1HUikoAA4euDNc=)

Dear Friend , In the post Me-Too era we’ve learned that abusers don’t act alone and that it's ultimately their enablers who allow them to continue to offend without consequence. It’s no surprise then that enablers like Ghislaine Maxwell, accomplice to Jeffrey Epstein and Coach Joe Paterno, who covered up Jerry Sandusky’s abuse at Penn State, both faced public scrutiny and legal repercussions for shielding predators. It’s time for Jim Jordan to be held accountable too. While it has fallen out of the news cycle and is rarely discussed in 2023, **Jim Jordan is a member of that list of enablers**. He’s Joe Paterno 2.0! While serving as an assistant wrestling coach at Ohio State University, Jim Jordan turned a blind eye to reports of sexual misconduct by the team's doctor, Richard Strauss. Under Jordan’s protection, Strauss’ abuse continued unimpaired for almost two decades and impacted an estimated 2,000 students; 170 of them were his wrestlers, many of whom he recruited and promised their parents he would “take care of them.”

Despite Jordan’s stonewalling, dozens of survivors have come forward with their stories of telling Jordan about the abuse. Upon hearing these stories, the survivors describe Jordan responding dismissively and taking no action. He literally ran the other way, just like he does when union workers visit him in DC.

Despite a massive outcry in 2020 over the revelations of Jim Jordan’s covering up of Doctor Strauss’ abuse he faced no real consequences. Instead he has continued his upward ascent and since the beginning of 2023 serves as the Chair of the House Judiciary Committee and was even pushed as a contender for Speaker of the House.
As long as Congressman Jordan continues to accrue power within the GOP he will never face responsibility for his participation in the horrific system of abuse at Ohio State. And thanks to his position on the Judiciary Committee, he is now in a position to go to the mat for other GOP sexual predators like former President Donald Trump. In my professional life, I have personally worked with survivors of sexual, physical, mental and emotional abuse and I have worked with several organizations that help survivors. **When I beat Jim Jordan, Ohio will have a representative who will be a fighter on the side of survivors. ** [Friend \- Jim Jordan’s big money donors are unphased by his involvement in abuse and continue to help him raise millions of dollars each year - we need to keep pace with him if we are going to beat him. When I beat Jim Jordan, Ohio will have a representative who will be a fighter on the side of survivors. = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = | | Donate= or**= Thank you for standing with us. Your support is not only appreciated—it's crucial in this fight to remove this abuse enabler from Congress. ** Sincerely, Tamie Wilson Democratic for Congress (OH-04) | = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | |

name: National Democratic Redistricting Committee
subject: BREAKING: Supreme Court upholds key provisions of the Voting Rights Act!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

**This is incredible news, team: The Supreme Court has ruled in favor of Black voters in the case _Allen v. Milligan_ , and affirmed the strength of Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act!**

The Voting Rights Act (VRA) is considered the crown jewel of the Civil Rights Movement. This legislative accomplishment moved us closer to achieving equal treatment under the law, and has been repeatedly reauthorized by overwhelming bipartisan majorities in Congress, including a 98-0 vote in the Senate to reauthorize it most recently, in 2006.

**But recently, the Voting Rights Act has come under attack.** Ten years ago, the Court’s ruling in _Shelby County_ dismantled portions of the VRA, effectively nullifying Section 5. Section 5 was a critical tool to hold states accountable, specifically states with a history of racial discrimination. Under Section 5, these states needed to receive preclearance before passing new election laws. Eliminating this check in the disastrous _Shelby County_ ruling opened the door for a new wave of voter suppression laws across the country.

In _Allen v. Milligan_ , Alabama Republicans asked the Court to further undermine the VRA by invalidating provisions that prevent lawmakers from diluting the political power of communities of color. By rejecting these arguments, today’s ruling helps ensure that the Voting Rights Act will continue to serve as an important tool to make our democracy fairer.

**Today’s ruling represents a significant and sweeping victory for our democracy, but we must not rest. This is not the end of our fight against voter suppression.** Too many politicians across the country are determined to hold on to unearned power by restricting and undermining the right to vote.

[**_That’s why the NDRC is committing to continuing our democracy-saving work across the country. Will you donate today to help us keep fighting?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/64551940/410439079/719497906?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230608_FR_6RR_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFkMDRjMzQ5LTUyMDYtZWUxMS05MDdjLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Bl4S6i0Mnkji9HbTGw6fxroNBvnOMRPii0iZja12iTE=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Kevin McCarthy is one of the weakest Speakers our country has ever had – all because to get the job, he had to make a deal with the likes of Marjorie Taylor Greene and Matt Gaetz. Any single Republican in Congress can force a vote to remove him, so he is beholden to them.

clean_body: Unfortunately, this is no surprise,** Peter. A right-wing group aligned with Republican House Speaker Kevin McCarthy is running attack ads featuring Greg, AOC, and Senator Warren. = = Let me back up. Kevin McCarthy is one of the weakest Speakers our country has ever had – all because to get the job, he had to make a deal with the likes of Marjorie Taylor Greene and Matt Gaetz. Any single Republican in Congress can force a vote to remove him, so he is beholden to them. Now, some already want him gone.So a pro-McCarthy group is spending big money on TV ads attacking leaders like Greg. Their goal is to distract from Speaker McCarthy’s failures by fearmongering about principled progressives. Can you have Greg’s back?= Thank you for having Greg’s back, -Tara Tara Pohlmeyer Communications Director Greg Casar for Congress ****=** | ****** ---|---

body:
I hit the ground running to deliver wins for working families. | | | | [ ](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=2193cf67dc&e=2de202398d)
---
| Peter,

>From the moment I stepped foot in City Hall, I hit the ground running to deliver wins for working families. [**I'm proud of my record and I'm ready to continue to build on my accomplishments. But I need you by my side.**](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=d9c90f7488&e=2de202398d)

---
| [DONATE](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=f6366b24d9&e=2de202398d "DONATE")
---
| On the City Council, I created the first City-funded abortion fund in the nation and passed laws to offer free contraception and reproductive care to more New Yorkers. I worked to bring thousands of units of housing and fought to build a more just, affordable city for all. I worked to address the day-to-day problems of our neighbors -- from noise issues to ensuring heat and hot water for tenants -- and have taken on the looming existential threat of climate change.

We've accomplished a lot together and I'm running for re-election so we can continue this critical work.

[**Will you stand with me?**](https://nyc.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5ebb7fcc9c4e1e9fab452c873&id=69e089108f&e=2de202398d)

| Thank you,
Carlina

name: JD Vance
subject: Firstly….
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
fighting against corruption for the American taxpayer

| [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=14fdd295ddcd4f3ca1cb39e6e4a0da54&_e=L-bGGkYUW9Y9PEBT6g4ye1LlvWyex55txrEPFQ9UdkHK5qcDeXXYffYEct6wrkBQjR0AKXHjWMkbDGpuEqnlXDRcKIAsAjxeSG3ZL96rpCOyWsW0IIYhKBvcAWyqqO4-7S1D3OdnowFUTXhPPugzIm0HlzLTB-9mtRIbNPXCaYwPEsvap5ES7JUC43Gh7SdPwY1-UxuH1OmFgabMOomAaEAShG8mWJota7hiFh6NLWLCrkGLv_fo_Tkqshu4Z_fulgodjv8KQrFbsgaHImUQevmF83FZYJwlZ5cgOPJPHhguEsDwn4Tb_FdXgsocjvvA)
---
Let me tell you how it went.

_**First, it was the fight against Big Tech for censoring conservative voices.

Then, it was the fight against Big Pharma for COVID fearmongering.

Now, it's the fight against Big Bank executives for pocketing massive bonuses while expecting taxpayer bailouts. ** _

I recently cosponsored a bill to hold big banks accountable for taking our money. Bigwigs at failing banks have been paying themselves fat bonuses even as their banks go down the drain. When it all falls apart, they expect taxpayers to bail them out...**_Smells like corruption to me!_**

This bill holds banks accountable and demands responsibility and transparency. name: Kim Nguyen
subject: Your thoughts on the fight for LGBTQ+ equality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kim Nguyen for Congress
body:
| | **June is Pride Month – and right now, the fight for LGBTQ+ equality has never been more important.**

Republican-led legislatures are passing an unprecedented number of anti-LGBTQ+ bills that target transgender Americans, drag queens, and more. MAGA extremists are whipping up fear and paranoia targeting LGBTQ+ youth. And far-right activists are hijacking school boards and pushing for bans on LGBTQ+ curricula.

**The GOP’s anti-LGBTQ+ agenda is dangerous and wrong. We believe in true _equality_ for everyone, and we don’t tolerate transphobia, homophobia, or hate in any form.**

[There’s so much at stake in this moment, which is why I want to hear your thoughts on the fight for LGBTQ+ rights. name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: Is Florida a terrorist state?
body:
| | | Fellow American,
---
_I can’t believe it._

**A far-Left radical on MSNBC claimed Florida is a “terrorist state” because of our strong conservative leadership.**

**Let me tell you, I know what terrorism looks like - and it’s not Florida freedom.**

I’ve been shot at on the battlefields of Afghanistan. I’ve taken on the Taliban. And I know that the people forced to live under their rule would give _anything_ to live in a place like Florida.

[**Far-Left extremists are trying to sink our state because they KNOW our conservative leadership works - and that absolutely INFURIATES them. Now, it’s time to fight back and defend our way of life. clean_body: | | | Fellow American, I can’t believe it. A far-Left radical on MSNBC claimed Florida is a “terrorist state” because of our strong conservative leadership. Let me tell you, I know what terrorism looks like - and it’s not Florida freedom. I’ve been shot at on the battlefields of Afghanistan. I’ve taken on the Taliban. And I know that the people forced to live under their rule would give anything to live in a place like Florida. As a Green Beret veteran, I don’t take claims of “terrorism” lightly. I saw too many great Americans give their lives to keep the world from real terrorists. I wasn’t afraid when I went toe to toe with the Taliban, and I’m certainly not afraid of the socialists trying to take us down. | | In Service, Col. body:
He's running for the State Senate district I used to represent.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64552349/410440864/1460084265?refcode=EM_FR_230608SS_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDgzNjU3Yi01NjA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rKeQ9XYtQsxlHTvpqfozkfKzFHuDKL54wXyj3yH9Bsk=)

While I am working hard in Congress to protect our values, I'm also determined to do what I can in our Commonwealth to ensure that we hold the State Senate — where Democrats have only a 2-seat majority — so we can block MAGA Republican bills from reaching Glenn Youngkin's desk.

That's why I'm reaching out today about my friend, Delegate Suhas Subramanyam, who has a primary coming up on June 20th — for the State Senate seat I used to represent!

**I am proud to endorse Del. Subramanyam for State Senate District 32. I trust him to continue protecting our values in the Virginia General Assembly, and run a strong race to keep the State Senate blue.[ To make sure that happens, can you rush a split contribution of $10 now to our campaigns? Suhas needs every last resource to get out the vote in the next 12 days before his primary.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64552350/410440865/1460084265?refcode=EM_FR_230608SS_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDgzNjU3Yi01NjA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rKeQ9XYtQsxlHTvpqfozkfKzFHuDKL54wXyj3yH9Bsk=)** [Donate ➞](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/64552351/410440866/1460084265?refcode=EM_FR_230608SS_N_JW_FULL_7_NG_N_B1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDgzNjU3Yi01NjA2LWVlMTEtOTA3Yy0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rKeQ9XYtQsxlHTvpqfozkfKzFHuDKL54wXyj3yH9Bsk=) Suhas has delivered for Loudoun County as a Delegate on everything from gun violence prevention, to protecting reproductive rights, to addressing rising costs like tolls and utilities. He’s also been a tireless champion for funding our public schools, recruiting and retaining great teachers, and prioritizing academics over culture wars.

**Suhas will never compromise on our shared values and has always fought back attacks on our rights and democracy from extremists.**

There is much to do when it comes to the issues that are keeping us all up at night, and there is no candidate that I trust more to deliver on these issues than Suhas. In the State Senate, he will continue to fight to protect abortion access and push for further commonsense gun reforms. **And most importantly, he has the temperament and track record of success to deliver results for Loudoun County, stand up to extremism, and ensure this seat stays blue.**

**[District 32 couldn't ask for a better State Senator, and I hope you'll join me to ensure that Suhas crosses the finish line. clean_body: He's running for the State Senate district I used to represent. = While I am working hard in Congress to protect our values, I'm also determined to do what I can in our Commonwealth to ensure that we hold the State Senate — where Democrats have only a 2-seat majority — so we can block MAGA Republican bills from reaching Glenn Youngkin's desk. That's why I'm reaching out today about my friend, Delegate Suhas Subramanyam, who has a primary coming up on June 20th — for the State Senate seat I used to represent! I am proud to endorse Del. Subramanyam for State Senate District 32. I trust him to continue protecting our values in the Virginia General Assembly, and run a strong race to keep the State Senate blue.= = Suhas has delivered for Loudoun County as a Delegate on everything from gun violence prevention, to protecting reproductive rights, to addressing rising costs like tolls and utilities. He’s also been a tireless champion for funding our public schools, recruiting and retaining great teachers, and prioritizing academics over culture wars. Suhas will never compromise on our shared values and has always fought back attacks on our rights and democracy from extremists. There is much to do when it comes to the issues that are keeping us all up at night, and there is no candidate that I trust more to deliver on these issues than Suhas. In the State Senate, he will continue to fight to protect abortion access and push for further commonsense gun reforms. And most importantly, he has the temperament and track record of success to deliver results for Loudoun County, stand up to extremism, and ensure this seat stays blue. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Suhas Sabramanyam and Jennifer Wexton: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Thanks so much, Jennifer Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia.
